17: /// Root application shell for the public cross-platform build.
18: class VanSoleApp extends StatelessWidget {
19:   const VanSoleApp({super.key});
20: 
21:   @override
22:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
23:     final scheme =
24:         ColorScheme.fromSeed(
25:           seedColor: const Color(0xFF1DD3B0),
26:           brightness: Brightness.dark,
27:         ).copyWith(
28:           primary: const Color(0xFF34E7C5),
29:           secondary: const Color(0xFFFFB454),
30:           surface: const Color(0xFF101823),
31:         );
32: 
33:     return MaterialApp(
34:       debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false,
35:       title: 'Van Solè',
36:       theme: ThemeData(
37:         useMaterial3: true,
38:         colorScheme: scheme,
39:         scaffoldBackgroundColor: Colors.black,
40:         tooltipTheme: TooltipThemeData(
41:           waitDuration: const Duration(milliseconds: 250),
42:           showDuration: const Duration(seconds: 4),
43:           preferBelow: false,
44:           padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
45:           decoration: BoxDecoration(
46:             color: const Color(0xFF0B1520).withValues(alpha: 0.96),
47:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
48:             border: Border.all(
49:               color: const Color(0xFF34E7C5).withValues(alpha: 0.3),
50:             ),
51:           ),
52:           textStyle: const TextStyle(
53:             color: Color(0xFFF2F7FB),
54:             fontSize: 12,
55:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
56:           ),
57:         ),
58:         textTheme: const TextTheme(
59:           headlineMedium: TextStyle(
60:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
61:             letterSpacing: -0.4,
62:           ),
63:           titleMedium: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
64:           bodyMedium: TextStyle(height: 1.2),
65:         ),
66:       ),
67:       home: const VanSoleHomePage(),
68:     );
69:   }
70: }
71: 
72: class VanSoleHomePage extends StatefulWidget {
73:   const VanSoleHomePage({super.key});
74: 
75:   @override
76:   State<VanSoleHomePage> createState() => _VanSoleHomePageState();
77: }
78: 
79: // Owns the simulation loop, input mapping, save/load controls, and the
80: // responsive shell that wraps the fixed cockpit renderer.
81: class _VanSoleHomePageState extends State<VanSoleHomePage>
82:     with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
83:   late VanSoleGame _game;
84:   late final Ticker _ticker;
85:   final FocusNode _focusNode = FocusNode(debugLabel: 'sector-view');
86:   final Set<LogicalKeyboardKey> _pressedKeys = <LogicalKeyboardKey>{};
87:   final Set<VirtualAction> _touchActions = <VirtualAction>{};
88:   final TextEditingController _saveCodeController = TextEditingController();
89:   Duration? _lastTick;
90:   int _lastAudioCueSerial = 0;
91:   String _saveStatus = 'No save exported yet.';
92:   String? _quickSaveCode;
93:   SessionMode _sessionMode = SessionMode.title;
94: 
95:   @override
96:   void initState() {
97:     super.initState();
98:     _game = VanSoleGame();
99:     _ticker = createTicker(_onTick)..start();
100:   }
101: 
102:   @override
103:   void dispose() {
104:     _ticker.dispose();
105:     _focusNode.dispose();
106:     _saveCodeController.dispose();
107:     super.dispose();
108:   }
109: 
110:   void _onTick(Duration timestamp) {
111:     final last = _lastTick;
112:     _lastTick = timestamp;
113:     if (last == null || !mounted) {
114:       return;
115:     }
116:     final dt = ((timestamp - last).inMicroseconds / 1000000.0)
117:         .clamp(0.0, 0.05)
118:         .toDouble();
119:     if (dt <= 0) {
120:       return;
121:     }
122:     setState(() {
123:       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) {
124:         _game.update(dt, _currentInput());
125:       }
126:       _drainAudioCue();
127:     });
128:   }
129: 
130:   void _drainAudioCue() {
131:     if (_game.audioCueSerial == _lastAudioCueSerial) {
132:       return;
133:     }
134:     _lastAudioCueSerial = _game.audioCueSerial;
135:     final cue = _game.lastAudioCue;
136:     if (cue == null) {
137:       return;
138:     }
139:     switch (cue) {
140:       case GameAudioCue.fire:
141:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.click);
142:         HapticFeedback.lightImpact();
143:         break;
144:       case GameAudioCue.contract:
145:       case GameAudioCue.comms:
146:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.click);
147:         HapticFeedback.selectionClick();
148:         break;
149:       case GameAudioCue.hit:
150:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.alert);
151:         HapticFeedback.mediumImpact();
152:         break;
153:       case GameAudioCue.warning:
154:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.alert);
155:         HapticFeedback.selectionClick();
156:         break;
157:       case GameAudioCue.dock:
158:       case GameAudioCue.jump:
159:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.click);
160:         HapticFeedback.mediumImpact();
161:         break;
162:     }
163:   }
164: 
165:   void _mutateGame(VoidCallback mutate) {
166:     setState(() {
167:       mutate();
168:       _drainAudioCue();
169:     });
170:   }
171: 
172:   void _startNewCampaign() {
173:     setState(() {
174:       _game = VanSoleGame();
175:       _lastAudioCueSerial = 0;
176:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.playing;
177:       _pressedKeys.clear();
178:       _touchActions.clear();
179:       _saveStatus = 'New campaign started.';
180:     });
181:     WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
182:       if (mounted) {
183:         _focusNode.requestFocus();
184:       }
185:     });
186:   }
187: 
188:   void _resumePlay() {
189:     setState(() {
190:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.playing;
191:       _pressedKeys.clear();
192:       _touchActions.clear();
193:     });
194:     WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
195:       if (mounted) {
196:         _focusNode.requestFocus();
197:       }
198:     });
199:   }
200: 
201:   void _pausePlay() {
202:     setState(() {
203:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.paused;
204:       _pressedKeys.clear();
205:       _touchActions.clear();
206:     });
207:   }
208: 
209:   void _returnToTitle() {
210:     setState(() {
211:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.title;
212:       _pressedKeys.clear();
213:       _touchActions.clear();
214:     });
215:   }
216: 
217:   Future<void> _copySaveCode() async {
218:     final code = _game.exportSaveCode();
219:     _saveCodeController.text = code;
220:     _quickSaveCode = code;
221:     await Clipboard.setData(ClipboardData(text: code));
222:     if (!mounted) {
223:       return;
224:     }
225:     setState(() {
226:       _saveStatus =
227:           'Save code copied (${code.length} chars). Quick slot updated.';
228:     });
229:   }
230: 
231:   Future<void> _pasteSaveCode() async {
232:     final data = await Clipboard.getData(Clipboard.kTextPlain);
233:     if (!mounted) {
234:       return;
235:     }
236:     setState(() {
237:       _saveCodeController.text = data?.text ?? '';
238:       _saveStatus = _saveCodeController.text.isEmpty
239:           ? 'Clipboard was empty.'
240:           : 'Pasted save code from clipboard.';
241:     });
242:   }
243: 
244:   void _loadFromSaveField() {
245:     final raw = _saveCodeController.text.trim();
246:     if (raw.isEmpty) {
247:       setState(() {
248:         _saveStatus = 'Paste or export a save code first.';
249:       });
250:       return;
251:     }
252:     try {
253:       _mutateGame(() => _game.importSaveCode(raw));
254:       setState(() {
255:         _saveStatus = 'Save loaded successfully.';
256:       });
257:     } catch (error) {
258:       setState(() {
259:         _saveStatus = 'Load failed: $error';
260:       });
261:     }
262:   }
263: 
264:   void _quickSave() {
265:     final code = _game.exportSaveCode();
266:     _quickSaveCode = code;
267:     setState(() {
268:       _saveStatus = 'Quick save slot updated.';
269:       _saveCodeController.text = code;
270:     });
271:   }
272: 
273:   void _quickLoad() {
274:     final code = _quickSaveCode;
275:     if (code == null) {
276:       setState(() {
277:         _saveStatus = 'Quick save slot is empty.';
278:       });
279:       return;
280:     }
281:     try {
282:       _mutateGame(() => _game.importSaveCode(code));
283:       setState(() {
284:         _saveStatus = 'Quick save loaded.';
285:         _saveCodeController.text = code;
286:         _sessionMode = SessionMode.playing;
287:       });
288:       WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
289:         if (mounted) {
290:           _focusNode.requestFocus();
291:         }
292:       });
293:     } catch (error) {
294:       setState(() {
295:         _saveStatus = 'Quick load failed: $error';
296:       });
297:     }
298:   }
299: 
300:   PlayerInput _currentInput() {
301:     if (_sessionMode != SessionMode.playing) {
302:       return const PlayerInput(
303:         up: false,
304:         down: false,
305:         left: false,
306:         right: false,
307:         fire: false,
308:         boost: false,
309:       );
310:     }
311:     bool hasAny(Set<LogicalKeyboardKey> keys) =>
312:         keys.any((key) => _pressedKeys.contains(key));
313: 
314:     return PlayerInput(
315:       up:
316:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyW, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowUp}) ||
317:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.up),
318:       down:
319:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyS, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowDown}) ||
320:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.down),
321:       left:
322:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyA, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowLeft}) ||
323:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.left),
324:       right:
325:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyD, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowRight}) ||
326:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.right),
327:       fire:
328:           _pressedKeys.contains(LogicalKeyboardKey.space) ||
329:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.fire),
330:       boost:
331:           _pressedKeys.contains(LogicalKeyboardKey.shiftLeft) ||
332:           _pressedKeys.contains(LogicalKeyboardKey.shiftRight) ||
333:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.boost),
334:     );
335:   }
336: 
337:   KeyEventResult _handleKeyEvent(FocusNode node, KeyEvent event) {
338:     final key = event.logicalKey;
339: 
340:     if (event is KeyDownEvent || event is KeyRepeatEvent) {
341:       _pressedKeys.add(key);
342:     } else if (event is KeyUpEvent) {
343:       _pressedKeys.remove(key);
344:     }
345: 
346:     if (event is KeyDownEvent) {
347:       if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.escape) {
348:         if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) {
349:           _pausePlay();
350:         } else if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.paused) {
351:           _resumePlay();
352:         }
353:         return KeyEventResult.handled;
354:       }
355:       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.title) {
356:         if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.enter ||
357:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.numpadEnter ||
358:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.space) {
359:           _startNewCampaign();
360:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyL) {
361:           _quickLoad();
362:         }
363:         return KeyEventResult.handled;
364:       }
365:       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.paused) {
366:         if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.enter ||
367:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.numpadEnter ||
368:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.space) {
369:           _resumePlay();
370:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyQ) {
371:           _returnToTitle();
372:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyK) {
373:           _quickSave();
374:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyL) {
375:           _quickLoad();
376:         }
377:         return KeyEventResult.handled;
378:       }
379:       if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyE) {
380:         _mutateGame(_game.toggleDocking);
381:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyF) {
382:         _mutateGame(_game.tryAcceptDockContract);
383:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyR) {
384:         _mutateGame(_game.tryDeliverDockContract);
385:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyJ) {
386:         _mutateGame(_game.attemptJump);
387:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyT) {
388:         _mutateGame(_game.cycleTracking);
389:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyC) {
390:         _mutateGame(_game.requestComms);
391:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyH) {
392:         _mutateGame(_game.harvestResource);
393:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit1) {
394:         _mutateGame(() {
395:           if (_game.activeEncounter != null) {
396:             _game.chooseDialogueOption(0);
397:           } else {
398:             _game.setCockpitMode(1);
399:           }
400:         });
401:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit2) {
402:         _mutateGame(() {
403:           if (_game.activeEncounter != null) {
404:             _game.chooseDialogueOption(1);
405:           } else {
406:             _game.setCockpitMode(2);
407:           }
408:         });
409:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit3) {
410:         _mutateGame(() {
411:           if (_game.activeEncounter != null) {
412:             _game.chooseDialogueOption(2);
413:           } else {
414:             _game.setCockpitMode(3);
415:           }
416:         });
417:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit4) {
418:         _mutateGame(() => _game.setCockpitMode(4));
419:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit5) {
420:         _mutateGame(() => _game.setCockpitMode(5));
421:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit6) {
422:         _mutateGame(() => _game.setCockpitMode(6));
423:       }
424:     }
425: 
426:     return KeyEventResult.handled;
427:   }
428: 
429:   void _setTouchAction(VirtualAction action, bool active) {
430:     setState(() {
431:       if (active) {
432:         _touchActions.add(action);
433:       } else {
434:         _touchActions.remove(action);
435:       }
436:     });
437:   }
438: 
439:   String _objectiveLabel() {
440:     final mission = _game.activeCampaignMission;
441:     if (mission == null) {
442:       return 'Campaign complete. Free-roam contracts and combat are active.';
443:     }
444:     return 'Objective: ${mission.title} (${_game.campaignProgressText})';
445:   }
446: 
447:   Widget _buildSessionOverlay(ColorScheme colors) {
448:     if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) {
449:       return const SizedBox.shrink();
450:     }
451:     final title = _sessionMode == SessionMode.title ? 'VAN SOLÈ' : 'PAUSED';
452:     final subtitle = _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
453:         ? 'Cross-platform spacefaring action RPG'
454:         : 'Press Esc to resume flight controls';
455:     return Positioned.fill(
456:       child: ColoredBox(
457:         color: Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.72),
458:         child: Center(
459:           child: SingleChildScrollView(
460:             padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
461:             child: ConstrainedBox(
462:               constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 560),
463:               child: DecoratedBox(
464:                 decoration: BoxDecoration(
465:                   color: const Color(0xFF05070D),
466:                   borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
467:                   border: Border.all(
468:                     color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
469:                   ),
470:                 ),
471:                 child: Padding(
472:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.all(18),
473:                   child: Column(
474:                     mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
475:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
476:                     children: [
477:                       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.title)
478:                         Container(
479:                           height: 180,
480:                           decoration: BoxDecoration(
481:                             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),
482:                             gradient: const LinearGradient(
483:                               begin: Alignment.topCenter,
484:                               end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
485:                               colors: [Color(0xFF10223A), Color(0xFF04080D)],
486:                             ),
487:                             border: Border.all(
488:                               color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.25),
489:                             ),
490:                           ),
491:                           child: Center(
492:                             child: Text(
493:                               'VAN SOLÈ',
494:                               textAlign: TextAlign.center,
495:                               style: TextStyle(
496:                                 color: colors.secondary,
497:                                 fontSize: 34,
498:                                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
499:                                 letterSpacing: 2.4,
500:                                 fontFamilyFallback: const [
501:                                   'Menlo',
502:                                   'Monaco',
503:                                   'Courier New',
504:                                 ],
505:                               ),
506:                             ),
507:                           ),
508:                         ),
509:                       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.title)
510:                         const SizedBox(height: 12),
511:                       Text(
512:                         title,
513:                         textAlign: TextAlign.center,
514:                         style: const TextStyle(
515:                           fontSize: 22,
516:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
517:                           letterSpacing: 1.1,
518:                           fontFamilyFallback: [
519:                             'Menlo',
520:                             'Monaco',
521:                             'Courier New',
522:                           ],
523:                         ),
524:                       ),
525:                       const SizedBox(height: 6),
526:                       Text(
527:                         subtitle,
528:                         textAlign: TextAlign.center,
529:                         style: const TextStyle(
530:                           color: Colors.white70,
531:                           fontFamilyFallback: [
532:                             'Menlo',
533:                             'Monaco',
534:                             'Courier New',
535:                           ],
536:                         ),
537:                       ),
538:                       const SizedBox(height: 14),
539:                       Text(
540:                         _objectiveLabel(),
541:                         style: TextStyle(
542:                           color: colors.secondary,
543:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
544:                         ),
545:                       ),
546:                       const SizedBox(height: 12),
547:                       Wrap(
548:                         spacing: 8,
549:                         runSpacing: 8,
550:                         children: [
551:                           _withTooltip(
552:                             _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
553:                                 ? 'Start a new campaign.'
554:                                 : 'Return to the live flight view.',
555:                             FilledButton.tonal(
556:                               key: const Key('start-campaign-button'),
557:                               onPressed: _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
558:                                   ? _startNewCampaign
559:                                   : _resumePlay,
560:                               child: Text(
561:                                 _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
562:                                     ? 'Start Campaign'
563:                                     : 'Resume (Esc)',
564:                               ),
565:                             ),
566:                           ),
567:                           _withTooltip(
568:                             'Load the current quick-save slot.',
569:                             OutlinedButton(
570:                               onPressed: _quickSaveCode == null
571:                                   ? null
572:                                   : _quickLoad,
573:                               child: const Text('Load Quick Save (L)'),
574:                             ),
575:                           ),
576:                           _withTooltip(
577:                             'Write the current run into the quick-save slot.',
578:                             OutlinedButton(
579:                               onPressed: _quickSave,
580:                               child: const Text('Quick Save (K)'),
581:                             ),
582:                           ),
583:                           if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.paused)
584:                             _withTooltip(
585:                               'Leave the current session and go back to the title screen.',
586:                               OutlinedButton(
587:                                 onPressed: _returnToTitle,
588:                                 child: const Text('Return to Title (Q)'),
589:                               ),
590:                             ),
591:                         ],
592:                       ),
593:                       const SizedBox(height: 10),
594:                       const Text(
595:                         'Controls: WASD/Arrows thrust, Space fire, Shift boost, T track, C comms, H harvest, E dock, J jump, F/R contract, 1-6 panel modes.',
596:                         style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white60, fontSize: 12),
597:                       ),
598:                       const SizedBox(height: 6),
599:                       Text(
600:                         'Release v$_releaseVersion  |  Support: buymeacoffee.com/einnovoeg',
601:                         textAlign: TextAlign.center,
602:                         style: const TextStyle(
603:                           color: Colors.white38,
604:                           fontSize: 11,
605:                         ),
606:                       ),
607:                     ],
608:                   ),
609:                 ),
610:               ),
611:             ),
612:           ),
613:         ),
614:       ),
615:     );
616:   }

618:   Widget _buildGamePane(BuildContext context, bool compact) {
619:     final colors = Theme.of(context).colorScheme;
620:     final immersivePlay = _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing;
621:     return Padding(
622:       padding: EdgeInsets.all(immersivePlay ? 0 : 12),
623:       child: Column(
624:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
625:         children: [
626:           if (!immersivePlay && compact)
627:             Column(
628:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
629:               children: [
630:                 Text(
631:                   'Van Solè',
632:                   style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
633:                 ),
634:                 const SizedBox(height: 2),
635:                 Text(
636:                   'Spacefaring action RPG',
637:                   style: Theme.of(
638:                     context,
639:                   ).textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(color: Colors.white70),
640:                 ),
641:                 const SizedBox(height: 8),
642:                 Wrap(
643:                   spacing: 8,
644:                   runSpacing: 8,
645:                   children: [
646:                     Container(
647:                       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
648:                         horizontal: 14,
649:                         vertical: 8,
650:                       ),
651:                       decoration: BoxDecoration(
652:                         color: colors.surface.withValues(alpha: 0.8),
653:                         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
654:                         border: Border.all(
655:                           color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
656:                         ),
657:                       ),
658:                       child: Text(
659:                         'Sector: ${_game.sectorName}',
660:                         style: TextStyle(
661:                           color: colors.primary,
662:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
663:                         ),
664:                       ),
665:                     ),
666:                     Container(
667:                       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
668:                         horizontal: 10,
669:                         vertical: 6,
670:                       ),
671:                       decoration: BoxDecoration(
672:                         color: const Color(0xFF111D2A),
673:                         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
674:                         border: Border.all(
675:                           color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.15),
676:                         ),
677:                       ),
678:                       child: Text(
679:                         'MODE ${_sessionMode.name.toUpperCase()}',
680:                         style: TextStyle(
681:                           color: _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing
682:                               ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
683:                               : const Color(0xFFE5D089),
684:                           fontSize: 12,
685:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
686:                         ),
687:                       ),
688:                     ),
689:                   ],
690:                 ),
691:               ],
692:             )
693:           else if (!immersivePlay)
694:             Row(
695:               children: [
696:                 Expanded(
697:                   child: Column(
698:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
699:                     children: [
700:                       Text(
701:                         'Van Solè',
702:                         style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
703:                       ),
704:                       const SizedBox(height: 2),
705:                       Text(
706:                         'Campaign-driven exploration, trading, combat, and ship management',
707:                         style: Theme.of(
708:                           context,
709:                         ).textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(color: Colors.white70),
710:                       ),
711:                     ],
712:                   ),
713:                 ),
714:                 Container(
715:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
716:                     horizontal: 14,
717:                     vertical: 8,
718:                   ),
719:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
720:                     color: colors.surface.withValues(alpha: 0.8),
721:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
722:                     border: Border.all(
723:                       color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
724:                     ),
725:                   ),
726:                   child: Text(
727:                     'Sector: ${_game.sectorName}',
728:                     style: TextStyle(
729:                       color: colors.primary,
730:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
731:                     ),
732:                   ),
733:                 ),
734:                 const SizedBox(width: 8),
735:                 Container(
736:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
737:                     horizontal: 10,
738:                     vertical: 6,
739:                   ),
740:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
741:                     color: const Color(0xFF111D2A),
742:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
743:                     border: Border.all(
744:                       color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.15),
745:                     ),
746:                   ),
747:                   child: Text(
748:                     'MODE ${_sessionMode.name.toUpperCase()}',
749:                     style: TextStyle(
750:                       color: _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing
751:                           ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
752:                           : const Color(0xFFE5D089),
753:                       fontSize: 12,
754:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
755:                     ),
756:                   ),
757:                 ),
758:                 const SizedBox(width: 10),
759:               ],
760:             ),
761:           if (!immersivePlay) const SizedBox(height: 12),
762:           Expanded(
763:             child: DecoratedBox(
764:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
765:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(immersivePlay ? 0 : 20),
766:                 border: immersivePlay
767:                     ? null
768:                     : Border.all(color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.18)),
769:                 boxShadow: immersivePlay
770:                     ? null
771:                     : [
772:                         BoxShadow(
773:                           color: Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
774:                           blurRadius: 20,
775:                           offset: const Offset(0, 10),
776:                         ),
777:                       ],
778:                 gradient: immersivePlay
779:                     ? const LinearGradient(
780:                         begin: Alignment.topCenter,
781:                         end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
782:                         colors: [Color(0xFF000000), Color(0xFF03070D)],
783:                       )
784:                     : const LinearGradient(
785:                         begin: Alignment.topLeft,
786:                         end: Alignment.bottomRight,
787:                         colors: [Color(0xFF0B1017), Color(0xFF08121D)],
788:                       ),
789:               ),
790:               child: ClipRRect(
791:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(immersivePlay ? 0 : 20),
792:                 child: Stack(
793:                   children: [
794:                     Positioned.fill(
795:                       child: Focus(
796:                         autofocus: true,
797:                         focusNode: _focusNode,
798:                         onKeyEvent: _handleKeyEvent,
799:                         child: GestureDetector(
800:                           onTap: () => _focusNode.requestFocus(),
801:                           child: _CockpitSurface(
802:                             key: const Key('flight-surface'),
803:                             game: _game,
804:                           ),
805:                         ),
806:                       ),
807:                     ),
808:                     if (!immersivePlay)
809:                       Positioned(
810:                         top: 12,
811:                         left: 12,
812:                         right: 12,
813:                         child: Wrap(
814:                           alignment: WrapAlignment.spaceBetween,
815:                           runSpacing: 8,
816:                           spacing: 8,
817:                           children: [
818:                             _Pill(
819:                               label: _game.isDocked
820:                                   ? 'Docked at ${_game.dockedStation!.name}'
821:                                   : _game.dockCandidate != null
822:                                   ? 'Docking window open (${_game.dockCandidate!.name})'
823:                                   : 'In flight',
824:                               color: _game.isDocked
825:                                   ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
826:                                   : (_game.dockCandidate != null
827:                                         ? const Color(0xFFFBBF24)
828:                                         : const Color(0xFF93C5FD)),
829:                             ),
830:                             _Pill(
831:                               label: _objectiveLabel(),
832:                               color: const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
833:                               muted: true,
834:                             ),
835:                             _Pill(
836:                               label:
837:                                   'TRACKING [T] | COMM [C] | THRUST WASD | FIRE SPACE | BOOST SHIFT | DOCK E | JUMP J | PAUSE ESC',
838:                               color: const Color(0xFFCBD5E1),
839:                               muted: true,
840:                             ),
841:                             if (_game.jumpCandidate != null)
842:                               _Pill(
843:                                 label:
844:                                     'Jump gate ready: ${_game.jumpCandidate!.name} (press J)',
845:                                 color: const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
846:                               ),
847:                           ],
848:                         ),
849:                       ),
850:                     if (compact && _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) ...[
851:                       Positioned(
852:                         left: 12,
853:                         right: 12,
854:                         bottom: 12,
855:                         child: _TouchControls(
856:                           onDockTap: () => _mutateGame(_game.toggleDocking),
857:                           onJumpTap: () => _mutateGame(_game.attemptJump),
858:                           onAction: _setTouchAction,
859:                         ),
860:                       ),
861:                     ],
862:                     _buildSessionOverlay(colors),
863:                   ],
864:                 ),
865:               ),
866:             ),
867:           ),
868:         ],
869:       ),
870:     );
871:   }

873:   Widget _buildHudPane(BuildContext context, bool compact) {
874:     final colors = Theme.of(context).colorScheme;
875:     final cards = <Widget>[
876:       _HudCard(
877:         title: 'CONTROL PANEL',
878:         trailing: Text(
879:           'Threat ${_game.pirates.length}',
880:           style: TextStyle(
881:             color: colors.secondary,
882:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
883:           ),
884:         ),
885:         child: Column(
886:           children: [
887:             _MeterRow(
888:               label: 'HULL',
889:               value: _game.playerHull / 100,
890:               text: _pct(_game.playerHull),
891:               color: const Color(0xFFF87171),
892:             ),
893:             _MeterRow(
894:               label: 'SHIELD',
895:               value: _game.playerShield / _game.shieldCapacity,
896:               text:
897:                   '${_game.playerShield.round()}/${_game.shieldCapacity.round()}',
898:               color: const Color(0xFF60A5FA),
899:             ),
900:             _MeterRow(
901:               label: 'ENERGY',
902:               value: _game.playerEnergy / 100,
903:               text: _pct(_game.playerEnergy),
904:               color: const Color(0xFF34D399),
905:             ),
906:             _MeterRow(
907:               label: 'FUEL',
908:               value: _game.playerFuel / 100,
909:               text: _pct(_game.playerFuel),
910:               color: const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
911:             ),
912:             const SizedBox(height: 10),
913:             Wrap(
914:               spacing: 8,
915:               runSpacing: 8,
916:               children: [
917:                 _TagMetric(label: 'CREDITS', value: '${_game.credits} cr'),
918:                 _TagMetric(
919:                   label: 'CARGO',
920:                   value:
921:                       '${_game.totalCargoUsed}/${_game.cargoCapacity} (${_game.tradeCargoUsed} trade)',
922:                 ),
923:                 _TagMetric(
924:                   label: 'NEAREST',
925:                   value: _game.nearestStation == null
926:                       ? '-'
927:                       : '${_game.nearestStation!.name} ${_distanceKm(_game.nearestStationDistance)}',
928:                 ),
929:                 _TagMetric(
930:                   label: 'PIRATE',
931:                   value: _game.nearestPirateDistance.isFinite
932:                       ? _distanceKm(_game.nearestPirateDistance)
933:                       : 'clear',
934:                 ),
935:                 _TagMetric(
936:                   label: 'GATE',
937:                   value: _game.nearestPortalDistance.isFinite
938:                       ? _distanceKm(_game.nearestPortalDistance)
939:                       : 'none',
940:                 ),
941:               ],
942:             ),
943:           ],
944:         ),
945:       ),
946:       _HudCard(
947:         title: 'RADAR / SPEED',
948:         trailing: Text(
949:           _distanceKm(VanSoleGame.radarRange),
950:           style: TextStyle(color: colors.primary),
951:         ),
952:         child: Center(
953:           child: SizedBox(
954:             width: compact ? 220 : 260,
955:             height: compact ? 220 : 260,
956:             child: CustomPaint(painter: RadarPainter(_game)),
957:           ),
958:         ),
959:       ),
960:       _HudCard(
961:         title: 'Field Notes',
962:         trailing: Text(
963:           '${_game.unlockedLoreEntries.length} logs',
964:           style: TextStyle(color: colors.secondary),
965:         ),
966:         child: Column(
967:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
968:           children: [
969:             Text(
970:               _game.harvestCandidate != null
971:                   ? 'Harvest window open: ${_game.harvestCandidate!.name}'
972:                   : _game.nearestResource != null
973:                   ? 'Nearest field: ${_game.nearestResource!.name} ${_distanceKm(_game.nearestResourceDistance)}'
974:                   : 'No active field contacts in local range.',
975:               style: TextStyle(
976:                 color: _game.harvestCandidate != null
977:                     ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
978:                     : colors.primary,
979:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
980:               ),
981:             ),
982:             const SizedBox(height: 6),
983:             Text(
984:               _game.nearestResource?.scanSummary ??
985:                   'Science scans and harvest passes unlock permanent field notes and resource lore.',
986:               style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70),
987:             ),
988:             if (_game.latestLoreEntry != null) ...[
989:               const SizedBox(height: 10),
990:               Text(
991:                 _game.latestLoreEntry!.title,
992:                 style: TextStyle(
993:                   color: colors.secondary,
994:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
995:                 ),
996:               ),
997:               const SizedBox(height: 4),
998:               Text(
999:                 _game.latestLoreEntry!.body,
1000:                 style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
1001:               ),
1002:             ],
1003:           ],
1004:         ),
1005:       ),
1006:       _HudCard(
1007:         title: 'Galaxy Map',
1008:         trailing: Text(
1009:           _game.sectorName,
1010:           style: TextStyle(color: colors.secondary),
1011:         ),
1012:         child: Column(
1013:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
1014:           children: [
1015:             SizedBox(
1016:               height: 160,
1017:               child: CustomPaint(painter: GalaxyMapPainter(_game)),
1018:             ),
1019:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
1020:             Text(
1021:               _game.jumpCandidate == null
1022:                   ? 'Approach a jump gate and slow down to transit sectors.'
1023:                   : 'Jump gate ${_game.jumpCandidate!.name} ready (press J).',
1024:               style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
1025:             ),
1026:           ],
1027:         ),
1028:       ),
1029:       _HudCard(
1030:         title: 'Campaign',
1031:         trailing: Text(
1032:           _game.campaignStatusLabel,
1033:           style: TextStyle(
1034:             color: _game.campaignComplete
1035:                 ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
1036:                 : colors.primary,
1037:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
1038:           ),
1039:         ),
1040:         child: Column(
1041:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
1042:           children: [
1043:             Text(
1044:               _game.campaignTitle,
1045:               style: TextStyle(
1046:                 color: _game.campaignComplete
1047:                     ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
1048:                     : colors.secondary,
1049:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,

1678:                 label: const Text('Jump'),
1679:               ),
1680:             ),
1681:           ],
1682:         ),
1683:       ],
1684:     );
1685:   }
1686: }
1687: 
1688: class _Pill extends StatelessWidget {
1689:   const _Pill({required this.label, required this.color, this.muted = false});
1690: 
1691:   final String label;
1692:   final Color color;
1693:   final bool muted;
1694: 
1695:   @override
1696:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1697:     return Container(
1698:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 6),
1699:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
1700:         color: muted
1701:             ? Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.35)
1702:             : color.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
1703:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
1704:         border: Border.all(
1705:           color: muted
1706:               ? Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.14)
1707:               : color.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
1708:         ),
1709:       ),
1710:       child: Text(
1711:         label,
1712:         style: TextStyle(
1713:           fontSize: 12,
1714:           color: muted ? Colors.white70 : color,
1715:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
1716:         ),
1717:       ),
1718:     );
1719:   }
1720: }
1721: 
1722: class _HudCard extends StatelessWidget {
1723:   const _HudCard({required this.title, required this.child, this.trailing});
1724: 
1725:   final String title;
1726:   final Widget child;
1727:   final Widget? trailing;
1728: 
1729:   @override
1730:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1731:     final colors = Theme.of(context).colorScheme;
1732:     final rowChildren = <Widget>[
1733:       Expanded(
1734:         child: Text(
1735:           title,
1736:           style: Theme.of(
1737:             context,
1738:           ).textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(color: const Color(0xFFF2F7FB)),
1739:         ),
1740:       ),
1741:     ];
1742:     if (trailing != null) {
1743:       rowChildren.add(trailing!);
1744:     }
1745:     return DecoratedBox(
1746:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
1747:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
1748:         border: Border.all(color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.15)),
1749:         color: colors.surface.withValues(alpha: 0.72),
1750:       ),
1751:       child: Padding(
1752:         padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
1753:         child: Column(
1754:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
1755:           children: [
1756:             Row(children: rowChildren),
1757:             const SizedBox(height: 12),
1758:             child,
1759:           ],
1760:         ),
1761:       ),
1762:     );
1763:   }
1764: }
1765: 
1766: class _MeterRow extends StatelessWidget {
1767:   const _MeterRow({
1768:     required this.label,
1769:     required this.value,
1770:     required this.text,
1771:     required this.color,
1772:   });
1773: 
1774:   final String label;
1775:   final double value;
1776:   final String text;
1777:   final Color color;
1778: 
1779:   @override
1780:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1781:     final safeValue = value.clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
1782:     return Padding(
1783:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
1784:       child: Row(
1785:         children: [
1786:           SizedBox(
1787:             width: 56,
1788:             child: Text(label, style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70)),
1789:           ),
1790:           Expanded(
1791:             child: ClipRRect(
1792:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(99),
1793:               child: Container(
1794:                 height: 12,
1795:                 color: const Color(0xFF0C121B),
1796:                 child: Stack(
1797:                   fit: StackFit.expand,
1798:                   children: [
1799:                     FractionallySizedBox(
1800:                       alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
1801:                       widthFactor: safeValue,
1802:                       child: DecoratedBox(
1803:                         decoration: BoxDecoration(
1804:                           gradient: LinearGradient(
1805:                             colors: [color.withValues(alpha: 0.65), color],
1806:                           ),
1807:                         ),
1808:                       ),
1809:                     ),
1810:                   ],
1811:                 ),
1812:               ),
1813:             ),
1814:           ),
1815:           const SizedBox(width: 8),
1816:           SizedBox(
1817:             width: 44,
1818:             child: Text(
1819:               text,
1820:               textAlign: TextAlign.right,
1821:               style: const TextStyle(
1822:                 color: Colors.white,
1823:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
1824:               ),
1825:             ),
1826:           ),
1827:         ],
1828:       ),
1829:     );
1830:   }
1831: }
1832:

1864: class _PowerRow extends StatelessWidget {
1865:   const _PowerRow({
1866:     required this.channel,
1867:     required this.value,
1868:     required this.onAdjust,
1869:   });
1870: 
1871:   final PowerChannel channel;
1872:   final int value;
1873:   final void Function(int delta) onAdjust;
1874: 
1875:   @override
1876:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1877:     final color = channel.color;
1878:     return Padding(
1879:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 10),
1880:       child: Row(
1881:         children: [
1882:           SizedBox(
1883:             width: 72,
1884:             child: Text(
1885:               channel.label,
1886:               style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70),
1887:             ),
1888:           ),
1889:           Expanded(
1890:             child: ClipRRect(
1891:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(99),
1892:               child: Container(
1893:                 height: 10,
1894:                 color: const Color(0xFF0C121B),
1895:                 child: FractionallySizedBox(
1896:                   alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
1897:                   widthFactor: (value / 100).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble(),
1898:                   child: DecoratedBox(
1899:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
1900:                       gradient: LinearGradient(
1901:                         colors: [color.withValues(alpha: 0.55), color],
1902:                       ),
1903:                     ),
1904:                   ),
1905:                 ),
1906:               ),
1907:             ),
1908:           ),
1909:           const SizedBox(width: 10),
1910:           _StepperButton(
1911:             icon: Icons.remove,
1912:             tooltip: 'Reduce ${channel.label.toLowerCase()} allocation.',
1913:             onTap: () => onAdjust(-1),
1914:           ),
1915:           SizedBox(
1916:             width: 32,
1917:             child: Text(
1918:               '$value',
1919:               textAlign: TextAlign.center,
1920:               style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
1921:             ),
1922:           ),
1923:           _StepperButton(
1924:             icon: Icons.add,
1925:             tooltip: 'Increase ${channel.label.toLowerCase()} allocation.',
1926:             onTap: () => onAdjust(1),
1927:           ),
1928:         ],
1929:       ),
1930:     );
1931:   }
1932: }

1934: class _UpgradeRow extends StatelessWidget {
1935:   const _UpgradeRow({
1936:     required this.label,
1937:     required this.tier,
1938:     required this.maxTier,
1939:     required this.cost,
1940:     required this.onPressed,
1941:     this.valueText,
1942:   });
1943: 
1944:   final String label;
1945:   final int tier;
1946:   final int maxTier;
1947:   final int cost;
1948:   final VoidCallback? onPressed;
1949:   final String? valueText;
1950: 
1951:   @override
1952:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1953:     final maxed = tier >= maxTier;
1954:     return Padding(
1955:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
1956:       child: Container(
1957:         padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
1958:         decoration: BoxDecoration(
1959:           color: const Color(0xFF0F1721),
1960:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
1961:           border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.06)),
1962:         ),
1963:         child: Row(
1964:           children: [
1965:             Expanded(
1966:               child: Column(
1967:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
1968:                 children: [
1969:                   Text(
1970:                     label,
1971:                     style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
1972:                   ),
1973:                   const SizedBox(height: 2),
1974:                   Text(
1975:                     valueText ?? 'Tier ${tier + 1}/${maxTier + 1}',
1976:                     style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
1977:                   ),
1978:                 ],
1979:               ),
1980:             ),
1981:             if (maxed)
1982:               const Text(
1983:                 'MAX',
1984:                 style: TextStyle(
1985:                   color: Color(0xFF4ADE80),
1986:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
1987:                 ),
1988:               )
1989:             else
1990:               _withTooltip(
1991:                 'Spend $cost credits to upgrade $label.',
1992:                 FilledButton.tonal(
1993:                   onPressed: onPressed,
1994:                   child: Text('Upgrade $cost'),
1995:                 ),
1996:               ),
1997:           ],
1998:         ),
1999:       ),
2000:     );
2001:   }
2002: }

2004: class _StepperButton extends StatelessWidget {
2005:   const _StepperButton({
2006:     required this.icon,
2007:     required this.tooltip,
2008:     required this.onTap,
2009:   });
2010: 
2011:   final IconData icon;
2012:   final String tooltip;
2013:   final VoidCallback onTap;
2014: 
2015:   @override
2016:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
2017:     return _withTooltip(
2018:       tooltip,
2019:       InkWell(
2020:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
2021:         onTap: () {
2022:           onTap();
2023:           HapticFeedback.selectionClick();
2024:         },
2025:         child: Ink(
2026:           width: 28,
2027:           height: 28,
2028:           decoration: BoxDecoration(
2029:             color: const Color(0xFF132131),
2030:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
2031:             border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.08)),
2032:           ),
2033:           child: Icon(icon, size: 16),
2034:         ),
2035:       ),
2036:     );
2037:   }
2038: }
