2552:     }
2553:     final active = activeContract;
2554:     if (active == null) {
2555:       return '${station.blurb} Station batteries recharge shields, energy, and fuel while docked. Dock market access is available.';
2556:     }
2557:     if (!active.pickedUp && active.pickup.id == station.id) {
2558:       return 'Contract cargo is staged here. Load it before departure.';
2559:     }
2560:     if (active.pickedUp && active.destination.id == station.id) {
2561:       return 'Destination port confirmed. Cargo manifest ready for delivery.';
2562:     }
2563:     return '${station.blurb} You can resupply here before continuing.';
2564:   }
2565: 
2566:   int tradeUnitsForCommodity(String commodityId) =>
2567:       _tradeCargo[commodityId] ?? 0;
2568: 
2569:   int? currentBuyPrice(String commodityId) {
2570:     final station = dockedStation;
2571:     if (station == null) {
2572:       return null;
2573:     }
2574:     final base = currentDockMarket?[commodityId];
2575:     if (base == null) {
2576:       return null;
2577:     }
2578:     final repFactor = _marketPriceFactor(station.id, buying: true);
2579:     return math.max(1, (base * 1.08 * repFactor).round());
2580:   }
2581: 
2582:   int? currentSellPrice(String commodityId) {
2583:     final station = dockedStation;
2584:     if (station == null) {
2585:       return null;
2586:     }
2587:     final base = currentDockMarket?[commodityId];
2588:     if (base == null) {
2589:       return null;
2590:     }
2591:     final repFactor = _marketPriceFactor(station.id, buying: false);
2592:     return math.max(1, (base * 0.92 * repFactor).round());
2593:   }
2594: 
2595:   int projectedContractReward(CargoContract contract) {
2596:     final delta = _contractRewardDelta(
2597:       baseReward: contract.rewardCredits,
2598:       destinationId: contract.destination.id,
2599:     );
2600:     return math.max(40, contract.rewardCredits + delta);
2601:   }
2602: 
2603:   String projectedContractRewardLabel(CargoContract contract) {
2604:     final adjusted = projectedContractReward(contract);
2605:     final delta = adjusted - contract.rewardCredits;
2606:     if (delta == 0) {
2607:       return '$adjusted cr';
2608:     }
2609:     final signed = delta > 0 ? '+$delta' : '$delta';
2610:     return '$adjusted cr ($signed rep)';
2611:   }
2612: 
2613:   bool canBuyCommodity(String commodityId) {
2614:     final buyPrice = currentBuyPrice(commodityId);
2615:     return isDocked &&
2616:         buyPrice != null &&
2617:         credits >= buyPrice &&
2618:         freeCargoSpace > 0;
2619:   }
2620: 
2621:   bool canSellCommodity(String commodityId) =>
2622:       isDocked &&
2623:       currentSellPrice(commodityId) != null &&
2624:       tradeUnitsForCommodity(commodityId) > 0;
2625: 
2626:   String pirateContactName(PirateShip pirate) =>
2627:       'SYMLOC ${pirate.trackingId.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';
2628: 
2629:   String pirateHullClass(PirateShip pirate) {
2630:     final index =
2631:         (pirate.trackingId + (pirate.bias * 10).floor()) %
2632:         _pirateHullClasses.length;
2633:     return _pirateHullClasses[index];
2634:   }
2635: 
2636:   String pirateShieldType(PirateShip pirate) {
2637:     if (pirate.shield >= 24) {
2638:       return 'III';
2639:     }
2640:     if (pirate.shield >= 14) {
2641:       return 'II';
2642:     }
2643:     return 'I';
2644:   }
2645: 
2646:   String pirateCannonType(PirateShip pirate) {
2647:     if (pirate.bias >= 0.72) {
2648:       return 'HEAVY';
2649:     }
2650:     if (pirate.bias >= 0.38) {
2651:       return 'PULSE';
2652:     }
2653:     return 'LIGHT';
2654:   }
2655: 
2656:   void setCockpitMode(int mode) {
2657:     cockpitMode = mode.clamp(1, 6).toInt();
2658:   }
2659: 
2660:   // Rebuild the simulation from a clean slate while preserving the authored
2661:   // sector, station, and campaign definitions stored on the class.
2662:   void _initWorld() {
2663:     _harvestedResourceIds.clear();
2664:     _unlockedLoreIds.clear();
2665:     _visitedSectors.clear();
2666:     _campaignIndex = 0;
2667:     _stationOffers.clear();
2668:     _stationMarkets.clear();
2669:     _stationReputation.clear();
2670:     _tradeCargo.clear();
2671:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2672:       _stationReputation[station.id] = 0;
2673:     }
2674:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2675:       _stationMarkets.putIfAbsent(
2676:         station.id,
2677:         () => _generateMarketFor(station),
2678:       );
2679:     }
2680:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2681:       _stationOffers.putIfAbsent(
2682:         station.id,
2683:         () => _generateContractFor(station),
2684:       );
2685:     }
2686:     _marketShiftTimer = 9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 12;
2687:     _setSector(0, initial: true);
2688:     _encounterTimer = 14 + _rng.nextDouble() * 8;
2689:   }
2690: 
2691:   // Advance one simulation frame. Systems are stepped in a fixed order so
2692:   // combat, docking, mission state, and HUD summaries stay deterministic.
2693:   void update(double dt, PlayerInput input) {
2694:     _clock += dt;
2695:     _playerWeaponCooldown = math.max(0, _playerWeaponCooldown - dt);
2696:     _shieldRechargeDelay = math.max(0, _shieldRechargeDelay - dt);
2697:     _spawnTimer -= dt;
2698:     _encounterTimer -= dt;
2699:     _marketShiftTimer -= dt;
2700:     _damageFlash = math.max(0, _damageFlash - dt * 2.1);
2701:     _incomingDamageStrength = math.max(0, _incomingDamageStrength - dt * 1.75);
2702:     _updateMarkets();
2703: 
2704:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
2705:       _refreshDerivedState();
2706:       return;
2707:     }
2708: 
2709:     _updatePlayer(dt, input);
2710:     _updatePirates(dt);
2711:     _updateProjectiles(dt);
2712:     _updateBlasts(dt);
2713:     _resolveProjectileHits();
2714:     _resolveBodyCollisions();
2715:     _refreshDerivedState();
2716:     _spawnPiratesIfNeeded();
2717:     _spawnEncounterIfNeeded();
2718:   }
2719: 
2720:   void _updatePlayer(double dt, PlayerInput input) {
2721:     final enginePower = power[PowerChannel.engines]! / 100;
2722:     final weaponPower = power[PowerChannel.weapons]! / 100;
2723:     final shieldPower = power[PowerChannel.shields]! / 100;
2724:     final effectiveEngine = (enginePower + engineTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2725:     final effectiveWeapon = (weaponPower + weaponTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2726:     final effectiveShield = (shieldPower + shieldTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2727: 
2728:     if (isDocked) {
2729:       final station = dockedStation!;
2730:       playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
2731:       playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 88);
2732:       playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy + dt * 26, 0, 100);
2733:       playerShield = _clamp(
2734:         playerShield + dt * (18 + shieldUpgradeTier * 3),
2735:         0,
2736:         shieldCapacity,
2737:       );
2738:       playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel + dt * 9, 0, 100);
2739:       return;
2740:     }
2741: 
2742:     playerEnergy = _clamp(
2743:       playerEnergy + dt * (10 + effectiveWeapon * 8),
2744:       0,
2745:       100,
2746:     );
2747:     if (_shieldRechargeDelay <= 0) {
2748:       playerShield = _clamp(
2749:         playerShield + dt * (3 + effectiveShield * 12),
2750:         0,
2751:         shieldCapacity,
2752:       );
2753:     }
2754: 
2755:     var thrust = Offset.zero;
2756:     if (input.up) thrust += const Offset(0, -1);
2757:     if (input.down) thrust += const Offset(0, 1);
2758:     if (input.left) thrust += const Offset(-1, 0);
2759:     if (input.right) thrust += const Offset(1, 0);
2760: 
2761:     var boosting = false;
2762:     if (thrust != Offset.zero) {
2763:       thrust = _normalize(thrust);
2764:       var accel = 170 + effectiveEngine * 260;
2765:       if (input.boost && playerFuel > 0 && playerEnergy > 4) {
2766:         boosting = true;
2767:         accel *= 1.65;
2768:         playerFuel = _clamp(
2769:           playerFuel - dt * (6.5 - effectiveEngine * 2.5),
2770:           0,
2771:           100,
2772:         );
2773:         playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - dt * 4.5, 0, 100);
2774:       }
2775:       playerVelocity += thrust * (accel * dt);
2776:       playerFacing = _approachAngle(
2777:         playerFacing,
2778:         math.atan2(thrust.dy, thrust.dx),
2779:         dt * 8,
2780:       );
2781:     }
2782: 
2783:     final drag = boosting ? 0.93 : 0.965;
2784:     playerVelocity *= math.pow(drag, dt * 60).toDouble();
2785: 
2786:     final baseCap = 220 + effectiveEngine * 210;
2787:     final speedCap = boosting ? baseCap * 1.55 : baseCap;
2788:     final speed = playerVelocity.distance;
2789:     if (speed > speedCap) {
2790:       playerVelocity = _normalize(playerVelocity) * speedCap;
2791:     }
2792: 
2793:     playerPosition += playerVelocity * dt;
2794:     playerPosition = Offset(
2795:       playerPosition.dx.clamp(40.0, worldWidth - 40.0).toDouble(),
2796:       playerPosition.dy.clamp(40.0, worldHeight - 40.0).toDouble(),
2797:     );
2798: 
2799:     if (playerPosition.dx <= 40 || playerPosition.dx >= worldWidth - 40) {
2800:       playerVelocity = Offset(-playerVelocity.dx * 0.35, playerVelocity.dy);
2801:     }
2802:     if (playerPosition.dy <= 40 || playerPosition.dy >= worldHeight - 40) {
2803:       playerVelocity = Offset(playerVelocity.dx, -playerVelocity.dy * 0.35);
2804:     }
2805: 
2806:     if (input.fire) {
2807:       _firePlayer(effectiveWeapon.toDouble());
2808:     }
2809:   }
2810: 
2811:   void _firePlayer(double weaponPower) {
2812:     if (_playerWeaponCooldown > 0 || playerEnergy < 4) {
2813:       return;
2814:     }
2815:     final dir = Offset(math.cos(playerFacing), math.sin(playerFacing));
2816:     final speed = 460 + weaponPower * 220;
2817:     final cost = 7.5 - weaponPower * 2.2;
2818:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - cost, 0, 100);
2819:     _playerWeaponCooldown =
2820:         (0.30 - weaponPower * 0.14 - weaponUpgradeTier * 0.01)
2821:             .clamp(0.10, 0.35)
2822:             .toDouble();
2823:     projectiles.add(
2824:       Projectile(
2825:         position: playerPosition + dir * 20,
2826:         velocity: playerVelocity * 0.3 + dir * speed,
2827:         ttl: 1.35,
2828:         damage: 12 + weaponPower * 16 + weaponUpgradeTier * 2.0,
2829:         friendly: true,
2830:       ),
2831:     );
2832:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.fire);
2833:   }
2834: 
2835:   void _updatePirates(double dt) {
2836:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
2837:       pirate.fireCooldown = math.max(0, pirate.fireCooldown - dt);
2838:       pirate.shield = _clamp(pirate.shield + dt * 4, 0, 35);
2839: 
2840:       final toPlayer = playerPosition - pirate.position;
2841:       final distance = toPlayer.distance;
2842:       final desiredAngle = math.atan2(toPlayer.dy, toPlayer.dx);
2843:       pirate.angle = _approachAngle(
2844:         pirate.angle,
2845:         desiredAngle,
2846:         dt * (2.2 + pirate.bias),
2847:       );
2848: 
2849:       var accel = 0.0;
2850:       if (distance > 240) {
2851:         accel = 80 + pirate.bias * 40;
2852:       }
2853:       if (distance > 700) {
2854:         accel += 55;
2855:       }
2856:       if (distance < 140) {
2857:         accel = -60;
2858:       }
2859:       final forward = Offset(math.cos(pirate.angle), math.sin(pirate.angle));
2860:       pirate.velocity += forward * (accel * dt);
2861:       pirate.velocity *= math.pow(0.955, dt * 60).toDouble();
2862: 
2863:       final speed = pirate.velocity.distance;
2864:       final speedCap = 150 + pirate.bias * 50;
2865:       if (speed > speedCap) {
2866:         pirate.velocity = _normalize(pirate.velocity) * speedCap;
2867:       }
2868: 
2869:       pirate.position += pirate.velocity * dt;
2870:       pirate.position = Offset(
2871:         pirate.position.dx.clamp(50.0, worldWidth - 50.0).toDouble(),
2872:         pirate.position.dy.clamp(50.0, worldHeight - 50.0).toDouble(),
2873:       );
2874: 
2875:       if (!isDocked &&
2876:           activeEncounter == null &&
2877:           distance < 720 &&
2878:           pirate.fireCooldown <= 0) {
2879:         final aimError = (_rng.nextDouble() - 0.5) * (0.18 + (distance / 1400));
2880:         final shotAngle = desiredAngle + aimError;
2881:         final dir = Offset(math.cos(shotAngle), math.sin(shotAngle));
2882:         projectiles.add(
2883:           Projectile(
2884:             position: pirate.position + dir * 16,
2885:             velocity: pirate.velocity * 0.25 + dir * 300,
2886:             ttl: 2.1,
2887:             damage: 8 + _rng.nextDouble() * 5,
2888:             friendly: false,
2889:           ),
2890:         );
2891:         pirate.fireCooldown = 0.9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 0.8;
2892:       }
2893:     }
2894:   }
2895: 
2896:   void _updateProjectiles(double dt) {
2897:     for (var i = projectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2898:       final projectile = projectiles[i];
2899:       projectile.ttl -= dt;
2900:       projectile.position += projectile.velocity * dt;
2901: 
2902:       final outOfBounds =
2903:           projectile.position.dx < -40 ||
2904:           projectile.position.dy < -40 ||
2905:           projectile.position.dx > worldWidth + 40 ||
2906:           projectile.position.dy > worldHeight + 40;
2907:       if (projectile.ttl <= 0 || outOfBounds) {
2908:         projectiles.removeAt(i);
2909:       }
2910:     }
2911:   }
2912: 
2913:   void _updateBlasts(double dt) {
2914:     for (var i = blasts.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2915:       blasts[i].ttl -= dt;
2916:       if (blasts[i].ttl <= 0) {
2917:         blasts.removeAt(i);
2918:       }
2919:     }
2920:   }
2921: 
2922:   void _resolveProjectileHits() {
2923:     for (var i = projectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2924:       final shot = projectiles[i];
2925:       if (shot.friendly) {
2926:         PirateShip? target;
2927:         for (final pirate in pirates) {
2928:           if ((pirate.position - shot.position).distance <= 18) {
2929:             target = pirate;
2930:             break;
2931:           }
2932:         }
2933:         if (target != null) {
2934:           _damagePirate(target, shot.damage);
2935:           blasts.add(Blast(position: shot.position, ttl: 0.18, radius: 16));
2936:           projectiles.removeAt(i);
2937:           continue;
2938:         }
2939:       } else {
2940:         if ((playerPosition - shot.position).distance <= 18 && !isDocked) {
2941:           _damagePlayer(shot.damage, sourcePosition: shot.position);
2942:           blasts.add(Blast(position: shot.position, ttl: 0.16, radius: 12));
2943:           projectiles.removeAt(i);
2944:           continue;
2945:         }
2946:       }
2947:     }
2948: 
2949:     pirates.removeWhere((pirate) => pirate.hull <= 0);
2950:   }
2951: 
2952:   void _resolveBodyCollisions() {
2953:     if (isDocked) {
2954:       return;
2955:     }
2956:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
2957:       final delta = playerPosition - pirate.position;
2958:       final dist = delta.distance;
2959:       if (dist > 0 && dist < 28) {
2960:         final push = _normalize(delta) * (28 - dist) * 0.6;
2961:         playerPosition += push;
2962:         playerVelocity += push * 4;
2963:         _damagePlayer(6, sourcePosition: pirate.position);
2964:       }
2965:     }
2966:   }
2967: 
2968:   void _damagePlayer(double damage, {Offset? sourcePosition}) {
2969:     _shieldRechargeDelay = 1.2;
2970:     _damageFlash = 1;
2971:     if (sourcePosition != null) {
2972:       final incoming = sourcePosition - playerPosition;
2973:       if (incoming.distanceSquared > 0.01) {
2974:         _incomingDamageDirection = math.atan2(incoming.dy, incoming.dx);
2975:         _incomingDamageStrength = (_incomingDamageStrength + 0.72).clamp(
2976:           0.0,
2977:           1.0,
2978:         );
2979:       }
2980:     }
2981:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.hit);
2982:     var remaining = damage;
2983:     if (playerShield > 0) {
2984:       final shieldHit = math.min(playerShield, remaining);
2985:       playerShield -= shieldHit;
2986:       remaining -= shieldHit;
2987:     }
2988:     if (remaining > 0) {
2989:       playerHull = _clamp(playerHull - remaining, 0, 100);
2990:       if (playerHull <= 0) {
2991:         _handlePlayerDestroyed();
2992:       }
2993:     }
2994:   }
2995: 
2996:   void _damagePirate(PirateShip pirate, double damage) {
2997:     var remaining = damage;
2998:     if (pirate.shield > 0) {
2999:       final shieldHit = math.min(pirate.shield, remaining);
3000:       pirate.shield -= shieldHit;
3001:       remaining -= shieldHit;
3002:     }
3003:     if (remaining > 0) {
3004:       pirate.hull -= remaining;
3005:     }
3006:     if (pirate.hull <= 0) {
3007:       kills += 1;
3008:       final bounty = 18 + _rng.nextInt(24);
3009:       credits += bounty;
3010:       final nearbyStation = _nearestStationTo(pirate.position);
3011:       shiftStationReputation(nearbyStation.id, 2, silent: true);
3012:       blasts.add(Blast(position: pirate.position, ttl: 0.45, radius: 34));
3013:       _log(
3014:         'Pirate neutralized near ${nearbyStation.name}. Bounty +$bounty cr.',
3015:       );
3016:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3017:       _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3018:     }
3019:   }
3020: 
3021:   void _handlePlayerDestroyed() {
3022:     final station = _nearestStationTo(playerPosition);
3023:     final penalty = math.min(credits, 120);
3024:     credits -= penalty;
3025:     playerHull = 80;
3026:     playerShield = _clamp(65 + shieldUpgradeTier * 8, 0, shieldCapacity);
3027:     playerEnergy = 80;
3028:     playerFuel = 80;
3029:     playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
3030:     playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 88);
3031:     dockedStation = station;
3032:     if (activeContract != null && activeContract!.pickedUp) {
3033:       cargoUsed = math.max(0, cargoUsed - activeContract!.cargoUnits);
3034:     }
3035:     if (activeContract != null) {
3036:       shiftStationReputation(activeContract!.pickup.id, -4, silent: true);
3037:       shiftStationReputation(activeContract!.destination.id, -6, silent: true);
3038:       _log('Ship disabled. Active contract forfeited.');
3039:       activeContract = null;
3040:     }
3041:     _log('Emergency tow to ${station.name}. Recovery fee $penalty cr.');
3042:   }
3043: 
3044:   // Recompute all nearest-contact caches after state changes so the cockpit
3045:   // panel, docking prompts, radar, and combat helpers read from one source.
3046:   void _refreshDerivedState() {
3047:     nearestStation = _nearestStationTo(playerPosition);
3048:     nearestStationDistance =
3049:         (nearestStation!.position - playerPosition).distance;
3050: 
3051:     nearestResource = null;
3052:     nearestResourceDistance = double.infinity;
3053:     for (final resource in resources) {
3054:       final d = (resource.position - playerPosition).distance;
3055:       if (d < nearestResourceDistance) {
3056:         nearestResourceDistance = d;
3057:         nearestResource = resource;
3058:       }
3059:     }
3060: 
3061:     nearestPirateDistance = double.infinity;
3062:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
3063:       final d = (pirate.position - playerPosition).distance;
3064:       if (d < nearestPirateDistance) {
3065:         nearestPirateDistance = d;
3066:       }
3067:     }
3068: 
3069:     nearestPortalDistance = double.infinity;
3070:     PortalGate? nearestGate;
3071:     for (final portal in portals) {
3072:       final d = (portal.position - playerPosition).distance;
3073:       if (d < nearestPortalDistance) {
3074:         nearestPortalDistance = d;
3075:         nearestGate = portal;
3076:       }
3077:     }
3078: 
3079:     if (!isDocked &&
3080:         nearestStationDistance <= dockingRange &&
3081:         playerVelocity.distance <= dockingSpeed) {
3082:       dockCandidate = nearestStation;
3083:     } else {
3084:       dockCandidate = null;
3085:     }
3086: 
3087:     if (!isDocked &&
3088:         nearestGate != null &&
3089:         nearestPortalDistance <= jumpRange &&
3090:         playerVelocity.distance <= jumpSpeed) {
3091:       jumpCandidate = nearestGate;
3092:     } else {
3093:       jumpCandidate = null;
3094:     }
3095: 
3096:     if (!isDocked &&
3097:         nearestResource != null &&
3098:         nearestResourceDistance <= 90 &&
3099:         playerVelocity.distance <= 70) {
3100:       harvestCandidate = nearestResource;
3101:     } else {
3102:       harvestCandidate = null;
3103:     }
3104: 
3105:     _syncTrackingTarget();
3106:   }
3107: 
3108:   void _spawnPiratesIfNeeded() {
3109:     if (_spawnTimer > 0) {
3110:       return;
3111:     }
3112:     final desired = 4 + math.min(3, (_clock / 90).floor());
3113:     if (pirates.length < desired) {
3114:       pirates.add(_spawnPirate(initial: false));
3115:       if (_rng.nextDouble() < 0.45) {
3116:         _log('Comms: Pirate contact detected on long-range scan.');
3117:         _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3118:       }
3119:     }
3120:     _spawnTimer = 4 + _rng.nextDouble() * 5;
3121:   }
3122: 
3123:   void _spawnEncounterIfNeeded() {
3124:     if (activeEncounter != null || isDocked) {
3125:       return;
3126:     }
3127:     if (_encounterTimer > 0) {
3128:       return;
3129:     }
3130:     if (_rng.nextDouble() < 0.35 && pirates.isNotEmpty) {
3131:       _encounterTimer = 10 + _rng.nextDouble() * 8;
3132:       return;
3133:     }
3134:     activeEncounter = _buildRandomEncounter();
3135:     cockpitMode = 3;
3136:     _encounterTimer = 20 + _rng.nextDouble() * 22;
3137:     _log(
3138:       'Incoming transmission: ${activeEncounter!.title}. Choose 1-${activeEncounter!.options.length}.',
3139:     );
3140:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3141:   }
3142: 
3143:   void _updateMarkets() {
3144:     if (_marketShiftTimer > 0) {
3145:       return;
3146:     }
3147:     _marketShiftTimer = 9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 12;
3148:     if (_stationMarkets.isEmpty) {
3149:       return;
3150:     }
3151:     final station = _allStations[_rng.nextInt(_allStations.length)];
3152:     final market = _stationMarkets.putIfAbsent(
3153:       station.id,
3154:       () => _generateMarketFor(station),
3155:     );
3156:     final commodity = _commodityCatalog[_rng.nextInt(_commodityCatalog.length)];
3157:     final current = market[commodity.id] ?? commodity.basePrice;
3158:     final factor = 1 + (_rng.nextDouble() * 0.14 - 0.07);
3159:     market[commodity.id] = math.max(1, (current * factor).round());
3160:   }
3161: 
3162:   PirateShip _spawnPirate({required bool initial}) {
3163:     final edge = _rng.nextInt(4);
3164:     late Offset position;
3165:     switch (edge) {
3166:       case 0:
3167:         position = Offset(_rng.nextDouble() * worldWidth, 70);
3168:         break;
3169:       case 1:
3170:         position = Offset(worldWidth - 70, _rng.nextDouble() * worldHeight);
3171:         break;
3172:       case 2:
3173:         position = Offset(_rng.nextDouble() * worldWidth, worldHeight - 70);
3174:         break;
3175:       case 3:
3176:         position = Offset(70, _rng.nextDouble() * worldHeight);
3177:         break;
3178:     }
3179: 
3180:     if (!initial && (position - playerPosition).distance < 700) {
3181:       position = Offset(
3182:         (position.dx + worldWidth / 2) % worldWidth,
3183:         (position.dy + worldHeight / 2) % worldHeight,
3184:       );
3185:     }
3186: 
3187:     return PirateShip(
3188:       trackingId: ++_pirateIdSeed,
3189:       position: position,
3190:       velocity: Offset.zero,
3191:       angle: _rng.nextDouble() * math.pi * 2,
3192:       hull: 28 + _rng.nextDouble() * 16,
3193:       shield: 15 + _rng.nextDouble() * 20,
3194:       bias: _rng.nextDouble(),
3195:     );
3196:   }
3197: 
3198:   PirateShip? _findPirateByTrackingId(int trackingId) {
3199:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
3200:       if (pirate.trackingId == trackingId) {
3201:         return pirate;
3202:       }
3203:     }
3204:     return null;
3205:   }
3206: 
3207:   void _syncTrackingTarget() {
3208:     if (pirates.isEmpty) {
3209:       _trackedPirateId = null;
3210:       return;
3211:     }
3212:     if (_trackedPirateId != null &&
3213:         _findPirateByTrackingId(_trackedPirateId!) != null) {
3214:       return;
3215:     }
3216:     PirateShip? best;
3217:     var bestDistance = double.infinity;
3218:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
3219:       final distance = (pirate.position - playerPosition).distance;
3220:       if (distance < bestDistance) {
3221:         bestDistance = distance;
3222:         best = pirate;
3223:       }
3224:     }
3225:     _trackedPirateId = best?.trackingId;
3226:   }
3227: 
3228:   Station _nearestStationTo(Offset point) {
3229:     Station best = stations.first;
3230:     var bestDistance = (best.position - point).distanceSquared;
3231:     for (var i = 1; i < stations.length; i++) {
3232:       final station = stations[i];
3233:       final d = (station.position - point).distanceSquared;
3234:       if (d < bestDistance) {
3235:         bestDistance = d;
3236:         best = station;
3237:       }
3238:     }
3239:     return best;
3240:   }
3241: 
3242:   CargoContract _generateContractFor(Station pickup) {
3243:     final destinations = _allStations.where((s) => s.id != pickup.id).toList();
3244:     final destination = destinations[_rng.nextInt(destinations.length)];
3245:     final cargoUnits = 2 + _rng.nextInt(4);
3246:     final commodity = _commodityCatalog[_rng.nextInt(_commodityCatalog.length)];
3247:     final crossSectorBonus = destination.sectorIndex == pickup.sectorIndex
3248:         ? 0
3249:         : 90;
3250:     final pickupPrice = _stationMarkets[pickup.id]?[commodity.id];
3251:     final destinationPrice = _stationMarkets[destination.id]?[commodity.id];
3252:     final marketDelta = ((destinationPrice ?? 0) - (pickupPrice ?? 0))
3253:         .clamp(-160, 240)
3254:         .toInt();
3255:     final reward =
3256:         110 +
3257:         _rng.nextInt(170) +
3258:         (destination.id * 6) +
3259:         crossSectorBonus +
3260:         marketDelta;
3261:     return CargoContract(
3262:       id: ++_contractIdSeed,
3263:       pickup: pickup,
3264:       destination: destination,
3265:       cargoUnits: cargoUnits,
3266:       rewardCredits: math.max(80, reward),
3267:       cargoName: commodity.name,
3268:     );
3269:   }
3270: 
3271:   Map<String, int> _generateMarketFor(Station station) {
3272:     final quotes = <String, int>{};
3273:     final sectorBias = (station.sectorIndex - 1) * 0.035;
3274:     final stationBias = ((station.id % 9) - 4) * 0.018;
3275:     final styleSeed = math.sin((station.id * 13) + 0.3) * 0.035;
3276:     for (final commodity in _commodityCatalog) {
3277:       final volatility = (commodity.volatility * (_rng.nextDouble() * 2 - 1));
3278:       final modifier = (1 + sectorBias + stationBias + styleSeed + volatility)
3279:           .clamp(0.62, 1.55);
3280:       quotes[commodity.id] = math.max(
3281:         24,
3282:         (commodity.basePrice * modifier).round(),
3283:       );
3284:     }
3285:     return quotes;
3286:   }
3287: 
3288:   CommoditySpec? _commodityById(String commodityId) {
3289:     for (final commodity in _commodityCatalog) {
3290:       if (commodity.id == commodityId) {
3291:         return commodity;
3292:       }
3293:     }
3294:     return null;
3295:   }
3296: 
3297:   LoreEntry? _loreById(String loreId) {
3298:     for (final entry in _loreCatalog) {
3299:       if (entry.id == loreId) {
3300:         return entry;
3301:       }
3302:     }
3303:     return null;
3304:   }
3305: 
3306:   void _unlockLore(String loreId, {bool silent = false}) {
3307:     final entry = _loreById(loreId);
3308:     if (entry == null) {
3309:       return;
3310:     }
3311:     if (!_unlockedLoreIds.add(loreId) || silent) {
3312:       return;
3313:     }
3314:     _log('FIELD NOTE: ${entry.title} // ${entry.summary}');
3315:   }
3316: 
3317:   double _marketPriceFactor(int stationId, {required bool buying}) {
3318:     final rep = reputationForStation(stationId).toDouble();
3319:     if (buying) {
3320:       return (1 - rep * 0.004).clamp(0.68, 1.30).toDouble();
3321:     }
3322:     return (1 + rep * 0.003).clamp(0.78, 1.26).toDouble();
3323:   }
3324: 
3325:   int _contractRewardDelta({
3326:     required int baseReward,
3327:     required int destinationId,
3328:   }) {
3329:     final rep = reputationForStation(destinationId);
3330:     final raw = (baseReward * rep * 0.0035).round();
3331:     final lower = -(baseReward ~/ 4);
3332:     final upper = baseReward ~/ 3;
3333:     return raw.clamp(lower, upper).toInt();
3334:   }
3335: 
3336:   String _reputationBand(int rep) {
3337:     if (rep <= -26) {
3338:       return 'Hostile';
3339:     }
3340:     if (rep <= -9) {
3341:       return 'Untrusted';
3342:     }
3343:     if (rep <= 18) {
3344:       return 'Neutral';
3345:     }
3346:     if (rep <= 44) {
3347:       return 'Trusted';
3348:     }
3349:     return 'Allied';
3350:   }
3351: 
3352:   void shiftStationReputation(int stationId, int delta, {bool silent = false}) {
3353:     if (_stationByIdOrNull(stationId) == null || delta == 0) {
3354:       return;
3355:     }
3356:     final previous = reputationForStation(stationId);
3357:     final next = (previous + delta).clamp(-40, 80).toInt();
3358:     _stationReputation[stationId] = next;
3359:     if (silent || next == previous) {
3360:       return;
3361:     }
3362:     if ((next - previous).abs() < 5) {
3363:       return;
3364:     }
3365:     final station = _stationByIdOrNull(stationId);
3366:     if (station != null) {
3367:       final signed = next >= 0 ? '+$next' : '$next';
3368:       _log(
3369:         'Standing update at ${station.name}: $signed (${_reputationBand(next)}).',
3370:       );
3371:     }
3372:   }
3373: 
3374:   static int _contractIdSeed = 0;
3375: 
3376:   void toggleDocking() {
3377:     if (isDocked) {
3378:       final station = dockedStation!;
3379:       dockedStation = null;
3380:       playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 145);
3381:       playerVelocity = Offset(0, 35);
3382:       _log('Undocking from ${station.name}.');
3383:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.dock);
3384:       return;
3385:     }
3386:     if (dockCandidate == null) {
3387:       _log(
3388:         'Docking denied. Slow to under ${dockingSpeed.round()} u/s within ${dockingRange.round()} units of a station.',
3389:       );
3390:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3391:       return;
3392:     }
3393:     dockedStation = dockCandidate;
3394:     cockpitMode = 1;
3395:     playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
3396:     playerPosition = dockedStation!.position + const Offset(0, 88);
3397:     _log('Docked at ${dockedStation!.name}.');
3398:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.dock);
3399:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3400:   }
3401: 
3402:   void attemptJump() {
3403:     if (isDocked) {
3404:       _log('Undock before engaging a jump gate.');
3405:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3406:       return;
3407:     }
3408:     final gate = jumpCandidate;
3409:     if (gate == null) {
3410:       _log(
3411:         'Jump gate not ready. Slow to under ${jumpSpeed.round()} u/s within ${jumpRange.round()} units of a gate.',
3412:       );
3413:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3414:       return;
3415:     }
3416:     if (playerFuel < 8 || playerEnergy < 12) {
3417:       _log('Jump aborted. Need at least 8% fuel and 12% energy.');
3418:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3419:       return;
3420:     }
3421:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel - 8, 0, 100);
3422:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - 12, 0, 100);
3423:     final target = _portalById(gate.targetPortalId, gate.targetSectorIndex);
3424:     final exitDir = _normalize(target.exitVector);
3425:     jumpCount += 1;
3426:     _setSector(
3427:       gate.targetSectorIndex,
3428:       spawnPosition: target.position + exitDir * 170,
3429:       initial: false,
3430:     );
3431:     playerVelocity = exitDir * 45;
3432:     playerFacing = math.atan2(exitDir.dy, exitDir.dx);
3433:     _log('Transit complete: ${gate.name} -> ${target.name} ($sectorName).');
3434:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.jump);
3435:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3436:   }
3437: 
3438:   void cycleTracking() {
3439:     if (pirates.isEmpty) {
3440:       _trackedPirateId = null;
3441:       _log('TRACKING: no hostile contacts.');
3442:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3443:       return;
3444:     }
3445: 
3446:     final sorted = pirates.toList()
3447:       ..sort(
3448:         (a, b) => (a.position - playerPosition).distance.compareTo(
3449:           (b.position - playerPosition).distance,
3450:         ),
3451:       );
3452:     var index = 0;
3453:     if (_trackedPirateId != null) {
3454:       final currentIndex = sorted.indexWhere(
3455:         (pirate) => pirate.trackingId == _trackedPirateId,
3456:       );
3457:       if (currentIndex >= 0) {
3458:         index = (currentIndex + 1) % sorted.length;
3459:       }
3460:     }
3461:     final target = sorted[index];
3462:     cockpitMode = 4;
3463:     _trackedPirateId = target.trackingId;
3464:     final range = (target.position - playerPosition).distance;
3465:     final contact = pirateContactName(target);
3466:     _log(
3467:       'TRACKING: $contact ${index + 1}/${sorted.length} tagged at ${_distanceKm(range)}.',
3468:     );
3469:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3470:   }
3471: 
3472:   void requestComms() {
3473:     cockpitMode = 3;
3474:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
3475:       _log('* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *');
3476:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3477:       return;
3478:     }
3479:     if (!isDocked &&
3480:         nearestStation != null &&
3481:         nearestStationDistance <= 560 &&
3482:         playerVelocity.distance <= 120) {
3483:       _log('COMM LINK: ${nearestStation!.name} relay responding.');
3484:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3485:       return;
3486:     }
3487:     if (!isDocked && nearestStation != null && nearestStationDistance <= 560) {
3488:       _log('OBJECT MUST VISIBLE TO COMMUNICATE');
3489:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3490:       return;
3491:     }
3492:     _log('NO RESPONSE ON ANY CHANNEL.');
3493:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3494:   }
3495: 
3496:   void harvestResource() {
3497:     if (isDocked) {
3498:       _log('Undock before running a harvest pass.');
3499:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3500:       return;
3501:     }
3502:     final node = harvestCandidate;
3503:     if (node == null) {
3504:       _log('No resource field in harvest range.');
3505:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3506:       return;
3507:     }
3508:     if (freeCargoSpace < node.yieldUnits) {
3509:       _log(
3510:         'Insufficient cargo space for ${node.name} (${node.yieldUnits} units).',
3511:       );
3512:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3513:       return;
3514:     }
3515:     final commodity = _commodityById(node.commodityId);
3516:     if (commodity == null) {
3517:       _log('Harvest pass failed: unknown cargo profile.');
3518:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3519:       return;
3520:     }
3521: 
3522:     cockpitMode = 1;
3523:     _tradeCargo.update(
3524:       node.commodityId,
3525:       (units) => units + node.yieldUnits,
3526:       ifAbsent: () => node.yieldUnits,
3527:     );
3528:     _harvestedResourceIds.add(node.id);
3529:     resources.removeWhere((resource) => resource.id == node.id);
3530:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - 6, 0, 100);
3531:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel - 2, 0, 100);
3532:     _unlockLore(node.loreId);
3533:     _log(
3534:       'Harvested ${node.name}: +${node.yieldUnits} ${commodity.name.toUpperCase()}.',
3535:     );
3536:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3537:     _refreshDerivedState();
3538:   }
3539: 
3540:   void tryAcceptDockContract() {
3541:     final station = dockedStation;
3542:     if (station == null) {
3543:       _log('No station link active.');
3544:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3545:       return;
3546:     }
3547:     if (activeContract != null) {
3548:       _log('You already have an active contract.');
3549:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3550:       return;
3551:     }
3552:     final offer = _stationOffers[station.id];
3553:     if (offer == null) {
3554:       _log('No contracts available at ${station.name}.');
3555:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3556:       return;
3557:     }
3558:     if (reputationForStation(station.id) < contractAccessReputationFloor) {
3559:       _log(
3560:         'Dockmaster refuses new contracts at ${station.name}. Improve standing to $contractAccessReputationFloor or higher.',
3561:       );
3562:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3563:       return;
3564:     }
3565:     if (totalCargoUsed + offer.cargoUnits > cargoCapacity) {
3566:       _log('Insufficient cargo space for ${offer.cargoUnits} units.');
3567:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3568:       return;
3569:     }
3570: 
3571:     activeContract = offer.copyForAcceptance();
3572:     cockpitMode = 6;
3573:     _stationOffers[station.id] = _generateContractFor(station);
3574:     _log(
3575:       'Accepted contract: ${offer.cargoName} to ${offer.destination.name} (${projectedContractRewardLabel(offer)}).',
3576:     );
3577:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3578: 
3579:     if (activeContract!.pickup.id == station.id) {
3580:       activeContract!.pickedUp = true;
3581:       cargoUsed += activeContract!.cargoUnits;
3582:       _log('Cargo loaded: ${activeContract!.cargoUnits} units aboard.');
3583:     }
3584:   }
3585: 
3586:   void tryDeliverDockContract() {
3587:     final station = dockedStation;
3588:     final contract = activeContract;
3589:     if (station == null || contract == null) {
3590:       _log('No deliverable cargo.');
3591:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3592:       return;
3593:     }
3594: 
3595:     if (!contract.pickedUp && contract.pickup.id == station.id) {
3596:       if (totalCargoUsed + contract.cargoUnits > cargoCapacity) {
3597:         _log('Insufficient cargo space to load the contract cargo.');
3598:         _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3599:         return;
3600:       }
3601:       contract.pickedUp = true;
3602:       cargoUsed += contract.cargoUnits;
3603:       cockpitMode = 6;
3604:       _log('Cargo loaded for ${contract.destination.name}.');
3605:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3606:       return;
3607:     }
3608: 
3609:     if (contract.destination.id != station.id || !contract.pickedUp) {
3610:       _log('This station is not the contract destination.');
3611:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3612:       return;
3613:     }
3614: 
3615:     cargoUsed = math.max(0, cargoUsed - contract.cargoUnits);
3616:     final payout = projectedContractReward(contract);
3617:     credits += payout;
3618:     contractsDelivered += 1;
3619:     if (contract.pickup.sectorIndex != contract.destination.sectorIndex) {
3620:       crossSectorContractsDelivered += 1;
3621:     }
3622:     shiftStationReputation(station.id, 7, silent: true);
3623:     if (contract.pickup.id != station.id) {
3624:       shiftStationReputation(contract.pickup.id, 2, silent: true);
3625:     }
3626:     final delta = payout - contract.rewardCredits;
3627:     final repText = delta == 0
3628:         ? ''
3629:         : (delta > 0 ? ' (rep bonus +$delta)' : ' (rep penalty $delta)');
3630:     _log('Cargo delivered to ${station.name}. Payment +$payout cr$repText.');
3631:     activeContract = null;
3632:     cockpitMode = 6;
3633:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3634:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3635:   }
3636: 
3637:   void repairHull() {
3638:     if (!canRepairHull) {
3639:       _log('Repair service unavailable.');
3640:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3641:       return;
3642:     }
3643:     credits -= 40;
3644:     playerHull = _clamp(playerHull + 38, 0, 100);
3645:     _log('Hull repairs completed (-40 cr).');
3646:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3647:   }
3648: 
3649:   void refuel() {
3650:     if (!canRefuel) {
3651:       _log('Refuel service unavailable.');
3652:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3653:       return;
3654:     }
3655:     credits -= 20;
3656:     playerFuel = 100;
3657:     _log('Tanks topped off (-20 cr).');
3658:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3659:   }
3660: 
3661:   void buyCommodity(String commodityId) {
3662:     final station = dockedStation;
3663:     final commodity = _commodityById(commodityId);
3664:     if (station == null || commodity == null) {
3665:       _log('Commodity market unavailable.');
3666:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3667:       return;
3668:     }
3669:     final price = currentBuyPrice(commodityId);
3670:     if (price == null) {
3671:       _log('${station.name} does not list ${commodity.name}.');
3672:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3673:       return;
3674:     }
3675:     if (freeCargoSpace <= 0) {
3676:       _log('Cargo hold is full.');
3677:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3678:       return;
3679:     }
3680:     if (credits < price) {
3681:       _log('Insufficient credits to buy ${commodity.name}.');
3682:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3683:       return;
3684:     }
3685:     credits -= price;
3686:     _tradeCargo.update(commodityId, (units) => units + 1, ifAbsent: () => 1);
3687:     _log('Purchased ${commodity.name} (1 unit) for $price cr.');
3688:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3689:   }
3690: 
3691:   void sellCommodity(String commodityId) {
3692:     final station = dockedStation;
3693:     final commodity = _commodityById(commodityId);
3694:     final units = _tradeCargo[commodityId] ?? 0;
3695:     if (station == null || commodity == null) {
3696:       _log('Commodity market unavailable.');
3697:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3698:       return;
3699:     }
3700:     if (units <= 0) {
3701:       _log('No ${commodity.name} cargo available to sell.');
3702:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3703:       return;
3704:     }
3705:     final price = currentSellPrice(commodityId);
3706:     if (price == null) {
3707:       _log('${station.name} market cannot process ${commodity.name}.');
3708:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3709:       return;
3710:     }
3711:     final remaining = units - 1;
3712:     if (remaining <= 0) {
3713:       _tradeCargo.remove(commodityId);
3714:     } else {
3715:       _tradeCargo[commodityId] = remaining;
3716:     }
3717:     credits += price;
3718:     _log('Sold ${commodity.name} (1 unit) for $price cr.');
3719:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3720:   }
3721: 
3722:   void buyEngineUpgrade() {
3723:     if (!isDocked) {
3724:       _log('Dock to access outfitting services.');
3725:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3726:       return;
3727:     }
3728:     if (engineUpgradeTier >= maxEngineUpgradeTier) {
3729:       _log('Engines already at maximum tuning.');
3730:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3731:       return;
3732:     }
3733:     if (credits < engineUpgradeCost) {
3734:       _log('Insufficient credits for engine tuning.');
3735:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3736:       return;
3737:     }
3738:     final cost = engineUpgradeCost;
3739:     credits -= cost;
3740:     engineUpgradeTier += 1;
3741:     upgradesPurchased += 1;
3742:     _log('Engine tuning upgraded to Mk ${engineUpgradeTier + 1} (-$cost cr).');
3743:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3744:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3745:   }
3746: 
3747:   void buyWeaponUpgrade() {
3748:     if (!isDocked) {
3749:       _log('Dock to access outfitting services.');
3750:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3751:       return;
3752:     }
3753:     if (weaponUpgradeTier >= maxWeaponUpgradeTier) {
3754:       _log('Weapons already at maximum calibration.');
3755:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3756:       return;
3757:     }
3758:     if (credits < weaponUpgradeCost) {
3759:       _log('Insufficient credits for weapon upgrades.');
3760:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3761:       return;
3762:     }
3763:     final cost = weaponUpgradeCost;
3764:     credits -= cost;
3765:     weaponUpgradeTier += 1;
3766:     upgradesPurchased += 1;
3767:     _log(
3768:       'Weapon capacitors upgraded to Mk ${weaponUpgradeTier + 1} (-$cost cr).',
3769:     );
3770:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3771:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3772:   }
3773: 
3774:   void buyShieldUpgrade() {
3775:     if (!isDocked) {
3776:       _log('Dock to access outfitting services.');
3777:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);

3779:     }

3782:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3783:       return;
3784:     }
3785:     if (credits < shieldUpgradeCost) {
3786:       _log('Insufficient credits for shield upgrades.');
3787:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3788:       return;
3789:     }
3790:     final cost = shieldUpgradeCost;
3791:     credits -= cost;
3792:     shieldUpgradeTier += 1;
3793:     upgradesPurchased += 1;
3794:     playerShield = _clamp(playerShield + 20, 0, shieldCapacity);
3795:     _log('Shield array upgraded to Mk ${shieldUpgradeTier + 1} (-$cost cr).');
3796:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3797:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();

3799:

3808:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);

3824: 
3825:   void adjustPower(PowerChannel channel, int deltaSteps) {
3826:     if (deltaSteps == 0) {
3827:       return;
3828:     }
3829:     final stepCount = deltaSteps.abs();
3830:     for (var i = 0; i < stepCount; i++) {
3831:       if (deltaSteps > 0) {
3832:         if (!_shiftPowerToward(channel)) {
3833:           break;
3834:         }
3835:       } else {
3836:         if (!_shiftPowerAway(channel)) {
3837:           break;
3838:         }
3839:       }
3840:     }
3841:   }
3842: 
3843:   bool _shiftPowerToward(PowerChannel target) {
3844:     if (power[target]! >= 80) {
3845:       return false;
3846:     }
3847:     final donors =
3848:         PowerChannel.values
3849:             .where((channel) => channel != target && power[channel]! > 10)
3850:             .toList()
3851:           ..sort((a, b) => power[b]!.compareTo(power[a]!));
3852:     if (donors.isEmpty) {
3853:       return false;
3854:     }
3855:     power[donors.first] = power[donors.first]! - 5;
3856:     power[target] = power[target]! + 5;
3857:     return true;
3858:   }
3859: 
3860:   bool _shiftPowerAway(PowerChannel source) {
3861:     if (power[source]! <= 10) {
3862:       return false;
3863:     }
3864:     final recipients =
3865:         PowerChannel.values
3866:             .where((channel) => channel != source && power[channel]! < 80)
3867:             .toList()
3868:           ..sort((a, b) => power[a]!.compareTo(power[b]!));
3869:     if (recipients.isEmpty) {
3870:       return false;
3871:     }
3872:     power[source] = power[source]! - 5;
3873:     power[recipients.first] = power[recipients.first]! + 5;
3874:     return true;
3875:   }
3876: 
3877:   void _log(String text) {
3878:     final totalSeconds = _clock.floor();
3879:     final mm = (totalSeconds ~/ 60).toString().padLeft(2, '0');
3880:     final ss = (totalSeconds % 60).toString().padLeft(2, '0');
3881:     commsLog.insert(0, '[$mm:$ss] $text');
3882:     if (commsLog.length > 10) {
3883:       commsLog.removeRange(10, commsLog.length);
3884:     }
3885:   }
3886: 
3887:   int _campaignProgressFor(CampaignMission mission) {
3888:     switch (mission.goalType) {
3889:       case CampaignGoalType.dockStation:
3890:         return dockedStation?.id == mission.stationId ? 1 : 0;
3891:       case CampaignGoalType.deliverContracts:
3892:         return contractsDelivered;
3893:       case CampaignGoalType.killPirates:
3894:         return kills;
3895:       case CampaignGoalType.visitSector:
3896:         return _visitedSectors.contains(mission.sectorIndex) ? 1 : 0;
3897:       case CampaignGoalType.buyUpgrades:
3898:         return upgradesPurchased;
3899:       case CampaignGoalType.crossSectorDeliveries:
3900:         return crossSectorContractsDelivered;
3901:     }
3902:   }
3903: 
3904:   void reevaluateCampaignProgress() => _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3905: 
3906:   void _evaluateCampaignProgress({

3908:     bool emitLogs = true,
3909:   }) {
3910:     if (_suspendCampaignEvaluation) {
3911:       return;
3912:     }
3913:     var advanced = false;

3917:         break;
3918:       }
3919:       if (_campaignProgressFor(mission) < mission.target) {
3920:         break;
3921:       }
3922:       _campaignIndex += 1;
3923:       if (grantRewards && mission.rewardCredits > 0) {
