5247:   double shield;
5248:   double fireCooldown = 0;
5249:   double bias;
5250: }
5251: 
5252: class Projectile {
5253:   Projectile({
5254:     required this.position,
5255:     required this.velocity,
5256:     required this.ttl,
5257:     required this.damage,
5258:     required this.friendly,
5259:   });
5260: 
5261:   Offset position;
5262:   Offset velocity;
5263:   double ttl;
5264:   double damage;
5265:   bool friendly;
5266: }
5267: 
5268: class Blast {
5269:   Blast({required this.position, required this.ttl, required this.radius});
5270: 
5271:   final Offset position;
5272:   double ttl;
5273:   final double radius;
5274: }
5275: 
5276: class StarPoint {
5277:   const StarPoint({
5278:     required this.position,
5279:     required this.radius,
5280:     required this.alpha,
5281:     required this.tint,
5282:   });
5283: 
5284:   final Offset position;
5285:   final double radius;
5286:   final double alpha;
5287:   final int tint;
5288: }
5289: 
5290: // Renders the full flight scene: starfield, meshes, combat cues, cockpit
5291: // overlays, and post-processing inside the fixed frame.
5292: class Sector3DPainter extends CustomPainter {
5293:   Sector3DPainter(this.game, {this.drawLegacyHud = true});
5294: 
5295:   final VanSoleGame game;
5296:   final bool drawLegacyHud;
5297:   static const double _cameraPitch = 0.29;
5298:   static const double _nearClip = 34;
5299:   static const double _farClip = 6800;
5300:   static final _MeshModel _playerMesh = _buildPlayerMesh();
5301:   static final _MeshModel _pirateMesh = _buildPirateMesh();
5302:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshBastion = _buildStationMeshBastion();
5303:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshHalo = _buildStationMeshHalo();
5304:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshSpire = _buildStationMeshSpire();
5305:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshCitadel = _buildStationMeshCitadel();
5306:   static final _MeshModel _stationPodMesh = _buildStationPodMesh();
5307:   static final _MeshModel _resourceCrystalMesh = _buildResourceCrystalMesh();
5308:   static final _MeshModel _portalMesh = _buildPortalMesh();
5309:   static final _MeshModel _projectileMesh = _buildProjectileMesh();
5310:   static final _MeshModel _blastMesh = _buildBlastMesh();
5311:   static final _MeshModel _characterMesh = _buildCharacterMesh();
5312: 
5313:   @override
5314:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
5315:     final windowRect = Offset.zero & size;
5316:     canvas.drawRect(windowRect, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF000000));
5317:     if (size.width < 180 || size.height < 110) {
5318:       return;
5319:     }
5320:     final sceneSize = size;
5321:     canvas.save();
5322: 
5323:     final rect = Offset.zero & sceneSize;
5324:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(sceneSize);
5325:     final viewportInner = sceneSize.width <= 500
5326:         ? _dosViewportInnerRect
5327:         : viewportRect.deflate(drawLegacyHud ? 2 : 8);
5328:     final center = Offset(
5329:       viewportInner.center.dx,
5330:       viewportInner.top + viewportInner.height * (drawLegacyHud ? 0.58 : 0.56),
5331:     );
5332:     final focal = viewportInner.shortestSide * (drawLegacyHud ? 1.02 : 1.22);
5333:     final sinFacing = math.sin(game.playerFacing);
5334:     final cosFacing = math.cos(game.playerFacing);
5335:     final lightDir = _Vec3(
5336:       -0.42 + math.sin(game._clock * 0.27) * 0.22,
5337:       0.76,
5338:       -0.52,
5339:     ).normalized();
5340:     canvas.drawRect(rect, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF010205));
5341:     canvas.drawRect(viewportInner, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF000104));
5342:     final speedFactor = (game.playerVelocity.distance / 360)
5343:         .clamp(0.0, 1.0)
5344:         .toDouble();
5345:     _drawDeepSpaceBackdrop(
5346:       canvas,
5347:       viewportInner,
5348:       speedFactor: speedFactor,
5349:     );
5350:     canvas.drawRect(
5351:       viewportInner,
5352:       Paint()
5353:         ..shader = RadialGradient(
5354:           center: const Alignment(0, -0.25),
5355:           radius: 1.1,
5356:           colors: [
5357:             const Color(0xFF0A1730).withValues(alpha: 0.22),
5358:             Colors.transparent,
5359:           ],
5360:         ).createShader(viewportInner),
5361:     );
5362:     final dosSpriteStyle = drawLegacyHud && size.width < 220;
5363:     final horizonCenter = viewportInner.center;
5364:     final reticleCenter = viewportInner.center;
5365:     _TargetSnapshot? targetSnapshot;
5366:     final offscreenThreatDirections = <Offset>[];
5367:     canvas.save();
5368:     canvas.clipRect(viewportInner);
5369: 
5370:     for (final star in game.stars) {
5371:       final dx = _wrappedDelta(
5372:         star.position.dx - game.playerPosition.dx,
5373:         VanSoleGame.worldWidth,
5374:       );
5375:       final dy = _wrappedDelta(
5376:         star.position.dy - game.playerPosition.dy,
5377:         VanSoleGame.worldHeight,
5378:       );
5379:       final right = -dx * sinFacing + dy * cosFacing;
5380:       final forward = dx * cosFacing + dy * sinFacing;
5381:       final projected = _project3D(
5382:         center: center,
5383:         focal: focal,
5384:         right: right * 0.24,
5385:         up: 700 + star.tint * 120,
5386:         forward: 2600 + forward * 0.25,
5387:       );
5388:       if (projected == null) {
5389:         continue;
5390:       }
5391:       final starColor = switch (star.tint) {
5392:         0 => const Color(0xFFDDE9FF),
5393:         1 => const Color(0xFFFFE7C2),
5394:         _ => const Color(0xFFB7F6FF),
5395:       };
5396:       final alpha = (star.alpha * (0.55 + projected.scale * 0.25))
5397:           .clamp(0.08, 0.95)
5398:           .toDouble();
5399:       canvas.drawCircle(
5400:         projected.screen,
5401:         (star.radius * (0.8 + projected.scale * 0.55)).clamp(0.6, 2.5),
5402:         Paint()..color = starColor.withValues(alpha: alpha),
5403:       );
5404:       if (!dosSpriteStyle && speedFactor > 0.24) {
5405:         final dir = _normalize(projected.screen - horizonCenter);
5406:         final streakLen = (3 + speedFactor * 12 + projected.scale * 2.4).clamp(
5407:           2.5,
5408:           18.0,
5409:         );
5410:         canvas.drawLine(
5411:           projected.screen - dir * streakLen,
5412:           projected.screen,
5413:           Paint()
5414:             ..color = starColor.withValues(alpha: alpha * 0.5)
5415:             ..strokeWidth = 1.0
5416:             ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
5417:         );
5418:       }
5419:     }
5420:     _drawBackgroundPlanets(
5421:       canvas,
5422:       viewportInner,
5423:       center: center,
5424:       focal: focal,
5425:       sinFacing: sinFacing,
5426:       cosFacing: cosFacing,
5427:     );
5428:     _ProjectedPoint? harvestProjection;
5429:     ResourceNode? harvestResourceNode;
5430: 
5431:     for (final resource in game.resources) {
5432:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5433:         resource.position,
5434:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5435:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5436:       );
5437:       if (view.forward < -220) {
5438:         continue;
5439:       }
5440:       final p = _project3D(
5441:         center: center,
5442:         focal: focal,
5443:         right: view.right,
5444:         up: -170,
5445:         forward: view.forward,
5446:       );
5447:       if (p == null) {
5448:         continue;
5449:       }
5450:       final isHarvestTarget = game.harvestCandidate?.id == resource.id;
5451:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5452:         _drawResourceNodeSprite(
5453:           canvas,
5454:           p.screen,
5455:           resource: resource,
5456:           size: (4 + p.scale * 11).clamp(4.0, 16.0).toDouble(),
5457:           highlighted: isHarvestTarget,
5458:         );
5459:       } else {
5460:         _drawResourceNodeMesh(
5461:           canvas,
5462:           center: center,
5463:           focal: focal,
5464:           resource: resource,
5465:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5466:           yaw: game._clock * 0.4 + resource.id * 0.03,
5467:           lightDir: lightDir,
5468:           highlighted: isHarvestTarget,
5469:         );
5470:       }
5471:       if (isHarvestTarget) {
5472:         harvestProjection = p;
5473:         harvestResourceNode = resource;
5474:       }
5475:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 2400) {
5476:         _drawLabel(
5477:           canvas,
5478:           p.screen + Offset(12 + p.scale * 2, 10 + p.scale * 2),
5479:           resource.name,
5480:           resource.color,
5481:         );
5482:       }
5483:     }
5484: 
5485:     for (final station in game.stations) {
5486:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5487:         station.position,
5488:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5489:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5490:       );
5491:       if (view.forward < -180) {
5492:         continue;
5493:       }
5494:       final p = _project3D(
5495:         center: center,
5496:         focal: focal,
5497:         right: view.right,
5498:         up: -190,
5499:         forward: view.forward,
5500:       );
5501:       if (p == null) {
5502:         continue;
5503:       }
5504:       final fade = (1 - p.depth / _farClip).clamp(0.15, 1.0).toDouble();
5505:       final glowRadius = (16 + p.scale * 10).clamp(10.0, 52.0).toDouble();
5506:       final stationYaw = game._clock * 0.19 + station.id * 0.13;
5507:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5508:         _drawStationSprite(
5509:           canvas,
5510:           p.screen,
5511:           station,
5512:           size: (6 + p.scale * 22).clamp(5.0, 30.0).toDouble(),
5513:           tracked: game.dockCandidate?.id == station.id,
5514:         );
5515:       } else {
5516:         canvas.drawCircle(
5517:           p.screen,
5518:           glowRadius * 1.5,
5519:           Paint()
5520:             ..color = station.color.withValues(alpha: 0.14 * fade)
5521:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 8),
5522:         );
5523:         _drawModernStationCluster(
5524:           canvas,
5525:           center: center,
5526:           focal: focal,
5527:           station: station,
5528:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -190, view.forward),
5529:           yaw: stationYaw,
5530:           lightDir: lightDir,
5531:           tracked: game.dockCandidate?.id == station.id,
5532:         );
5533:       }
5534:       _drawStationApproachLights(
5535:         canvas,
5536:         center: center,
5537:         focal: focal,
5538:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -190, view.forward),
5539:         yaw: stationYaw,
5540:         color: station.color,
5541:       );
5542: 
5543:       if (game.dockedStation?.id == station.id ||
5544:           game.dockCandidate?.id == station.id) {
5545:         canvas.drawCircle(
5546:           p.screen,
5547:           glowRadius * 1.65,
5548:           Paint()
5549:             ..color =
5550:                 (game.dockedStation?.id == station.id
5551:                         ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
5552:                         : const Color(0xFFFBBF24))
5553:                     .withValues(alpha: 0.38)
5554:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5555:             ..strokeWidth = 2,
5556:         );
5557:       }
5558: 
5559:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 2900) {
5560:         _drawLabel(
5561:           canvas,
5562:           p.screen + Offset(16 + p.scale * 3, -20 - p.scale * 5),
5563:           station.name,
5564:           station.color,
5565:         );
5566:       }
5567:     }
5568: 
5569:     for (final portal in game.portals) {
5570:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5571:         portal.position,
5572:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5573:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5574:       );
5575:       if (view.forward < -220) {
5576:         continue;
5577:       }
5578:       final p = _project3D(
5579:         center: center,
5580:         focal: focal,
5581:         right: view.right,
5582:         up: -150,
5583:         forward: view.forward,
5584:       );
5585:       if (p == null) {
5586:         continue;
5587:       }
5588:       final isJumpCandidate = game.jumpCandidate?.id == portal.id;
5589:       final pulse = 0.62 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.2 + portal.id) * 0.2;
5590:       final ringRadius = (16 + p.scale * 15).clamp(8.0, 58.0).toDouble();
5591:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5592:         _drawPortalSprite(
5593:           canvas,
5594:           p.screen,
5595:           size: (6 + p.scale * 15).clamp(6.0, 24.0).toDouble(),
5596:           color: portal.color,
5597:         );
5598:       } else {
5599:         canvas.drawCircle(
5600:           p.screen,
5601:           ringRadius * 2.0,
5602:           Paint()
5603:             ..color = portal.color.withValues(alpha: 0.1 * pulse)
5604:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 9),
5605:         );
5606:         _drawMesh(
5607:           canvas,
5608:           center: center,
5609:           focal: focal,
5610:           mesh: _portalMesh,
5611:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -150, view.forward),
5612:           yaw: game._clock * 0.7 + portal.id * 0.03,
5613:           baseColor: Color.lerp(portal.color, const Color(0xFF5C7CA2), 0.46)!,
5614:           lightDir: lightDir,
5615:           ambient: 0.2,
5616:           emissiveBoost: 0.14,
5617:           edgeAlpha: 0.2,
5618:         );
5619:       }
5620:       if (isJumpCandidate) {
5621:         canvas.drawCircle(
5622:           p.screen,
5623:           ringRadius * 1.95,
5624:           Paint()
5625:             ..color = const Color(0xFFA78BFA).withValues(alpha: 0.36)
5626:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5627:             ..strokeWidth = 2,
5628:         );
5629:       }
5630:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 3200) {
5631:         _drawLabel(
5632:           canvas,
5633:           p.screen + Offset(18 + p.scale * 2.5, 10 + p.scale * 3.5),
5634:           portal.name,
5635:           portal.color,
5636:         );
5637:       }
5638:     }
5639: 
5640:     for (final blast in game.blasts) {
5641:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5642:         blast.position,
5643:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5644:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5645:       );
5646:       if (view.forward < -180) {
5647:         continue;
5648:       }
5649:       final p = _project3D(
5650:         center: center,
5651:         focal: focal,
5652:         right: view.right,
5653:         up: -170,
5654:         forward: view.forward,
5655:       );
5656:       if (p == null) {
5657:         continue;
5658:       }
5659:       final t = (blast.ttl / 0.45).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
5660:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5661:         canvas.drawCircle(
5662:           p.screen,
5663:           (blast.radius * (1.0 - t) * p.scale).clamp(1.0, 16.0),
5664:           Paint()
5665:             ..isAntiAlias = false
5666:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFFB454).withValues(alpha: 0.52 * t),
5667:         );
5668:         continue;
5669:       }
5670:       _drawMesh(
5671:         canvas,
5672:         center: center,
5673:         focal: focal,
5674:         mesh: _blastMesh,
5675:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5676:         yaw: game._clock * 1.2 + blast.radius * 0.01,
5677:         baseColor: const Color(0xFFFFA04A),
5678:         lightDir: lightDir,
5679:         ambient: 0.26,
5680:         emissiveBoost: 0.46 * t,
5681:         edgeAlpha: 0.0,
5682:         scale: (0.22 + blast.radius * 0.012) * (1.3 - t),
5683:       );
5684:       canvas.drawCircle(
5685:         p.screen,
5686:         (blast.radius * (1.2 - t) * p.scale).clamp(2.0, 84.0),
5687:         Paint()
5688:           ..color = const Color(0xFFFFB454).withValues(alpha: t * 0.4)
5689:           ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5690:           ..strokeWidth = 2,
5691:       );
5692:     }
5693: 
5694:     if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5695:       _drawPlayerShipSprite(
5696:         canvas,
5697:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 8),
5698:         facing: game.playerFacing,
5699:         pulse: 0.84 + math.sin(game._clock * 5.8) * 0.08,
5700:       );
5701:     } else {
5702:       _drawPlayerShipMesh(
5703:         canvas,
5704:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 11),
5705:         facing: game.playerFacing,
5706:       );
5707:     }
5708: 
5709:     for (final shot in game.projectiles) {
5710:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5711:         shot.position,
5712:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5713:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5714:       );
5715:       if (view.forward < -160) {
5716:         continue;
5717:       }
5718:       final p = _project3D(
5719:         center: center,
5720:         focal: focal,
5721:         right: view.right,
5722:         up: -170,
5723:         forward: view.forward,
5724:       );
5725:       if (p == null) {
5726:         continue;
5727:       }
5728:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5729:         final color = shot.friendly
5730:             ? const Color(0xFF60A5FA)
5731:             : const Color(0xFFF87171);
5732:         canvas.drawRect(
5733:           Rect.fromCenter(center: p.screen, width: 2.2, height: 2.2),
5734:           Paint()
5735:             ..isAntiAlias = false
5736:             ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.92),
5737:         );
5738:         continue;
5739:       }
5740:       final shotYaw = math.atan2(shot.velocity.dx, shot.velocity.dy);
5741:       _drawMesh(
5742:         canvas,
5743:         center: center,
5744:         focal: focal,
5745:         mesh: _projectileMesh,
5746:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5747:         yaw: shotYaw,
5748:         baseColor: shot.friendly
5749:             ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8)
5750:             : const Color(0xFFFF8A80),
5751:         lightDir: lightDir,
5752:         ambient: 0.22,
5753:         emissiveBoost: 0.9,
5754:         edgeAlpha: 0.0,
5755:         scale: 0.28,
5756:       );
5757:       final radius = (p.scale * 2.3).clamp(1.2, 5.2).toDouble();
5758:       final tailView = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5759:         shot.position - shot.velocity * 0.028,
5760:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5761:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5762:       );
5763:       final tail = _project3D(
5764:         center: center,
5765:         focal: focal,
5766:         right: tailView.right,
5767:         up: -170,
5768:         forward: tailView.forward,
5769:       );
5770:       if (tail != null) {
5771:         canvas.drawLine(
5772:           tail.screen,
5773:           p.screen,
5774:           Paint()
5775:             ..color =
5776:                 (shot.friendly
5777:                         ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8)
5778:                         : const Color(0xFFFF8A80))
5779:                     .withValues(alpha: 0.42)
5780:             ..strokeWidth = radius * 0.85
5781:             ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
5782:         );
5783:       }
5784:       canvas.drawCircle(
5785:         p.screen,
5786:         radius,
5787:         Paint()
5788:           ..color = shot.friendly
5789:               ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8).withValues(alpha: 0.9)
5790:               : const Color(0xFFFF8A80).withValues(alpha: 0.9),
5791:       );
5792:     }
5793: 
5794:     for (final pirate in game.pirates) {
5795:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5796:         pirate.position,
5797:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5798:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5799:       );
5800:       if (view.forward < -240) {
5801:         continue;
5802:       }
5803:       final p = _project3D(
5804:         center: center,
5805:         focal: focal,
5806:         right: view.right,
5807:         up: -155,
5808:         forward: view.forward,
5809:       );
5810:       if (p == null) {
5811:         continue;
5812:       }
5813:       final isTracked = game.trackedPirateId == pirate.trackingId;
5814:       final distance = (pirate.position - game.playerPosition).distance;
5815:       final isOnScreen =
5816:           p.screen.dx >= viewportInner.left + 6 &&
5817:           p.screen.dx <= viewportInner.right - 6 &&
5818:           p.screen.dy >= viewportInner.top + 6 &&
5819:           p.screen.dy <= viewportInner.bottom - 6;
5820:       if (!isOnScreen && distance < 2200) {
5821:         offscreenThreatDirections.add(_normalize(p.screen - reticleCenter));
5822:       }
5823:       final targetScore = (p.screen - reticleCenter).distance + p.depth * 0.05;
5824:       if (isTracked ||
5825:           (isOnScreen &&
5826:               (targetSnapshot == null ||
5827:                   (!targetSnapshot.isTracked &&
5828:                       targetScore < targetSnapshot.score)))) {
5829:         targetSnapshot = _TargetSnapshot(
5830:           pirate: pirate,
5831:           projection: p,
5832:           score: targetScore,
5833:           distance: distance,
5834:           isTracked: isTracked,
5835:           isOnScreen: isOnScreen,
5836:         );
5837:       }
5838:       final relYaw = pirate.angle - game.playerFacing - math.pi / 2;
5839:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5840:         _drawPirateSprite(
5841:           canvas,
5842:           p.screen,
5843:           size: (5 + p.scale * 15).clamp(5.0, 24.0).toDouble(),
5844:           tracked: isTracked,
5845:           yaw: relYaw,
5846:         );
5847:       } else {
5848:         _drawMesh(
5849:           canvas,
5850:           center: center,
5851:           focal: focal,
5852:           mesh: _pirateMesh,
5853:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -155, view.forward),
5854:           yaw: relYaw,
5855:           baseColor: isTracked
5856:               ? const Color(0xFFDCC56B)
5857:               : const Color(0xFF5EA0E9),
5858:           lightDir: lightDir,
5859:           ambient: 0.24,
5860:           emissiveBoost: 0.02,
5861:           edgeAlpha: 0.2,
5862:         );
5863:       }
5864:       if (isOnScreen) {
5865:         final outlineRadius = (8.6 + p.scale * 7.2).clamp(7.0, 24.0);
5866:         final outlineColor = isTracked
5867:             ? const Color(0xFFFDE68A)
5868:             : const Color(0xFFF87171);
5869:         canvas.drawCircle(
5870:           p.screen,
5871:           outlineRadius,
5872:           Paint()
5873:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5874:             ..strokeWidth = isTracked ? 1.35 : 1.0
5875:             ..color = outlineColor.withValues(alpha: isTracked ? 0.72 : 0.52),
5876:         );
5877:       }
5878: 
5879:       final shieldPct = (pirate.shield / 35).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
5880:       if (shieldPct > 0) {
5881:         canvas.drawCircle(
5882:           p.screen,
5883:           (11 + p.scale * 8).clamp(7.0, 30.0),
5884:           Paint()
5885:             ..color = const Color(
5886:               0xFF93C5FD,
5887:             ).withValues(alpha: 0.15 + shieldPct * 0.18)
5888:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5889:             ..strokeWidth = 1.5,
5890:         );
5891:       }
5892: 
5893:       if (isTracked) {
5894:         final dotCenter =
5895:             p.screen + Offset(-11 - p.scale * 2, -11 - p.scale * 2);
5896:         canvas.drawCircle(
5897:           dotCenter,
5898:           (2.2 + p.scale * 0.9).clamp(2.0, 4.0),
5899:           Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF4ADE80).withValues(alpha: 0.95),
5900:         );
5901:         canvas.drawCircle(
5902:           dotCenter,
5903:           (4.4 + p.scale * 1.4).clamp(3.2, 8.0),
5904:           Paint()
5905:             ..color = const Color(0xFF4ADE80).withValues(alpha: 0.26)
5906:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5907:             ..strokeWidth = 1,
5908:         );
5909:       }
5910: 
5911:       final thruster = _projectLocalPoint(
5912:         center: center,
5913:         focal: focal,
5914:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -155, view.forward),
5915:         yaw: relYaw,
5916:         local: const _Vec3(0, 1.4, -24),
5917:       );
5918:       if (thruster != null) {
5919:         final glow = (2.8 + p.scale * 4.4).clamp(2.0, 12.0).toDouble();
5920:         canvas.drawCircle(
5921:           thruster.screen,
5922:           glow,
5923:           Paint()
5924:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFFAFA6).withValues(alpha: 0.38)
5925:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 6),
5926:         );
5927:       }
5928:     }
5929: 
5930:     if (game.dockCandidate != null) {
5931:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5932:         game.dockCandidate!.position,
5933:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5934:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5935:       );
5936:       final stationScreen = _project3D(
5937:         center: center,
5938:         focal: focal,
5939:         right: view.right,
5940:         up: -190,
5941:         forward: view.forward,
5942:       );
5943:       if (stationScreen != null) {
5944:         canvas.drawLine(
5945:           reticleCenter,
5946:           stationScreen.screen,
5947:           Paint()
5948:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFBBF24).withValues(alpha: 0.46)
5949:             ..strokeWidth = 1.6,
5950:         );
5951:         _drawReticle(
5952:           canvas,
5953:           stationScreen.screen,
5954:           const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
5955:           0.65 + math.sin(game._clock * 5) * 0.06,
5956:         );
5957:       }
5958:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5959:         _drawLabel(
5960:           canvas,
5961:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 18),
5962:           'Press E to dock',
5963:           const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
5964:         );
5965:       }
5966:     }
5967: 
5968:     if (game.jumpCandidate != null) {
5969:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5970:         game.jumpCandidate!.position,
5971:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5972:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5973:       );
5974:       final portalScreen = _project3D(
5975:         center: center,
5976:         focal: focal,
5977:         right: view.right,
5978:         up: -150,
5979:         forward: view.forward,
5980:       );
5981:       if (portalScreen != null) {
5982:         canvas.drawLine(
5983:           reticleCenter,
5984:           portalScreen.screen,
5985:           Paint()
5986:             ..color = const Color(0xFFA78BFA).withValues(alpha: 0.42)
5987:             ..strokeWidth = 1.4,
5988:         );
5989:         _drawReticle(
5990:           canvas,
5991:           portalScreen.screen,
5992:           const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
5993:           0.68 + math.sin(game._clock * 4.2) * 0.06,
5994:         );
5995:       }
5996:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5997:         _drawLabel(
5998:           canvas,
5999:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 34),
6000:           'Press J to jump',
6001:           const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
6002:         );
6003:       }
6004:     }
6005: 
6006:     if (harvestProjection != null && harvestResourceNode != null) {
6007:       _drawReticle(
6008:         canvas,
6009:         harvestProjection.screen,
6010:         harvestResourceNode.color,
6011:         0.64 + math.sin(game._clock * 4.4) * 0.05,
6012:       );
6013:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
6014:         _drawLabel(
6015:           canvas,
6016:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 50),
6017:           'Press H to harvest',
6018:           harvestResourceNode.color,
6019:         );
6020:       }
6021:     }
6022: 
6023:     _drawCombatOverlays(
6024:       canvas,
6025:       viewportInner,
6026:       center: center,
6027:       focal: focal,
6028:       sinFacing: sinFacing,
6029:       cosFacing: cosFacing,
6030:       reticleCenter: reticleCenter,
6031:       target: targetSnapshot,
6032:       offscreenThreatDirections: offscreenThreatDirections,
6033:     );
6034:     if (dosSpriteStyle) {
6035:       _drawDosCrtOverlay(canvas, viewportInner);
6036:     } else {
6037:       _drawPostProcessing(canvas, viewportInner, speedFactor: speedFactor);
6038:     }
6039:     canvas.restore();
6040:     if (game.cockpitMode == 4) {
6041:       _drawScienceScanOverlay(canvas, viewportInner, targetSnapshot);
6042:     }
6043:     if (drawLegacyHud) {
6044:       _drawCommsPrompt(canvas, viewportInner);
6045:       _drawEncounterCockpitOverlay(canvas, sceneSize);
6046:       _drawCockpitOverlay(canvas, sceneSize, reticleCenter);
6047:       _drawControlPanel(
6048:         canvas,
6049:         sceneSize,
6050:         target: targetSnapshot,
6051:         reticleCenter: reticleCenter,
6052:       );
6053:       _drawCommandStrip(canvas, sceneSize, targetSnapshot);
6054:     } else {
6055:       _drawViewportReticle(canvas, reticleCenter, sceneSize.width <= 500);
6056:       if (game.activeEncounter != null) {
6057:         _drawEncounterCockpitOverlay(canvas, sceneSize);
6058:       }
6059:     }
6060:     _drawDamageIndicator(canvas, reticleCenter);
6061: 
6062:     if (game.damageFlash > 0) {
6063:       canvas.drawRect(
6064:         rect,
6065:         Paint()
6066:           ..color = const Color(
6067:             0xFFFF4D4D,
6068:           ).withValues(alpha: game.damageFlash * 0.16),
6069:       );
6070:     }
6071:     canvas.restore();
6072:   }
6073: 
6074:   _ProjectedPoint? _project3D({
6075:     required Offset center,
6076:     required double focal,
6077:     required double right,
6078:     required double up,
6079:     required double forward,
6080:   }) {
6081:     final cp = math.cos(_cameraPitch);
6082:     final sp = math.sin(_cameraPitch);
6083:     final y = up * cp - forward * sp;
6084:     final z = up * sp + forward * cp;
6085:     if (z <= _nearClip || z > _farClip) {
6086:       return null;
6087:     }
6088:     final scale = focal / z;
6089:     final x = center.dx + right * scale;
6090:     final screenY = center.dy - y * scale;
6091:     return _ProjectedPoint(Offset(x, screenY), z, scale);
6092:   }
6093: 
6094:   _ProjectedPoint? _projectLocalPoint({
6095:     required Offset center,
6096:     required double focal,
6097:     required _Vec3 origin,
6098:     required double yaw,
6099:     required _Vec3 local,
6100:   }) {
6101:     final cy = math.cos(yaw);
6102:     final sy = math.sin(yaw);
6103:     final rotated = _Vec3(
6104:       local.x * cy - local.z * sy,
6105:       local.y,
6106:       local.x * sy + local.z * cy,
6107:     );
6108:     final view = origin + rotated;
6109:     return _project3D(
6110:       center: center,
6111:       focal: focal,
6112:       right: view.x,
6113:       up: view.y,
6114:       forward: view.z,
6115:     );
6116:   }
6117: 
6118:   _Vec3 _rotateLocalOffset(_Vec3 local, double yaw) {
6119:     final cy = math.cos(yaw);
6120:     final sy = math.sin(yaw);
6121:     return _Vec3(
6122:       local.x * cy - local.z * sy,
6123:       local.y,
6124:       local.x * sy + local.z * cy,
6125:     );
6126:   }
6127: 
6128:   ({double right, double forward}) _viewSpaceForWorld(
6129:     Offset world, {
6130:     required double sinFacing,
6131:     required double cosFacing,
6132:   }) {
6133:     final dx = world.dx - game.playerPosition.dx;
6134:     final dy = world.dy - game.playerPosition.dy;
6135:     return (
6136:       right: -dx * sinFacing + dy * cosFacing,
6137:       forward: dx * cosFacing + dy * sinFacing,
6138:     );
6139:   }
6140: 
6141:   double _wrappedDelta(double delta, double span) {
6142:     var value = delta;
6143:     while (value > span / 2) {
6144:       value -= span;
6145:     }
6146:     while (value < -span / 2) {
6147:       value += span;
6148:     }
6149:     return value;
6150:   }
6151: 
6152:   double _panelWidthFor(Size size) {
6153:     if (size.width <= 500) {
6154:       return (size.width * 0.265).clamp(80.0, 92.0).toDouble();
6155:     }
6156:     return (size.width * 0.29).clamp(224.0, 320.0).toDouble();
6157:   }
6158: 
6159:   Rect _viewportRectFor(Size size) {
6160:     if (!drawLegacyHud) {
6161:       final inset = size.width <= 500 ? 4.0 : 14.0;
6162:       return Rect.fromLTWH(
6163:         inset,
6164:         inset,
6165:         size.width - inset * 2,
6166:         size.height - inset * 2,
6167:       );
6168:     }
6169:     if (size.width <= 500) {
6170:       return _dosViewportRect;
6171:     }
6172:     final panelWidth = _panelWidthFor(size);
6173:     final left = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 8.0;
6174:     final top = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 10.0;
6175:     final rightGap = size.width <= 500 ? 4.0 : 24.0;
6176:     final bottomGap = size.width <= 500 ? 12.0 : 30.0;
6177:     return Rect.fromLTWH(
6178:       left,
6179:       top,
6180:       size.width - panelWidth - left - rightGap,
6181:       size.height - top - bottomGap,
6182:     );
6183:   }
6184: 
6185:   Rect _panelRectFor(Size size) {
6186:     if (size.width <= 500) {
6187:       return _dosPanelRect;
6188:     }
6189:     final panelWidth = _panelWidthFor(size);
6190:     final inset = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 8.0;
6191:     final top = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 8.0;
6192:     final heightInset = size.width <= 500 ? 4.0 : 16.0;
6193:     return Rect.fromLTWH(
6194:       size.width - panelWidth - inset,
6195:       top,
6196:       panelWidth,
6197:       size.height - heightInset,
6198:     );
6199:   }
6200: 
6201:   void _drawViewportReticle(Canvas canvas, Offset reticleCenter, bool compact) {
6202:     if (compact) {
6203:       final p = Paint()
6204:         ..isAntiAlias = false
6205:         ..color = const Color(0xFF67E8F9).withValues(alpha: 0.76)
6206:         ..strokeWidth = 1;
6207:       canvas.drawLine(
6208:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-5, 0),
6209:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-2, 0),
6210:         p,
6211:       );
6212:       canvas.drawLine(
6213:         reticleCenter + const Offset(2, 0),
6214:         reticleCenter + const Offset(5, 0),
6215:         p,
6216:       );
6217:       canvas.drawLine(
6218:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -5),
6219:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -2),
6220:         p,
6221:       );
6222:       canvas.drawLine(
6223:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 2),
6224:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 5),
6225:         p,
6226:       );
6227:       return;
6228:     }
6229:     _drawReticle(
6230:       canvas,
6231:       reticleCenter,
6232:       const Color(0xFF67E8F9),
6233:       0.86 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.8) * 0.05,
6234:     );
6235:   }
6236: 
6237:   void _drawCockpitOverlay(Canvas canvas, Size size, Offset reticleCenter) {
6238:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(size);
6239:     final compact = size.width <= 500;
6240:     final framePad = compact ? 1.5 : 5.0;
6241:     final frameOuter = Rect.fromLTWH(
6242:       viewportRect.left - framePad,
6243:       viewportRect.top - framePad,
6244:       viewportRect.width + framePad * 2,
6245:       viewportRect.height + framePad * 2,
6246:     );
6247:     final shellPath = Path.combine(
6248:       PathOperation.difference,
6249:       Path()..addRect(frameOuter),
6250:       Path()..addRect(viewportRect),
6251:     );
6252:     canvas.drawPath(
6253:       shellPath,
6254:       Paint()
6255:         ..shader = const LinearGradient(
6256:           begin: Alignment.topCenter,
6257:           end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
6258:           colors: [Color(0xFF89909A), Color(0xFF444B56), Color(0xFF949BA5)],
6259:           stops: [0.0, 0.52, 1.0],
6260:         ).createShader(frameOuter),
6261:     );
6262:     canvas.drawRect(
6263:       viewportRect,
6264:       Paint()
6265:         ..shader = RadialGradient(
6266:           center: Alignment.center,
6267:           radius: 1.02,
6268:           colors: [
6269:             Colors.transparent,
6270:             Colors.transparent,
6271:             Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.14),
6272:           ],
6273:           stops: const [0.65, 0.84, 1.0],
6274:         ).createShader(viewportRect),
6275:     );
6276:     canvas.drawRect(
6277:       frameOuter,
6278:       Paint()
6279:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6280:         ..strokeWidth = compact ? 0.8 : 1.4
6281:         ..color = const Color(0xFFE5E7EB).withValues(alpha: 0.45),
6282:     );
6283:     canvas.drawRect(
6284:       viewportRect.deflate(1),
6285:       Paint()
6286:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6287:         ..strokeWidth = compact ? 0.7 : 1
6288:         ..color = const Color(0xFF0EA5E9).withValues(alpha: 0.22),
6289:     );
6290:     for (final corner in <Offset>[
6291:       frameOuter.topLeft,
6292:       frameOuter.topRight,
6293:       frameOuter.bottomLeft,
6294:       frameOuter.bottomRight,
6295:     ]) {
6296:       canvas.drawCircle(
6297:         corner,
6298:         compact ? 1.0 : 1.8,
6299:         Paint()..color = const Color(0xFFE5E7EB).withValues(alpha: 0.52),
6300:       );
6301:     }
6302:     if (compact) {
6303:       final p = Paint()
6304:         ..isAntiAlias = false
6305:         ..color = const Color(0xFF67E8F9).withValues(alpha: 0.72)
6306:         ..strokeWidth = 1;
6307:       canvas.drawLine(
6308:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-5, 0),
6309:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-2, 0),
6310:         p,
6311:       );
6312:       canvas.drawLine(
6313:         reticleCenter + const Offset(2, 0),
6314:         reticleCenter + const Offset(5, 0),
6315:         p,
6316:       );
6317:       canvas.drawLine(
6318:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -5),
6319:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -2),
6320:         p,
6321:       );
6322:       canvas.drawLine(
6323:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 2),
6324:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 5),
6325:         p,
6326:       );
6327:     } else {
6328:       _drawReticle(
6329:         canvas,
6330:         reticleCenter,
6331:         const Color(0xFF67E8F9),
6332:         0.86 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.8) * 0.05,
6333:       );
6334:     }
6335:   }
6336: 
6337:   void _drawCommandStrip(Canvas canvas, Size size, _TargetSnapshot? target) {
6338:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(size);
6339:     final stripHeight = size.width <= 500 ? 10.0 : 16.0;
6340:     final stripRect = Rect.fromLTWH(
6341:       viewportRect.left,
6342:       viewportRect.bottom + (size.width <= 500 ? 1.5 : 2.0),
6343:       viewportRect.width,
6344:       stripHeight,
6345:     );
6346:     canvas.drawRect(
6347:       stripRect,
6348:       Paint()
6349:         ..shader = const LinearGradient(
6350:           begin: Alignment.topCenter,
6351:           end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
6352:           colors: [Color(0xFF11355C), Color(0xFF06203D)],
6353:         ).createShader(stripRect),
6354:     );
6355:     canvas.drawRect(
6356:       stripRect,
6357:       Paint()
6358:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6359:         ..strokeWidth = 1
6360:         ..color = const Color(0xFF8CB7DA).withValues(alpha: 0.35),
6361:     );
6362:     var text = '* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *';
6363:     if (game.cockpitMode == 4 &&
6364:         target == null &&
6365:         game.nearestResource != null &&
6366:         game.nearestResourceDistance <= 280) {
6367:       text = 'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL RESOURCE CACHE';
6368:     } else if (game.cockpitMode == 4 && target == null) {
6369:       text = 'OBJECT MUST BE ON SCREEN TO SCAN';
6370:     } else if (game.cockpitMode == 4 && target != null) {
6371:       text = 'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL SPACECRAFT';
6372:     } else if (game.harvestCandidate != null) {
6373:       text = 'PRESS H TO HARVEST ${game.harvestCandidate!.name.toUpperCase()}';
6374:     } else if (target != null) {
6375:       text =
6376:           'TARGET ${game.pirateContactName(target.pirate)}  RANGE ${_distanceKm(target.distance)}';
6377:     } else if (game.cockpitCommsPrompt != null) {
6378:       text = game.cockpitCommsPrompt!;
6379:     } else if (game.commsLog.isNotEmpty) {
6380:       text = game.commsLog.first.replaceFirst(RegExp(r'^\[[0-9:]+\]\s*'), '');
6381:     }
6382:     _drawHudText(
6383:       canvas,
6384:       Offset(stripRect.left + 4, stripRect.top + 1),
6385:       text,
6386:       color: const Color(0xFFE5D089),
6387:       size: size.width <= 500 ? 5.4 : 7.4,
6388:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6389:     );
6390:     final keyText = game.harvestCandidate != null
6391:         ? 'SPACE=STOP  ALT=FIRE  H=HARVEST  CTRL=MISSILES'
6392:         : stripRect.width < 400
6393:         ? 'SPACE=STOP  ALT=FIRE  CTRL=MISSILES'
6394:         : 'SPACE=STOP  ALT=FIRE  CTRL=MISSILES  F1=MAIN MENU';
6395:     _drawHudText(
6396:       canvas,
6397:       Offset(
6398:         stripRect.left + 4,
6399:         stripRect.top + (size.width <= 500 ? 5.0 : 9.0),
6400:       ),
6401:       keyText,
6402:       color: const Color(0xFF9CC7E7),
6403:       size: size.width <= 500 ? 4.7 : 6.6,
6404:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6405:     );
6406:   }
6407: 
6408:   void _drawReticle(Canvas canvas, Offset center, Color color, double pulse) {
6409:     final radius = 14 * pulse;
6410:     final paint = Paint()
6411:       ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.9)
6412:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6413:       ..strokeWidth = 1.1;
6414:     canvas.drawCircle(center, radius * 0.44, paint);
6415:     canvas.drawLine(
6416:       center + const Offset(-19, 0),
6417:       center + const Offset(-5, 0),
6418:       paint,
6419:     );
6420:     canvas.drawLine(
6421:       center + const Offset(5, 0),
6422:       center + const Offset(19, 0),
6423:       paint,
6424:     );
6425:     canvas.drawLine(
6426:       center + const Offset(0, -19),
6427:       center + const Offset(0, -5),
6428:       paint,
6429:     );
6430:     canvas.drawLine(
6431:       center + const Offset(0, 5),
6432:       center + const Offset(0, 19),
6433:       paint,
6434:     );
6435:     canvas.drawCircle(
6436:       center,
6437:       1.5,
6438:       Paint()..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.92),
6439:     );
6440:   }
6441: 
6442:   void _drawDamageIndicator(Canvas canvas, Offset center) {
6443:     if (game.incomingDamageStrength <= 0.01) {
6444:       return;
6445:     }
6446:     final relative = game.incomingDamageDirection - game.playerFacing;
6447:     final dir = Offset(math.cos(relative), math.sin(relative));
6448:     final arcCenter = center + dir * 40;
6449:     final start = math.atan2(dir.dy, dir.dx) - math.pi * 0.32;
6450:     final sweep = math.pi * 0.64;
6451:     final alpha = (0.15 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 0.75)
6452:         .clamp(0.0, 0.92)
6453:         .toDouble();
6454:     final arcRect = Rect.fromCircle(
6455:       center: arcCenter,
6456:       radius: 34 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 10,
6457:     );
6458:     canvas.drawArc(
6459:       arcRect,
6460:       start,
6461:       sweep,
6462:       false,
6463:       Paint()
6464:         ..color = const Color(0xFFFF6B6B).withValues(alpha: alpha)
6465:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6466:         ..strokeWidth = 2.2 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 1.5
6467:         ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
6468:     );
6469:     canvas.drawCircle(
6470:       arcCenter,
6471:       2.2 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 1.4,
6472:       Paint()..color = const Color(0xFFFF6B6B).withValues(alpha: alpha),
6473:     );
6474:   }
6475: 
6476:   void _drawCommsPrompt(Canvas canvas, Rect viewportRect) {
6477:     final prompt = game.cockpitCommsPrompt;
6478:     if (prompt == null) {
6479:       return;
6480:     }
6481:     final compact = viewportRect.width < 260;
6482:     final hazard = prompt.contains('HAILED') || prompt.contains('MUST');
6483:     final pulse = 0.78 + math.sin(game._clock * 5.2) * 0.14;
6484:     final accent = hazard ? const Color(0xFFE69766) : const Color(0xFFE5D089);
6485:     final width = math
6486:         .min(
6487:           viewportRect.width * (compact ? 0.96 : 0.76),
6488:           compact ? 210.0 : 468.0,
6489:         )
6490:         .toDouble();
6491:     final rect = Rect.fromCenter(
6492:       center: Offset(
6493:         viewportRect.center.dx,
6494:         viewportRect.top + (compact ? 9 : 28),
6495:       ),
6496:       width: width,
6497:       height: compact ? 9.5 : 20,
6498:     );
6499:     canvas.drawRect(
6500:       rect,
6501:       Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF04121F).withValues(alpha: 0.95),
6502:     );
6503:     canvas.drawRect(
6504:       rect,
6505:       Paint()
6506:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6507:         ..strokeWidth = 1
6508:         ..color = accent.withValues(alpha: 0.32 + pulse * 0.4),
6509:     );
6510:     _drawHudText(
6511:       canvas,
6512:       Offset(rect.left + 4, rect.top + (compact ? 2 : 6)),
6513:       prompt,
6514:       color: accent.withValues(alpha: 0.9 + pulse * 0.08),
6515:       size: compact ? 4.8 : 8.8,
6516:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6517:     );
6518:   }
6519: 
6520:   void _drawScienceScanOverlay(
6521:     Canvas canvas,
6522:     Rect viewportRect,
6523:     _TargetSnapshot? target,
6524:   ) {
6525:     final compact = viewportRect.width < 260;
6526:     final width = math
6527:         .min(
6528:           viewportRect.width * (compact ? 0.92 : 0.68),
6529:           compact ? 210.0 : 360.0,
6530:         )
6531:         .toDouble();
6532:     final rect = Rect.fromLTWH(
6533:       viewportRect.left + 8,
6534:       viewportRect.top + 10,
6535:       width,
6536:       compact ? 54 : 74,
6537:     );
6538:     canvas.drawRect(
6539:       rect,
6540:       Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF010205).withValues(alpha: 0.86),
6541:     );
6542:     canvas.drawRect(
6543:       rect,
6544:       Paint()
6545:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6546:         ..strokeWidth = 1
6547:         ..color = const Color(0xFF8BBADE).withValues(alpha: 0.62),
6548:     );
6549:     if (target == null) {
6550:       final resource = game.nearestResource;
6551:       if (resource == null || game.nearestResourceDistance > 280) {
6552:         return;
6553:       }
6554:       CommoditySpec? commodity;
6555:       for (final entry in game.commodityCatalog) {
6556:         if (entry.id == resource.commodityId) {
6557:           commodity = entry;
6558:           break;
6559:         }
6560:       }
6561:       _drawHudText(
6562:         canvas,
6563:         Offset(rect.left + 5, rect.top + 4),
6564:         'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL RESOURCE CACHE',
6565:         color: const Color(0xFFE5D089),
6566:         size: compact ? 4.8 : 8.1,
6567:         weight: FontWeight.w700,
6568:       );
6569:       _drawHudText(
6570:         canvas,
6571:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 13 : 18)),
6572:         'NAME: ${resource.name}',
6573:         color: const Color(0xFFC8D9E8),
6574:         size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6575:       );
6576:       _drawHudText(
6577:         canvas,
6578:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 20 : 29)),
6579:         'FIELD TYPE: ${resource.kind.name.toUpperCase()}',
6580:         color: const Color(0xFFC8D9E8),
6581:         size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6582:       );
6583:       _drawHudText(
6584:         canvas,
6585:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 27 : 40)),
6586:         'RECOVERY: ${commodity?.name.toUpperCase() ?? 'UNKNOWN'}',
6587:         color: const Color(0xFF93C5FD),
6588:         size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6589:       );
6590:       _drawHudText(
6591:         canvas,
6592:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 34 : 51)),
6593:         'YIELD: ${resource.yieldUnits} UNITS // RANGE ${_distanceKm(game.nearestResourceDistance)}',
6594:         color: const Color(0xFFFDE68A),
6595:         size: compact ? 4.4 : 7.6,
6596:       );
6597:       return;
6598:     }
6599:     _drawHudText(
6600:       canvas,
6601:       Offset(rect.left + 5, rect.top + 4),
6602:       'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL SPACECRAFT',
6603:       color: const Color(0xFFE5D089),
6604:       size: compact ? 4.8 : 8.1,
6605:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6606:     );
6607:     final shipName = game.pirateContactName(target.pirate);
6608:     final shipClass = game.pirateHullClass(target.pirate);
6609:     final shieldType = game.pirateShieldType(target.pirate);
6610:     final cannonType = game.pirateCannonType(target.pirate);
6611:     _drawHudText(
6612:       canvas,
6613:       Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 13 : 18)),
6614:       'NAME: $shipName',
6615:       color: const Color(0xFFC8D9E8),
6616:       size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6617:     );
6618:     _drawHudText(
6619:       canvas,
6620:       Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 20 : 29)),
6621:       'AREA ISSUE CLASS $shipClass',
6622:       color: const Color(0xFFC8D9E8),
6623:       size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6624:     );
6625:     _drawHudText(
6626:       canvas,
6627:       Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 27 : 40)),
6628:       'SHIELD TYPE: $shieldType',
6629:       color: const Color(0xFF93C5FD),
6630:       size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6631:     );
6632:     _drawHudText(
6633:       canvas,
6634:       Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 34 : 51)),
6635:       'CANNON TYPE: $cannonType',
6636:       color: const Color(0xFFFCA5A5),
6637:       size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6638:     );
6639:   }
6640: 
6641:   void _drawDeepSpaceBackdrop(
6642:     Canvas canvas,
6643:     Rect viewportRect, {
6644:     required double speedFactor,
6645:   }) {
6646:     final palette = switch (game.sectorIndex % 4) {
6647:       0 => (
6648:         top: const Color(0xFF08101B),
6649:         mid: const Color(0xFF10223B),
6650:         glow: const Color(0xFF36B6D9),
6651:         accent: const Color(0xFF54F0C8),
6652:       ),
6653:       1 => (
6654:         top: const Color(0xFF0C1320),
6655:         mid: const Color(0xFF1B203F),
6656:         glow: const Color(0xFF7283FF),
6657:         accent: const Color(0xFFFF9E6B),
6658:       ),
6659:       2 => (
6660:         top: const Color(0xFF090F18),
6661:         mid: const Color(0xFF1A2838),
6662:         glow: const Color(0xFF44C7E8),
6663:         accent: const Color(0xFFD7F06D),
6664:       ),
6665:       _ => (
6666:         top: const Color(0xFF090E17),
6667:         mid: const Color(0xFF221B34),
6668:         glow: const Color(0xFF7E6BFF),
6669:         accent: const Color(0xFF4DD6FF),
6670:       ),
6671:     };
6672:     canvas.drawRect(
6673:       viewportRect,
6674:       Paint()
6675:         ..shader = LinearGradient(
6676:           begin: Alignment.topCenter,
6677:           end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
6678:           colors: [
6679:             palette.top,
6680:             palette.mid,
6681:             const Color(0xFF010205),
6682:           ],
6683:           stops: const [0.0, 0.56, 1.0],
6684:         ).createShader(viewportRect),
6685:     );
6686: 
6687:     final drift = game._clock * 0.08;
6688:     final nebulae = <({Alignment anchor, Size scale, Color color, double alpha})>[
6689:       (
6690:         anchor: Alignment(-0.72 + math.sin(drift) * 0.04, -0.58),
6691:         scale: const Size(0.58, 0.42),
6692:         color: palette.glow,
6693:         alpha: 0.16,
6694:       ),
6695:       (
6696:         anchor: Alignment(0.58, -0.18 + math.cos(drift * 1.2) * 0.05),
6697:         scale: const Size(0.64, 0.46),
6698:         color: palette.accent,
6699:         alpha: 0.12,
6700:       ),
6701:       (
6702:         anchor: Alignment(-0.08, 0.22 + math.sin(drift * 0.8) * 0.04),
6703:         scale: const Size(0.72, 0.34),
6704:         color: Color.lerp(palette.glow, palette.accent, 0.5)!,
6705:         alpha: 0.08,
6706:       ),
6707:     ];
6708:     for (final nebula in nebulae) {
6709:       final center = Offset(
6710:         viewportRect.left + (nebula.anchor.x + 1) * 0.5 * viewportRect.width,
6711:         viewportRect.top + (nebula.anchor.y + 1) * 0.5 * viewportRect.height,
6712:       );
6713:       final nebulaRect = Rect.fromCenter(
6714:         center: center,
6715:         width: viewportRect.width * nebula.scale.width,
6716:         height: viewportRect.height * nebula.scale.height,
6717:       );
6718:       canvas.drawOval(
6719:         nebulaRect,
6720:         Paint()
6721:           ..color = nebula.color.withValues(alpha: nebula.alpha)
6722:           ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 42),
6723:       );
6724:     }
6725: 
6726:     final dustPaint = Paint()..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round;
6727:     for (var i = 0; i < 18; i++) {
6728:       final fx =
6729:           (0.12 +
6730:                   ((math.sin(i * 2.13 + game.sectorIndex) + 1) * 0.5) * 0.76 +
6731:                   drift * 0.015 * (i.isEven ? 1 : -1)) %
6732:               1.0;
6733:       final fy = 0.1 + ((math.cos(i * 1.37 + game.sectorIndex * 0.4) + 1) * 0.5) * 0.8;
6734:       final point = Offset(
6735:         viewportRect.left + fx * viewportRect.width,
6736:         viewportRect.top + fy * viewportRect.height,
6737:       );
6738:       final radius = 0.7 + (i % 3) * 0.35;
6739:       dustPaint.color = Color.lerp(
6740:         palette.accent,
6741:         Colors.white,
6742:         0.38,
6743:       )!.withValues(alpha: 0.1 + (i % 4) * 0.025);
6744:       canvas.drawCircle(point, radius, dustPaint);
6745:       if (speedFactor > 0.22) {
6746:         final streak = (4 + speedFactor * 16 + i % 5).toDouble();
6747:         canvas.drawLine(
6748:           point - Offset(0, streak),
6749:           point,
6750:           dustPaint..strokeWidth = radius,
6751:         );
6752:       }
6753:     }
6754:   }
6755:

5283: // Renders the full flight scene: starfield, meshes, combat cues, cockpit
5284: // overlays, and post-processing inside the fixed frame.
5285: class Sector3DPainter extends CustomPainter {
5286:   Sector3DPainter(this.game, {this.drawLegacyHud = true});
5287: 
5288:   final VanSoleGame game;
5289:   final bool drawLegacyHud;
5290:   static const double _cameraPitch = 0.29;
5291:   static const double _nearClip = 34;
5292:   static const double _farClip = 6800;
5293:   static final _MeshModel _playerMesh = _buildPlayerMesh();
5294:   static final _MeshModel _pirateMesh = _buildPirateMesh();
5295:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshBastion = _buildStationMeshBastion();
5296:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshHalo = _buildStationMeshHalo();

5298:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshCitadel = _buildStationMeshCitadel();

5300:   static final _MeshModel _resourceCrystalMesh = _buildResourceCrystalMesh();
5301:   static final _MeshModel _portalMesh = _buildPortalMesh();
5302:   static final _MeshModel _projectileMesh = _buildProjectileMesh();
5303:   static final _MeshModel _blastMesh = _buildBlastMesh();
5304:   static final _MeshModel _characterMesh = _buildCharacterMesh();
5305: 
5306:   @override
5307:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
5308:     final windowRect = Offset.zero & size;
5309:     canvas.drawRect(windowRect, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF000000));
5310:     if (size.width < 180 || size.height < 110) {
5311:       return;
5312:     }
5313:     final sceneSize = size;
5314:     canvas.save();
5315: 
5316:     final rect = Offset.zero & sceneSize;
5317:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(sceneSize);
5318:     final viewportInner = sceneSize.width <= 500
5319:         ? _dosViewportInnerRect
5320:         : viewportRect.deflate(drawLegacyHud ? 2 : 8);
5321:     final center = Offset(
5322:       viewportInner.center.dx,
5323:       viewportInner.top + viewportInner.height * (drawLegacyHud ? 0.58 : 0.56),
5324:     );
5325:     final focal = viewportInner.shortestSide * (drawLegacyHud ? 1.02 : 1.22);
5326:     final sinFacing = math.sin(game.playerFacing);
5327:     final cosFacing = math.cos(game.playerFacing);
5328:     final lightDir = _Vec3(
5329:       -0.42 + math.sin(game._clock * 0.27) * 0.22,
5330:       0.76,
5331:       -0.52,
5332:     ).normalized();
5333:     canvas.drawRect(rect, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF010205));
5334:     canvas.drawRect(viewportInner, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF000104));
5335:     final speedFactor = (game.playerVelocity.distance / 360)
5336:         .clamp(0.0, 1.0)
5337:         .toDouble();
5338:     _drawDeepSpaceBackdrop(
5339:       canvas,
5340:       viewportInner,
5341:       speedFactor: speedFactor,
5342:     );
5343:     canvas.drawRect(
5344:       viewportInner,
5345:       Paint()
5346:         ..shader = RadialGradient(
5347:           center: const Alignment(0, -0.25),
5348:           radius: 1.1,
5349:           colors: [
5350:             const Color(0xFF0A1730).withValues(alpha: 0.22),
5351:             Colors.transparent,
5352:           ],
5353:         ).createShader(viewportInner),
5354:     );
5355:     final dosSpriteStyle = drawLegacyHud && size.width < 220;
5356:     final horizonCenter = viewportInner.center;
5357:     final reticleCenter = viewportInner.center;
5358:     _TargetSnapshot? targetSnapshot;
5359:     final offscreenThreatDirections = <Offset>[];
5360:     canvas.save();
5361:     canvas.clipRect(viewportInner);
5362: 
5363:     for (final star in game.stars) {
5364:       final dx = _wrappedDelta(
5365:         star.position.dx - game.playerPosition.dx,
5366:         VanSoleGame.worldWidth,
5367:       );
5368:       final dy = _wrappedDelta(
5369:         star.position.dy - game.playerPosition.dy,
5370:         VanSoleGame.worldHeight,
5371:       );
5372:       final right = -dx * sinFacing + dy * cosFacing;
5373:       final forward = dx * cosFacing + dy * sinFacing;
5374:       final projected = _project3D(
5375:         center: center,
5376:         focal: focal,
5377:         right: right * 0.24,
5378:         up: 700 + star.tint * 120,
5379:         forward: 2600 + forward * 0.25,
5380:       );
5381:       if (projected == null) {
5382:         continue;
5383:       }
5384:       final starColor = switch (star.tint) {
5385:         0 => const Color(0xFFDDE9FF),
5386:         1 => const Color(0xFFFFE7C2),
5387:         _ => const Color(0xFFB7F6FF),
5388:       };
5389:       final alpha = (star.alpha * (0.55 + projected.scale * 0.25))
5390:           .clamp(0.08, 0.95)
5391:           .toDouble();
5392:       canvas.drawCircle(
5393:         projected.screen,
5394:         (star.radius * (0.8 + projected.scale * 0.55)).clamp(0.6, 2.5),
5395:         Paint()..color = starColor.withValues(alpha: alpha),
5396:       );
5397:       if (!dosSpriteStyle && speedFactor > 0.24) {
5398:         final dir = _normalize(projected.screen - horizonCenter);
5399:         final streakLen = (3 + speedFactor * 12 + projected.scale * 2.4).clamp(
5400:           2.5,
5401:           18.0,
5402:         );
5403:         canvas.drawLine(
5404:           projected.screen - dir * streakLen,
5405:           projected.screen,
5406:           Paint()
5407:             ..color = starColor.withValues(alpha: alpha * 0.5)
5408:             ..strokeWidth = 1.0
5409:             ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
5410:         );
5411:       }
5412:     }
5413:     _drawBackgroundPlanets(
5414:       canvas,
5415:       viewportInner,
5416:       center: center,
5417:       focal: focal,
5418:       sinFacing: sinFacing,
5419:       cosFacing: cosFacing,
5420:     );
5421:     _ProjectedPoint? harvestProjection;
5422:     ResourceNode? harvestResourceNode;
5423: 
5424:     for (final resource in game.resources) {
5425:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5426:         resource.position,
5427:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5428:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5429:       );
5430:       if (view.forward < -220) {
5431:         continue;
5432:       }
5433:       final p = _project3D(
5434:         center: center,
5435:         focal: focal,
5436:         right: view.right,
5437:         up: -170,
5438:         forward: view.forward,
5439:       );
5440:       if (p == null) {
5441:         continue;
5442:       }
5443:       final isHarvestTarget = game.harvestCandidate?.id == resource.id;
5444:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5445:         _drawResourceNodeSprite(
5446:           canvas,
5447:           p.screen,
5448:           resource: resource,
5449:           size: (4 + p.scale * 11).clamp(4.0, 16.0).toDouble(),
5450:           highlighted: isHarvestTarget,
5451:         );
5452:       } else {
5453:         _drawResourceNodeMesh(
5454:           canvas,
5455:           center: center,
5456:           focal: focal,
5457:           resource: resource,
5458:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5459:           yaw: game._clock * 0.4 + resource.id * 0.03,
5460:           lightDir: lightDir,
5461:           highlighted: isHarvestTarget,
5462:         );
5463:       }
5464:       if (isHarvestTarget) {
5465:         harvestProjection = p;
5466:         harvestResourceNode = resource;
5467:       }
5468:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 2400) {
5469:         _drawLabel(
5470:           canvas,
5471:           p.screen + Offset(12 + p.scale * 2, 10 + p.scale * 2),
5472:           resource.name,
5473:           resource.color,
5474:         );
5475:       }
5476:     }
5477: 
5478:     for (final station in game.stations) {
5479:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5480:         station.position,
5481:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5482:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5483:       );
5484:       if (view.forward < -180) {
5485:         continue;
5486:       }
5487:       final p = _project3D(
5488:         center: center,
5489:         focal: focal,
5490:         right: view.right,
5491:         up: -190,
5492:         forward: view.forward,
5493:       );
5494:       if (p == null) {
5495:         continue;
5496:       }
5497:       final fade = (1 - p.depth / _farClip).clamp(0.15, 1.0).toDouble();
5498:       final glowRadius = (16 + p.scale * 10).clamp(10.0, 52.0).toDouble();
5499:       final stationYaw = game._clock * 0.19 + station.id * 0.13;

5501:         _drawStationSprite(

5553:         _drawLabel(
5554:           canvas,
5555:           p.screen + Offset(16 + p.scale * 3, -20 - p.scale * 5),
5556:           station.name,
5557:           station.color,
5558:         );
5559:       }
5560:     }
5561: 
5562:     for (final portal in game.portals) {
5563:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5564:         portal.position,
5565:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5566:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5567:       );
5568:       if (view.forward < -220) {
5569:         continue;
5570:       }
5571:       final p = _project3D(
5572:         center: center,
5573:         focal: focal,
5574:         right: view.right,
5575:         up: -150,
5576:         forward: view.forward,
5577:       );
5578:       if (p == null) {
5579:         continue;
5580:       }
5581:       final isJumpCandidate = game.jumpCandidate?.id == portal.id;
5582:       final pulse = 0.62 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.2 + portal.id) * 0.2;
5583:       final ringRadius = (16 + p.scale * 15).clamp(8.0, 58.0).toDouble();
5584:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5585:         _drawPortalSprite(
5586:           canvas,
5587:           p.screen,
5588:           size: (6 + p.scale * 15).clamp(6.0, 24.0).toDouble(),
5589:           color: portal.color,
5590:         );
5591:       } else {
5592:         canvas.drawCircle(
5593:           p.screen,
5594:           ringRadius * 2.0,
5595:           Paint()
5596:             ..color = portal.color.withValues(alpha: 0.1 * pulse)
5597:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 9),
5598:         );
5599:         _drawMesh(
5600:           canvas,
5601:           center: center,
5602:           focal: focal,
5603:           mesh: _portalMesh,
5604:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -150, view.forward),
5605:           yaw: game._clock * 0.7 + portal.id * 0.03,
5606:           baseColor: Color.lerp(portal.color, const Color(0xFF5C7CA2), 0.46)!,
5607:           lightDir: lightDir,
5608:           ambient: 0.2,
5609:           emissiveBoost: 0.14,
5610:           edgeAlpha: 0.2,
5611:         );
5612:       }
5613:       if (isJumpCandidate) {
5614:         canvas.drawCircle(
5615:           p.screen,
5616:           ringRadius * 1.95,
5617:           Paint()
5618:             ..color = const Color(0xFFA78BFA).withValues(alpha: 0.36)
5619:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5620:             ..strokeWidth = 2,
5621:         );
5622:       }
5623:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 3200) {
5624:         _drawLabel(
5625:           canvas,
5626:           p.screen + Offset(18 + p.scale * 2.5, 10 + p.scale * 3.5),
5627:           portal.name,
5628:           portal.color,
5629:         );
5630:       }
5631:     }
5632: 
5633:     for (final blast in game.blasts) {
5634:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5635:         blast.position,
5636:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5637:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5638:       );
5639:       if (view.forward < -180) {
5640:         continue;
5641:       }
5642:       final p = _project3D(
5643:         center: center,
5644:         focal: focal,
5645:         right: view.right,
5646:         up: -170,
5647:         forward: view.forward,
5648:       );
5649:       if (p == null) {
5650:         continue;
5651:       }
5652:       final t = (blast.ttl / 0.45).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
5653:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5654:         canvas.drawCircle(
5655:           p.screen,
5656:           (blast.radius * (1.0 - t) * p.scale).clamp(1.0, 16.0),
5657:           Paint()
5658:             ..isAntiAlias = false
5659:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFFB454).withValues(alpha: 0.52 * t),
5660:         );
5661:         continue;
5662:       }
5663:       _drawMesh(
5664:         canvas,
5665:         center: center,
5666:         focal: focal,
5667:         mesh: _blastMesh,
5668:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5669:         yaw: game._clock * 1.2 + blast.radius * 0.01,
5670:         baseColor: const Color(0xFFFFA04A),
5671:         lightDir: lightDir,
5672:         ambient: 0.26,
5673:         emissiveBoost: 0.46 * t,
5674:         edgeAlpha: 0.0,
5675:         scale: (0.22 + blast.radius * 0.012) * (1.3 - t),
5676:       );
5677:       canvas.drawCircle(
5678:         p.screen,
5679:         (blast.radius * (1.2 - t) * p.scale).clamp(2.0, 84.0),
5680:         Paint()
5681:           ..color = const Color(0xFFFFB454).withValues(alpha: t * 0.4)
5682:           ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5683:           ..strokeWidth = 2,
5684:       );
5685:     }
5686:

5689:         canvas,

5693:       );
5694:     } else {

5696:         canvas,

5698:         facing: game.playerFacing,
5699:       );
5700:     }
5701: 
5702:     for (final shot in game.projectiles) {
5703:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5704:         shot.position,
5705:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5706:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5707:       );
5708:       if (view.forward < -160) {
5709:         continue;
5710:       }
5711:       final p = _project3D(
5712:         center: center,
5713:         focal: focal,
5714:         right: view.right,
5715:         up: -170,
5716:         forward: view.forward,
5717:       );
5718:       if (p == null) {
5719:         continue;
5720:       }
5721:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5722:         final color = shot.friendly
5723:             ? const Color(0xFF60A5FA)
5724:             : const Color(0xFFF87171);
5725:         canvas.drawRect(
5726:           Rect.fromCenter(center: p.screen, width: 2.2, height: 2.2),
5727:           Paint()
5728:             ..isAntiAlias = false
5729:             ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.92),
5730:         );
5731:         continue;
5732:       }
5733:       final shotYaw = math.atan2(shot.velocity.dx, shot.velocity.dy);
5734:       _drawMesh(
5735:         canvas,
5736:         center: center,
5737:         focal: focal,
5738:         mesh: _projectileMesh,
5739:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5740:         yaw: shotYaw,
5741:         baseColor: shot.friendly
5742:             ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8)
5743:             : const Color(0xFFFF8A80),
5744:         lightDir: lightDir,
5745:         ambient: 0.22,
5746:         emissiveBoost: 0.9,
5747:         edgeAlpha: 0.0,
5748:         scale: 0.28,
5749:       );
5750:       final radius = (p.scale * 2.3).clamp(1.2, 5.2).toDouble();
5751:       final tailView = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5752:         shot.position - shot.velocity * 0.028,
5753:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5754:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5755:       );
5756:       final tail = _project3D(
5757:         center: center,
5758:         focal: focal,
5759:         right: tailView.right,
5760:         up: -170,
5761:         forward: tailView.forward,
5762:       );
5763:       if (tail != null) {
5764:         canvas.drawLine(
5765:           tail.screen,
5766:           p.screen,
5767:           Paint()
5768:             ..color =
5769:                 (shot.friendly
5770:                         ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8)
5771:                         : const Color(0xFFFF8A80))
5772:                     .withValues(alpha: 0.42)
5773:             ..strokeWidth = radius * 0.85
5774:             ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
5775:         );
5776:       }
5777:       canvas.drawCircle(
5778:         p.screen,
5779:         radius,
5780:         Paint()
5781:           ..color = shot.friendly
5782:               ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8).withValues(alpha: 0.9)
5783:               : const Color(0xFFFF8A80).withValues(alpha: 0.9),
5784:       );
5785:     }
5786: 
5787:     for (final pirate in game.pirates) {
5788:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5789:         pirate.position,
5790:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5791:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5792:       );
5793:       if (view.forward < -240) {
5794:         continue;
5795:       }
5796:       final p = _project3D(
5797:         center: center,
5798:         focal: focal,
5799:         right: view.right,
5800:         up: -155,
5801:         forward: view.forward,
5802:       );
5803:       if (p == null) {
5804:         continue;
5805:       }
5806:       final isTracked = game.trackedPirateId == pirate.trackingId;
5807:       final distance = (pirate.position - game.playerPosition).distance;
5808:       final isOnScreen =
5809:           p.screen.dx >= viewportInner.left + 6 &&
5810:           p.screen.dx <= viewportInner.right - 6 &&
5811:           p.screen.dy >= viewportInner.top + 6 &&
5812:           p.screen.dy <= viewportInner.bottom - 6;
5813:       if (!isOnScreen && distance < 2200) {
5814:         offscreenThreatDirections.add(_normalize(p.screen - reticleCenter));
5815:       }
5816:       final targetScore = (p.screen - reticleCenter).distance + p.depth * 0.05;
5817:       if (isTracked ||
5818:           (isOnScreen &&
5819:               (targetSnapshot == null ||
5820:                   (!targetSnapshot.isTracked &&
5821:                       targetScore < targetSnapshot.score)))) {
5822:         targetSnapshot = _TargetSnapshot(
5823:           pirate: pirate,
5824:           projection: p,
5825:           score: targetScore,
5826:           distance: distance,
5827:           isTracked: isTracked,
5828:           isOnScreen: isOnScreen,
5829:         );
5830:       }
5831:       final relYaw = pirate.angle - game.playerFacing - math.pi / 2;
5832:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5833:         _drawPirateSprite(
5834:           canvas,
5835:           p.screen,
5836:           size: (5 + p.scale * 15).clamp(5.0, 24.0).toDouble(),
5837:           tracked: isTracked,
5838:           yaw: relYaw,
5839:         );
5840:       } else {
5841:         _drawMesh(
5842:           canvas,
5843:           center: center,
5844:           focal: focal,
5845:           mesh: _pirateMesh,
5846:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -155, view.forward),
5847:           yaw: relYaw,
5848:           baseColor: isTracked
5849:               ? const Color(0xFFDCC56B)
5850:               : const Color(0xFF5EA0E9),
5851:           lightDir: lightDir,
5852:           ambient: 0.24,
5853:           emissiveBoost: 0.02,
5854:           edgeAlpha: 0.2,
5855:         );
5856:       }
5857:       if (isOnScreen) {
5858:         final outlineRadius = (8.6 + p.scale * 7.2).clamp(7.0, 24.0);
5859:         final outlineColor = isTracked
5860:             ? const Color(0xFFFDE68A)
5861:             : const Color(0xFFF87171);
5862:         canvas.drawCircle(
5863:           p.screen,
5864:           outlineRadius,
5865:           Paint()
5866:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5867:             ..strokeWidth = isTracked ? 1.35 : 1.0
5868:             ..color = outlineColor.withValues(alpha: isTracked ? 0.72 : 0.52),
5869:         );
5870:       }
5871: 
5872:       final shieldPct = (pirate.shield / 35).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
5873:       if (shieldPct > 0) {
5874:         canvas.drawCircle(
5875:           p.screen,
5876:           (11 + p.scale * 8).clamp(7.0, 30.0),
5877:           Paint()
5878:             ..color = const Color(
5879:               0xFF93C5FD,
5880:             ).withValues(alpha: 0.15 + shieldPct * 0.18)
5881:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5882:             ..strokeWidth = 1.5,
5883:         );
5884:       }
5885: 
5886:       if (isTracked) {
5887:         final dotCenter =
5888:             p.screen + Offset(-11 - p.scale * 2, -11 - p.scale * 2);
5889:         canvas.drawCircle(
5890:           dotCenter,
5891:           (2.2 + p.scale * 0.9).clamp(2.0, 4.0),
5892:           Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF4ADE80).withValues(alpha: 0.95),
5893:         );
5894:         canvas.drawCircle(
5895:           dotCenter,
5896:           (4.4 + p.scale * 1.4).clamp(3.2, 8.0),
5897:           Paint()
5898:             ..color = const Color(0xFF4ADE80).withValues(alpha: 0.26)
5899:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5900:             ..strokeWidth = 1,
5901:         );
5902:       }
5903: 
5904:       final thruster = _projectLocalPoint(
5905:         center: center,
5906:         focal: focal,
5907:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -155, view.forward),
5908:         yaw: relYaw,
5909:         local: const _Vec3(0, 1.4, -24),
5910:       );
5911:       if (thruster != null) {
5912:         final glow = (2.8 + p.scale * 4.4).clamp(2.0, 12.0).toDouble();
5913:         canvas.drawCircle(
5914:           thruster.screen,
5915:           glow,
5916:           Paint()
5917:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFFAFA6).withValues(alpha: 0.38)
5918:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 6),
5919:         );
5920:       }
5921:     }
5922: 
5923:     if (game.dockCandidate != null) {
5924:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5925:         game.dockCandidate!.position,
5926:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5927:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5928:       );
5929:       final stationScreen = _project3D(
5930:         center: center,
5931:         focal: focal,
5932:         right: view.right,
5933:         up: -190,
5934:         forward: view.forward,
5935:       );
5936:       if (stationScreen != null) {
5937:         canvas.drawLine(
5938:           reticleCenter,
5939:           stationScreen.screen,

5941:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFBBF24).withValues(alpha: 0.46)
5942:             ..strokeWidth = 1.6,
5943:         );
5944:         _drawReticle(
5945:           canvas,
5946:           stationScreen.screen,
5947:           const Color(0xFFFBBF24),

5949:         );
5950:       }
5951:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5952:         _drawLabel(
5953:           canvas,
5954:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 18),
5955:           'Press E to dock',
5956:           const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
5957:         );
5958:       }
5959:     }
5960: 
5961:     if (game.jumpCandidate != null) {
5962:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5963:         game.jumpCandidate!.position,
5964:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5965:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5966:       );
5967:       final portalScreen = _project3D(
5968:         center: center,
5969:         focal: focal,
5970:         right: view.right,
5971:         up: -150,
5972:         forward: view.forward,
5973:       );
5974:       if (portalScreen != null) {
5975:         canvas.drawLine(
5976:           reticleCenter,
5977:           portalScreen.screen,
5978:           Paint()

5980:             ..strokeWidth = 1.4,
5981:         );
5982:         _drawReticle(
5983:           canvas,
5984:           portalScreen.screen,
5985:           const Color(0xFFA78BFA),

5987:         );
5988:       }
5989:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5990:         _drawLabel(
5991:           canvas,

5994:           const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
5995:         );
5996:       }
5997:     }
5998: 
5999:     if (harvestProjection != null && harvestResourceNode != null) {

6001:         canvas,

6015: 
6016:     _drawCombatOverlays(
6017:       canvas,

6020:       focal: focal,
6021:       sinFacing: sinFacing,
6022:       cosFacing: cosFacing,
6023:       reticleCenter: reticleCenter,
6024:       target: targetSnapshot,

6026:     );
6027:     if (dosSpriteStyle) {
6028:       _drawDosCrtOverlay(canvas, viewportInner);
6029:     } else {
6030:       _drawPostProcessing(canvas, viewportInner, speedFactor: speedFactor);
6031:     }
6032:     canvas.restore();

6034:       _drawScienceScanOverlay(canvas, viewportInner, targetSnapshot);
6035:     }
