90: }
91: 
92: // Owns the simulation loop, input mapping, save/load controls, and the
93: // responsive shell that wraps the fixed cockpit renderer.
94: class _VanSoleHomePageState extends State<VanSoleHomePage>
95:     with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
96:   late VanSoleGame _game;
97:   late final Ticker _ticker;
98:   final FocusNode _focusNode = FocusNode(debugLabel: 'sector-view');
99:   final Set<LogicalKeyboardKey> _pressedKeys = <LogicalKeyboardKey>{};
100:   final Set<VirtualAction> _touchActions = <VirtualAction>{};
101:   final TextEditingController _saveCodeController = TextEditingController();
102:   Duration? _lastTick;
103:   int _lastAudioCueSerial = 0;
104:   String _saveStatus = 'No save exported yet.';
105:   String? _quickSaveCode;
106:   SessionMode _sessionMode = SessionMode.title;
107: 
108:   @override
109:   void initState() {
110:     super.initState();
111:     _game = VanSoleGame();
112:     _ticker = createTicker(_onTick)..start();
113:   }
114: 
115:   @override
116:   void dispose() {
117:     _ticker.dispose();
118:     _focusNode.dispose();
119:     _saveCodeController.dispose();
120:     super.dispose();
121:   }
122: 
123:   void _onTick(Duration timestamp) {
124:     final last = _lastTick;
125:     _lastTick = timestamp;
126:     if (last == null || !mounted) {
127:       return;
128:     }
129:     final dt = ((timestamp - last).inMicroseconds / 1000000.0)
130:         .clamp(0.0, 0.05)
131:         .toDouble();
132:     if (dt <= 0) {
133:       return;
134:     }
135:     setState(() {
136:       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) {
137:         _game.update(dt, _currentInput());
138:       }
139:       _drainAudioCue();
140:     });
141:   }
142: 
143:   void _drainAudioCue() {
144:     if (_game.audioCueSerial == _lastAudioCueSerial) {
145:       return;
146:     }
147:     _lastAudioCueSerial = _game.audioCueSerial;
148:     final cue = _game.lastAudioCue;
149:     if (cue == null) {
150:       return;
151:     }
152:     switch (cue) {
153:       case GameAudioCue.fire:
154:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.click);
155:         HapticFeedback.lightImpact();
156:         break;
157:       case GameAudioCue.contract:
158:       case GameAudioCue.comms:
159:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.click);
160:         HapticFeedback.selectionClick();
161:         break;
162:       case GameAudioCue.hit:
163:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.alert);
164:         HapticFeedback.mediumImpact();
165:         break;
166:       case GameAudioCue.warning:
167:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.alert);
168:         HapticFeedback.selectionClick();
169:         break;
170:       case GameAudioCue.dock:
171:       case GameAudioCue.jump:
172:         SystemSound.play(SystemSoundType.click);
173:         HapticFeedback.mediumImpact();
174:         break;
175:     }
176:   }
177: 
178:   void _mutateGame(VoidCallback mutate) {
179:     setState(() {
180:       mutate();
181:       _drainAudioCue();
182:     });
183:   }
184: 
185:   void _startNewCampaign() {
186:     setState(() {
187:       _game = VanSoleGame();
188:       _lastAudioCueSerial = 0;
189:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.playing;
190:       _pressedKeys.clear();
191:       _touchActions.clear();
192:       _saveStatus = 'New campaign started.';
193:     });
194:     WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
195:       if (mounted) {
196:         _focusNode.requestFocus();
197:       }
198:     });
199:   }
200: 
201:   void _resumePlay() {
202:     setState(() {
203:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.playing;
204:       _pressedKeys.clear();
205:       _touchActions.clear();
206:     });
207:     WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
208:       if (mounted) {
209:         _focusNode.requestFocus();
210:       }
211:     });
212:   }
213: 
214:   void _pausePlay() {
215:     setState(() {
216:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.paused;
217:       _pressedKeys.clear();
218:       _touchActions.clear();
219:     });
220:   }
221: 
222:   void _returnToTitle() {
223:     setState(() {
224:       _sessionMode = SessionMode.title;
225:       _pressedKeys.clear();
226:       _touchActions.clear();
227:     });
228:   }
229: 
230:   Future<void> _copySaveCode() async {
231:     final code = _game.exportSaveCode();
232:     _saveCodeController.text = code;
233:     _quickSaveCode = code;
234:     await Clipboard.setData(ClipboardData(text: code));
235:     if (!mounted) {
236:       return;
237:     }
238:     setState(() {
239:       _saveStatus =
240:           'Save code copied (${code.length} chars). Quick slot updated.';
241:     });
242:   }
243: 
244:   Future<void> _pasteSaveCode() async {
245:     final data = await Clipboard.getData(Clipboard.kTextPlain);
246:     if (!mounted) {
247:       return;
248:     }
249:     setState(() {
250:       _saveCodeController.text = data?.text ?? '';
251:       _saveStatus = _saveCodeController.text.isEmpty
252:           ? 'Clipboard was empty.'
253:           : 'Pasted save code from clipboard.';
254:     });
255:   }
256: 
257:   void _loadFromSaveField() {
258:     final raw = _saveCodeController.text.trim();
259:     if (raw.isEmpty) {
260:       setState(() {
261:         _saveStatus = 'Paste or export a save code first.';
262:       });
263:       return;
264:     }
265:     try {
266:       _mutateGame(() => _game.importSaveCode(raw));
267:       setState(() {
268:         _saveStatus = 'Save loaded successfully.';
269:       });
270:     } catch (error) {
271:       setState(() {
272:         _saveStatus = 'Load failed: $error';
273:       });
274:     }
275:   }
276: 
277:   void _quickSave() {
278:     final code = _game.exportSaveCode();
279:     _quickSaveCode = code;
280:     setState(() {
281:       _saveStatus = 'Quick save slot updated.';
282:       _saveCodeController.text = code;
283:     });
284:   }
285: 
286:   void _quickLoad() {
287:     final code = _quickSaveCode;
288:     if (code == null) {
289:       setState(() {
290:         _saveStatus = 'Quick save slot is empty.';
291:       });
292:       return;
293:     }
294:     try {
295:       _mutateGame(() => _game.importSaveCode(code));
296:       setState(() {
297:         _saveStatus = 'Quick save loaded.';
298:         _saveCodeController.text = code;
299:         _sessionMode = SessionMode.playing;
300:       });
301:       WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
302:         if (mounted) {
303:           _focusNode.requestFocus();
304:         }
305:       });
306:     } catch (error) {
307:       setState(() {
308:         _saveStatus = 'Quick load failed: $error';
309:       });
310:     }
311:   }
312: 
313:   PlayerInput _currentInput() {
314:     if (_sessionMode != SessionMode.playing) {
315:       return const PlayerInput(
316:         up: false,
317:         down: false,
318:         left: false,
319:         right: false,
320:         fire: false,
321:         boost: false,
322:       );
323:     }
324:     bool hasAny(Set<LogicalKeyboardKey> keys) =>
325:         keys.any((key) => _pressedKeys.contains(key));
326: 
327:     return PlayerInput(
328:       up:
329:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyW, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowUp}) ||
330:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.up),
331:       down:
332:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyS, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowDown}) ||
333:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.down),
334:       left:
335:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyA, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowLeft}) ||
336:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.left),
337:       right:
338:           hasAny({LogicalKeyboardKey.keyD, LogicalKeyboardKey.arrowRight}) ||
339:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.right),
340:       fire:
341:           _pressedKeys.contains(LogicalKeyboardKey.space) ||
342:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.fire),
343:       boost:
344:           _pressedKeys.contains(LogicalKeyboardKey.shiftLeft) ||
345:           _pressedKeys.contains(LogicalKeyboardKey.shiftRight) ||
346:           _touchActions.contains(VirtualAction.boost),
347:     );
348:   }
349: 
350:   KeyEventResult _handleKeyEvent(FocusNode node, KeyEvent event) {
351:     final key = event.logicalKey;
352: 
353:     if (event is KeyDownEvent || event is KeyRepeatEvent) {
354:       _pressedKeys.add(key);
355:     } else if (event is KeyUpEvent) {
356:       _pressedKeys.remove(key);
357:     }
358: 
359:     if (event is KeyDownEvent) {
360:       if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.escape) {
361:         if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) {
362:           _pausePlay();
363:         } else if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.paused) {
364:           _resumePlay();
365:         }
366:         return KeyEventResult.handled;
367:       }
368:       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.title) {
369:         if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.enter ||
370:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.numpadEnter ||
371:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.space) {
372:           _startNewCampaign();
373:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyL) {
374:           _quickLoad();
375:         }
376:         return KeyEventResult.handled;
377:       }
378:       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.paused) {
379:         if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.enter ||
380:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.numpadEnter ||
381:             key == LogicalKeyboardKey.space) {
382:           _resumePlay();
383:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyQ) {
384:           _returnToTitle();
385:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyK) {
386:           _quickSave();
387:         } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyL) {
388:           _quickLoad();
389:         }
390:         return KeyEventResult.handled;
391:       }
392:       if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyE) {
393:         _mutateGame(_game.toggleDocking);
394:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyF) {
395:         _mutateGame(_game.tryAcceptDockContract);
396:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyR) {
397:         _mutateGame(_game.tryDeliverDockContract);
398:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyJ) {
399:         _mutateGame(_game.attemptJump);
400:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyT) {
401:         _mutateGame(_game.cycleTracking);
402:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyC) {
403:         _mutateGame(_game.requestComms);
404:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.keyH) {
405:         _mutateGame(_game.harvestResource);
406:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit1) {
407:         _mutateGame(() {
408:           if (_game.activeEncounter != null) {
409:             _game.chooseDialogueOption(0);
410:           } else {
411:             _game.setCockpitMode(1);
412:           }
413:         });
414:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit2) {
415:         _mutateGame(() {
416:           if (_game.activeEncounter != null) {
417:             _game.chooseDialogueOption(1);
418:           } else {
419:             _game.setCockpitMode(2);
420:           }
421:         });
422:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit3) {
423:         _mutateGame(() {
424:           if (_game.activeEncounter != null) {
425:             _game.chooseDialogueOption(2);
426:           } else {
427:             _game.setCockpitMode(3);
428:           }
429:         });
430:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit4) {
431:         _mutateGame(() => _game.setCockpitMode(4));
432:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit5) {
433:         _mutateGame(() => _game.setCockpitMode(5));
434:       } else if (key == LogicalKeyboardKey.digit6) {
435:         _mutateGame(() => _game.setCockpitMode(6));
436:       }
437:     }
438: 
439:     return KeyEventResult.handled;
440:   }
441: 
442:   void _setTouchAction(VirtualAction action, bool active) {
443:     setState(() {
444:       if (active) {
445:         _touchActions.add(action);
446:       } else {
447:         _touchActions.remove(action);
448:       }
449:     });
450:   }
451: 
452:   String _objectiveLabel() {
453:     final mission = _game.activeCampaignMission;
454:     if (mission == null) {
455:       return 'Campaign complete. Free-roam contracts and combat are active.';
456:     }
457:     return 'Objective: ${mission.title} (${_game.campaignProgressText})';
458:   }
459: 
460:   Widget _buildSessionOverlay(ColorScheme colors) {
461:     if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) {
462:       return const SizedBox.shrink();
463:     }
464:     final title = _sessionMode == SessionMode.title ? 'VAN SOLÈ' : 'PAUSED';
465:     final subtitle = _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
466:         ? 'Cross-platform spacefaring action RPG'
467:         : 'Press Esc to resume flight controls';
468:     return Positioned.fill(
469:       child: ColoredBox(
470:         color: Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.72),
471:         child: Center(
472:           child: SingleChildScrollView(
473:             padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
474:             child: ConstrainedBox(
475:               constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 560),
476:               child: DecoratedBox(
477:                 decoration: BoxDecoration(
478:                   color: const Color(0xFF05070D),
479:                   borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
480:                   border: Border.all(
481:                     color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
482:                   ),
483:                 ),
484:                 child: Padding(
485:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.all(18),
486:                   child: Column(
487:                     mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
488:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
489:                     children: [
490:                       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.title)
491:                         Container(
492:                           height: 180,
493:                           decoration: BoxDecoration(
494:                             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),
495:                             gradient: const LinearGradient(
496:                               begin: Alignment.topCenter,
497:                               end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
498:                               colors: [Color(0xFF10223A), Color(0xFF04080D)],
499:                             ),
500:                             border: Border.all(
501:                               color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.25),
502:                             ),
503:                           ),
504:                           child: Center(
505:                             child: Text(
506:                               'VAN SOLÈ',
507:                               textAlign: TextAlign.center,
508:                               style: TextStyle(
509:                                 color: colors.secondary,
510:                                 fontSize: 34,
511:                                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
512:                                 letterSpacing: 2.4,
513:                                 fontFamilyFallback: const [
514:                                   'Menlo',
515:                                   'Monaco',
516:                                   'Courier New',
517:                                 ],
518:                               ),
519:                             ),
520:                           ),
521:                         ),
522:                       if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.title)
523:                         const SizedBox(height: 12),
524:                       Text(
525:                         title,
526:                         textAlign: TextAlign.center,
527:                         style: const TextStyle(
528:                           fontSize: 22,
529:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
530:                           letterSpacing: 1.1,
531:                           fontFamilyFallback: [
532:                             'Menlo',
533:                             'Monaco',
534:                             'Courier New',
535:                           ],
536:                         ),
537:                       ),
538:                       const SizedBox(height: 6),
539:                       Text(
540:                         subtitle,
541:                         textAlign: TextAlign.center,
542:                         style: const TextStyle(
543:                           color: Colors.white70,
544:                           fontFamilyFallback: [
545:                             'Menlo',
546:                             'Monaco',
547:                             'Courier New',
548:                           ],
549:                         ),
550:                       ),
551:                       const SizedBox(height: 14),
552:                       Text(
553:                         _objectiveLabel(),
554:                         style: TextStyle(
555:                           color: colors.secondary,
556:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
557:                         ),
558:                       ),
559:                       const SizedBox(height: 12),
560:                       Wrap(
561:                         spacing: 8,
562:                         runSpacing: 8,
563:                         children: [
564:                           _withTooltip(
565:                             _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
566:                                 ? 'Start a new campaign.'
567:                                 : 'Return to the live flight view.',
568:                             FilledButton.tonal(
569:                               key: const Key('start-campaign-button'),
570:                               onPressed: _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
571:                                   ? _startNewCampaign
572:                                   : _resumePlay,
573:                               child: Text(
574:                                 _sessionMode == SessionMode.title
575:                                     ? 'Start Campaign'
576:                                     : 'Resume (Esc)',
577:                               ),
578:                             ),
579:                           ),
580:                           _withTooltip(
581:                             'Load the current quick-save slot.',
582:                             OutlinedButton(
583:                               onPressed: _quickSaveCode == null
584:                                   ? null
585:                                   : _quickLoad,
586:                               child: const Text('Load Quick Save (L)'),
587:                             ),
588:                           ),
589:                           _withTooltip(
590:                             'Write the current run into the quick-save slot.',
591:                             OutlinedButton(
592:                               onPressed: _quickSave,
593:                               child: const Text('Quick Save (K)'),
594:                             ),
595:                           ),
596:                           if (_sessionMode == SessionMode.paused)
597:                             _withTooltip(
598:                               'Leave the current session and go back to the title screen.',
599:                               OutlinedButton(
600:                                 onPressed: _returnToTitle,
601:                                 child: const Text('Return to Title (Q)'),
602:                               ),
603:                             ),
604:                         ],
605:                       ),
606:                       const SizedBox(height: 10),
607:                       const Text(
608:                         'Controls: WASD/Arrows thrust, Space fire, Shift boost, T track, C comms, H harvest, E dock, J jump, F/R contract, 1-6 panel modes.',
609:                         style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white60, fontSize: 12),
610:                       ),
611:                       const SizedBox(height: 6),
612:                       Text(
613:                         'Release v$_releaseVersion  |  Support: buymeacoffee.com/einnovoeg',
614:                         textAlign: TextAlign.center,
615:                         style: const TextStyle(
616:                           color: Colors.white38,
617:                           fontSize: 11,
618:                         ),
619:                       ),
620:                     ],
621:                   ),
622:                 ),
623:               ),
624:             ),
625:           ),
626:         ),
627:       ),
628:     );
629:   }

631:   Widget _buildGamePane(BuildContext context, bool compact) {
632:     final colors = Theme.of(context).colorScheme;
633:     final immersivePlay = _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing;
634:     return Padding(
635:       padding: EdgeInsets.all(immersivePlay ? 0 : 12),
636:       child: Column(
637:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
638:         children: [
639:           if (!immersivePlay && compact)
640:             Column(
641:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
642:               children: [
643:                 Text(
644:                   'Van Solè',
645:                   style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
646:                 ),
647:                 const SizedBox(height: 2),
648:                 Text(
649:                   'Spacefaring action RPG',
650:                   style: Theme.of(
651:                     context,
652:                   ).textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(color: Colors.white70),
653:                 ),
654:                 const SizedBox(height: 8),
655:                 Wrap(
656:                   spacing: 8,
657:                   runSpacing: 8,
658:                   children: [
659:                     Container(
660:                       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
661:                         horizontal: 14,
662:                         vertical: 8,
663:                       ),
664:                       decoration: BoxDecoration(
665:                         color: colors.surface.withValues(alpha: 0.8),
666:                         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
667:                         border: Border.all(
668:                           color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
669:                         ),
670:                       ),
671:                       child: Text(
672:                         'Sector: ${_game.sectorName}',
673:                         style: TextStyle(
674:                           color: colors.primary,
675:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
676:                         ),
677:                       ),
678:                     ),
679:                     Container(
680:                       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
681:                         horizontal: 10,
682:                         vertical: 6,
683:                       ),
684:                       decoration: BoxDecoration(
685:                         color: const Color(0xFF111D2A),
686:                         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
687:                         border: Border.all(
688:                           color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.15),
689:                         ),
690:                       ),
691:                       child: Text(
692:                         'MODE ${_sessionMode.name.toUpperCase()}',
693:                         style: TextStyle(
694:                           color: _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing
695:                               ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
696:                               : const Color(0xFFE5D089),
697:                           fontSize: 12,
698:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
699:                         ),
700:                       ),
701:                     ),
702:                   ],
703:                 ),
704:               ],
705:             )
706:           else if (!immersivePlay)
707:             Row(
708:               children: [
709:                 Expanded(
710:                   child: Column(
711:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
712:                     children: [
713:                       Text(
714:                         'Van Solè',
715:                         style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
716:                       ),
717:                       const SizedBox(height: 2),
718:                       Text(
719:                         'Campaign-driven exploration, trading, combat, and ship management',
720:                         style: Theme.of(
721:                           context,
722:                         ).textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(color: Colors.white70),
723:                       ),
724:                     ],
725:                   ),
726:                 ),
727:                 Container(
728:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
729:                     horizontal: 14,
730:                     vertical: 8,
731:                   ),
732:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
733:                     color: colors.surface.withValues(alpha: 0.8),
734:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
735:                     border: Border.all(
736:                       color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
737:                     ),
738:                   ),
739:                   child: Text(
740:                     'Sector: ${_game.sectorName}',
741:                     style: TextStyle(
742:                       color: colors.primary,
743:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
744:                     ),
745:                   ),
746:                 ),
747:                 const SizedBox(width: 8),
748:                 Container(
749:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
750:                     horizontal: 10,
751:                     vertical: 6,
752:                   ),
753:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
754:                     color: const Color(0xFF111D2A),
755:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
756:                     border: Border.all(
757:                       color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.15),
758:                     ),
759:                   ),
760:                   child: Text(
761:                     'MODE ${_sessionMode.name.toUpperCase()}',
762:                     style: TextStyle(
763:                       color: _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing
764:                           ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
765:                           : const Color(0xFFE5D089),
766:                       fontSize: 12,
767:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
768:                     ),
769:                   ),
770:                 ),
771:                 const SizedBox(width: 10),
772:               ],
773:             ),
774:           if (!immersivePlay) const SizedBox(height: 12),
775:           Expanded(
776:             child: DecoratedBox(
777:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
778:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(immersivePlay ? 0 : 20),
779:                 border: immersivePlay
780:                     ? null
781:                     : Border.all(color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.18)),
782:                 boxShadow: immersivePlay
783:                     ? null
784:                     : [
785:                         BoxShadow(
786:                           color: Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
787:                           blurRadius: 20,
788:                           offset: const Offset(0, 10),
789:                         ),
790:                       ],
791:                 gradient: immersivePlay
792:                     ? const LinearGradient(
793:                         begin: Alignment.topCenter,
794:                         end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
795:                         colors: [Color(0xFF000000), Color(0xFF03070D)],
796:                       )
797:                     : const LinearGradient(
798:                         begin: Alignment.topLeft,
799:                         end: Alignment.bottomRight,
800:                         colors: [Color(0xFF0B1017), Color(0xFF08121D)],
801:                       ),
802:               ),
803:               child: ClipRRect(
804:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(immersivePlay ? 0 : 20),
805:                 child: Stack(
806:                   children: [
807:                     Positioned.fill(
808:                       child: Focus(
809:                         autofocus: true,
810:                         focusNode: _focusNode,
811:                         onKeyEvent: _handleKeyEvent,
812:                         child: GestureDetector(
813:                           onTap: () => _focusNode.requestFocus(),
814:                           child: _CockpitSurface(
815:                             key: const Key('flight-surface'),
816:                             game: _game,
817:                           ),
818:                         ),
819:                       ),
820:                     ),
821:                     if (!immersivePlay)
822:                       Positioned(
823:                         top: 12,
824:                         left: 12,
825:                         right: 12,
826:                         child: Wrap(
827:                           alignment: WrapAlignment.spaceBetween,
828:                           runSpacing: 8,
829:                           spacing: 8,
830:                           children: [
831:                             _Pill(
832:                               label: _game.isDocked
833:                                   ? 'Docked at ${_game.dockedStation!.name}'
834:                                   : _game.dockCandidate != null
835:                                   ? 'Docking window open (${_game.dockCandidate!.name})'
836:                                   : 'In flight',
837:                               color: _game.isDocked
838:                                   ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
839:                                   : (_game.dockCandidate != null
840:                                         ? const Color(0xFFFBBF24)
841:                                         : const Color(0xFF93C5FD)),
842:                             ),
843:                             _Pill(
844:                               label: _objectiveLabel(),
845:                               color: const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
846:                               muted: true,
847:                             ),
848:                             _Pill(
849:                               label:
850:                                   'TRACKING [T] | COMM [C] | THRUST WASD | FIRE SPACE | BOOST SHIFT | DOCK E | JUMP J | PAUSE ESC',
851:                               color: const Color(0xFFCBD5E1),
852:                               muted: true,
853:                             ),
854:                             if (_game.jumpCandidate != null)
855:                               _Pill(
856:                                 label:
857:                                     'Jump gate ready: ${_game.jumpCandidate!.name} (press J)',
858:                                 color: const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
859:                               ),
860:                           ],
861:                         ),
862:                       ),
863:                     if (compact && _sessionMode == SessionMode.playing) ...[
864:                       Positioned(
865:                         left: 12,
866:                         right: 12,
867:                         bottom: 12,
868:                         child: _TouchControls(
869:                           onDockTap: () => _mutateGame(_game.toggleDocking),
870:                           onJumpTap: () => _mutateGame(_game.attemptJump),
871:                           onAction: _setTouchAction,
872:                         ),
873:                       ),
874:                     ],
875:                     _buildSessionOverlay(colors),
876:                   ],
877:                 ),
878:               ),
879:             ),
880:           ),
881:         ],
882:       ),
883:     );
884:   }
885: 
886:   Widget _buildHudPane(BuildContext context, bool compact) {
887:     final colors = Theme.of(context).colorScheme;
888:     final cards = <Widget>[
889:       _HudCard(
890:         title: 'CONTROL PANEL',
891:         trailing: Text(
892:           'Threat ${_game.pirates.length}',
893:           style: TextStyle(
894:             color: colors.secondary,
895:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
896:           ),
897:         ),
898:         child: Column(
899:           children: [
900:             _MeterRow(
901:               label: 'HULL',
902:               value: _game.playerHull / 100,
903:               text: _pct(_game.playerHull),
904:               color: const Color(0xFFF87171),
905:             ),
906:             _MeterRow(
907:               label: 'SHIELD',
908:               value: _game.playerShield / _game.shieldCapacity,
909:               text:
910:                   '${_game.playerShield.round()}/${_game.shieldCapacity.round()}',
911:               color: const Color(0xFF60A5FA),
912:             ),
913:             _MeterRow(
914:               label: 'ENERGY',
915:               value: _game.playerEnergy / 100,
916:               text: _pct(_game.playerEnergy),
917:               color: const Color(0xFF34D399),
918:             ),
919:             _MeterRow(
920:               label: 'FUEL',
921:               value: _game.playerFuel / 100,
922:               text: _pct(_game.playerFuel),

1536: String _distanceKm(double worldUnits) {
1537:   final km = worldUnits / 100.0;

1540:   }
1541:   return '${km.toStringAsFixed(1)} km';
1542: }
1543: 
1544: Widget _withTooltip(String message, Widget child) {
1545:   return Tooltip(message: message, child: child);
1546: }
1547: 
1548: 
1549: class _TouchControls extends StatelessWidget {
1550:   const _TouchControls({
1551:     required this.onAction,
1552:     required this.onDockTap,
1553:     required this.onJumpTap,
1554:   });
1555: 
1556:   final void Function(VirtualAction action, bool active) onAction;
1557:   final VoidCallback onDockTap;
1558:   final VoidCallback onJumpTap;
1559: 
1560:   Widget _holdButton({
1561:     required IconData icon,
1562:     required String label,
1563:     required String tooltip,
1564:     required VoidCallback onDown,
1565:     required VoidCallback onUp,
1566:     Color? color,
1567:   }) {
1568:     return _withTooltip(
1569:       tooltip,
1570:       Listener(
1571:         onPointerDown: (_) => onDown(),
1572:         onPointerUp: (_) => onUp(),
1573:         onPointerCancel: (_) => onUp(),
1574:         child: DecoratedBox(
1575:           decoration: BoxDecoration(
1576:             color: (color ?? const Color(0xFF101B28)).withValues(alpha: 0.88),
1577:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
1578:             border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.12)),
1579:           ),
1580:           child: SizedBox(
1581:             width: 60,
1582:             height: 60,
1583:             child: Column(
1584:               mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
1585:               children: [
1586:                 Icon(icon, size: 18, color: Colors.white),
1587:                 const SizedBox(height: 2),
1588:                 Text(
1589:                   label,
1590:                   style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 10, color: Colors.white70),
1591:                 ),
1592:               ],
1593:             ),
1594:           ),
1595:         ),
1596:       ),
1597:     );
1598:   }
1599: 
1600:   @override
1601:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1602:     return Row(
1603:       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.end,
1604:       mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
1605:       children: [
1606:         Column(
1607:           mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
1608:           children: [
1609:             _holdButton(
1610:               icon: Icons.keyboard_arrow_up_rounded,
1611:               label: 'Up',
1612:               tooltip: 'Apply forward thrust.',
1613:               onDown: () => onAction(VirtualAction.up, true),
1614:               onUp: () => onAction(VirtualAction.up, false),
1615:             ),
1616:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
1617:             Row(
1618:               mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
1619:               children: [
1620:                 _holdButton(
1621:                   icon: Icons.keyboard_arrow_left_rounded,
1622:                   label: 'Left',
1623:                   tooltip: 'Yaw the ship to port.',
1624:                   onDown: () => onAction(VirtualAction.left, true),
1625:                   onUp: () => onAction(VirtualAction.left, false),
1626:                 ),
1627:                 const SizedBox(width: 8),
1628:                 _holdButton(
1629:                   icon: Icons.keyboard_arrow_down_rounded,
1630:                   label: 'Down',
1631:                   tooltip: 'Apply reverse thrust.',
1632:                   onDown: () => onAction(VirtualAction.down, true),
1633:                   onUp: () => onAction(VirtualAction.down, false),
1634:                 ),
1635:                 const SizedBox(width: 8),
1636:                 _holdButton(
1637:                   icon: Icons.keyboard_arrow_right_rounded,
1638:                   label: 'Right',
1639:                   tooltip: 'Yaw the ship to starboard.',
1640:                   onDown: () => onAction(VirtualAction.right, true),
1641:                   onUp: () => onAction(VirtualAction.right, false),
1642:                 ),
1643:               ],
1644:             ),
1645:           ],
1646:         ),
1647:         Column(
1648:           mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
1649:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.end,
1650:           children: [
1651:             Row(
1652:               mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
1653:               children: [
1654:                 _holdButton(
1655:                   icon: Icons.bolt_rounded,
1656:                   label: 'Boost',
1657:                   tooltip: 'Spend energy for a forward speed boost.',
1658:                   color: const Color(0xFF3F2A11),
1659:                   onDown: () => onAction(VirtualAction.boost, true),
1660:                   onUp: () => onAction(VirtualAction.boost, false),
1661:                 ),
1662:                 const SizedBox(width: 8),
1663:                 _holdButton(
1664:                   icon: Icons.flash_on_rounded,
1665:                   label: 'Fire',
1666:                   tooltip: 'Fire the primary weapons.',
1667:                   color: const Color(0xFF30111A),
1668:                   onDown: () => onAction(VirtualAction.fire, true),
1669:                   onUp: () => onAction(VirtualAction.fire, false),
1670:                 ),
1671:               ],
1672:             ),
1673:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
1674:             _withTooltip(
1675:               'Dock or undock when you are in range of a station.',
1676:               FilledButton.tonalIcon(
1677:                 onPressed: onDockTap,
1678:                 icon: const Icon(Icons.meeting_room_outlined),
1679:                 label: const Text('Dock'),
1680:               ),
1681:             ),
1682:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
1683:             _withTooltip(
1684:               'Trigger sector transit at a jump gate.',
1685:               FilledButton.tonalIcon(
1686:                 onPressed: onJumpTap,
1687:                 icon: const Icon(Icons.double_arrow_rounded),
1688:                 label: const Text('Jump'),
1689:               ),
1690:             ),
1691:           ],
1692:         ),
1693:       ],
1694:     );
1695:   }
1696: }

1698: class _Pill extends StatelessWidget {
1699:   const _Pill({required this.label, required this.color, this.muted = false});
1700: 
1701:   final String label;
1702:   final Color color;
1703:   final bool muted;
1704: 
1705:   @override
1706:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1707:     return Container(
1708:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 6),
1709:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
1710:         color: muted
1711:             ? Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.35)
1712:             : color.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
1713:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
1714:         border: Border.all(
1715:           color: muted
1716:               ? Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.14)
1717:               : color.withValues(alpha: 0.35),
1718:         ),
1719:       ),
1720:       child: Text(
1721:         label,
1722:         style: TextStyle(
1723:           fontSize: 12,
1724:           color: muted ? Colors.white70 : color,
1725:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
1726:         ),
1727:       ),
1728:     );
1729:   }
1730: }

1732: class _HudCard extends StatelessWidget {
1733:   const _HudCard({required this.title, required this.child, this.trailing});
1734: 
1735:   final String title;
1736:   final Widget child;
1737:   final Widget? trailing;
1738: 
1739:   @override
1740:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1741:     final colors = Theme.of(context).colorScheme;
1742:     final rowChildren = <Widget>[
1743:       Expanded(
1744:         child: Text(
1745:           title,
1746:           style: Theme.of(
1747:             context,
1748:           ).textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(color: const Color(0xFFF2F7FB)),
1749:         ),
1750:       ),
1751:     ];
1752:     if (trailing != null) {
1753:       rowChildren.add(trailing!);
1754:     }
1755:     return DecoratedBox(
1756:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
1757:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
1758:         border: Border.all(color: colors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.15)),
1759:         color: colors.surface.withValues(alpha: 0.72),
1760:       ),
1761:       child: Padding(
1762:         padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
1763:         child: Column(
1764:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
1765:           children: [
1766:             Row(children: rowChildren),
1767:             const SizedBox(height: 12),
1768:             child,
1769:           ],
1770:         ),
1771:       ),
1772:     );
1773:   }
1774: }

1776: class _MeterRow extends StatelessWidget {
1777:   const _MeterRow({
1778:     required this.label,
1779:     required this.value,
1780:     required this.text,
1781:     required this.color,
1782:   });
1783: 
1784:   final String label;
1785:   final double value;
1786:   final String text;
1787:   final Color color;
1788: 
1789:   @override
1790:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1791:     final safeValue = value.clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
1792:     return Padding(
1793:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
1794:       child: Row(
1795:         children: [
1796:           SizedBox(
1797:             width: 56,
1798:             child: Text(label, style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70)),
1799:           ),
1800:           Expanded(
1801:             child: ClipRRect(
1802:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(99),
1803:               child: Container(
1804:                 height: 12,
1805:                 color: const Color(0xFF0C121B),
1806:                 child: Stack(
1807:                   fit: StackFit.expand,
1808:                   children: [
1809:                     FractionallySizedBox(
1810:                       alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
1811:                       widthFactor: safeValue,
1812:                       child: DecoratedBox(
1813:                         decoration: BoxDecoration(
1814:                           gradient: LinearGradient(
1815:                             colors: [color.withValues(alpha: 0.65), color],
1816:                           ),
1817:                         ),
1818:                       ),
1819:                     ),
1820:                   ],
1821:                 ),
1822:               ),
1823:             ),
1824:           ),
1825:           const SizedBox(width: 8),
1826:           SizedBox(
1827:             width: 44,
1828:             child: Text(
1829:               text,
1830:               textAlign: TextAlign.right,
1831:               style: const TextStyle(
1832:                 color: Colors.white,
1833:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
1834:               ),
1835:             ),
1836:           ),
1837:         ],
1838:       ),
1839:     );
1840:   }
1841: }
1842:

1874: class _PowerRow extends StatelessWidget {
1875:   const _PowerRow({
1876:     required this.channel,
1877:     required this.value,
1878:     required this.onAdjust,
1879:   });
1880: 
1881:   final PowerChannel channel;
1882:   final int value;
1883:   final void Function(int delta) onAdjust;
1884: 
1885:   @override
1886:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1887:     final color = channel.color;
1888:     return Padding(
1889:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 10),
1890:       child: Row(
1891:         children: [
1892:           SizedBox(
1893:             width: 72,
1894:             child: Text(
1895:               channel.label,
1896:               style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70),
1897:             ),
1898:           ),
1899:           Expanded(
1900:             child: ClipRRect(
1901:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(99),
1902:               child: Container(
1903:                 height: 10,
1904:                 color: const Color(0xFF0C121B),
1905:                 child: FractionallySizedBox(
1906:                   alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
1907:                   widthFactor: (value / 100).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble(),
1908:                   child: DecoratedBox(
1909:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
1910:                       gradient: LinearGradient(
1911:                         colors: [color.withValues(alpha: 0.55), color],
1912:                       ),
1913:                     ),
1914:                   ),
1915:                 ),
1916:               ),
1917:             ),
1918:           ),
1919:           const SizedBox(width: 10),
1920:           _StepperButton(
1921:             icon: Icons.remove,
1922:             tooltip: 'Reduce ${channel.label.toLowerCase()} allocation.',
1923:             onTap: () => onAdjust(-1),
1924:           ),
1925:           SizedBox(
1926:             width: 32,
1927:             child: Text(
1928:               '$value',
1929:               textAlign: TextAlign.center,
1930:               style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
1931:             ),
1932:           ),
1933:           _StepperButton(
1934:             icon: Icons.add,
1935:             tooltip: 'Increase ${channel.label.toLowerCase()} allocation.',
1936:             onTap: () => onAdjust(1),
1937:           ),
1938:         ],
1939:       ),
1940:     );
1941:   }
1942: }
