1944: class _UpgradeRow extends StatelessWidget {
1945:   const _UpgradeRow({
1946:     required this.label,
1947:     required this.tier,
1948:     required this.maxTier,
1949:     required this.cost,
1950:     required this.onPressed,
1951:     this.valueText,
1952:   });
1953: 
1954:   final String label;
1955:   final int tier;
1956:   final int maxTier;
1957:   final int cost;
1958:   final VoidCallback? onPressed;
1959:   final String? valueText;
1960: 
1961:   @override
1962:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
1963:     final maxed = tier >= maxTier;
1964:     return Padding(
1965:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
1966:       child: Container(
1967:         padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
1968:         decoration: BoxDecoration(
1969:           color: const Color(0xFF0F1721),
1970:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
1971:           border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.06)),
1972:         ),
1973:         child: Row(
1974:           children: [
1975:             Expanded(
1976:               child: Column(
1977:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
1978:                 children: [
1979:                   Text(
1980:                     label,
1981:                     style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
1982:                   ),
1983:                   const SizedBox(height: 2),
1984:                   Text(
1985:                     valueText ?? 'Tier ${tier + 1}/${maxTier + 1}',
1986:                     style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
1987:                   ),
1988:                 ],
1989:               ),
1990:             ),
1991:             if (maxed)
1992:               const Text(
1993:                 'MAX',
1994:                 style: TextStyle(
1995:                   color: Color(0xFF4ADE80),
1996:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
1997:                 ),
1998:               )
1999:             else
2000:               _withTooltip(
2001:                 'Spend $cost credits to upgrade $label.',
2002:                 FilledButton.tonal(
2003:                   onPressed: onPressed,
2004:                   child: Text('Upgrade $cost'),
2005:                 ),
2006:               ),
2007:           ],
2008:         ),
2009:       ),
2010:     );
2011:   }
2012: }
2013: 
2014: class _StepperButton extends StatelessWidget {
2015:   const _StepperButton({
2016:     required this.icon,
2017:     required this.tooltip,
2018:     required this.onTap,
2019:   });
2020: 
2021:   final IconData icon;
2022:   final String tooltip;
2023:   final VoidCallback onTap;
2024: 
2025:   @override
2026:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
2027:     return _withTooltip(
2028:       tooltip,
2029:       InkWell(
2030:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
2031:         onTap: () {
2032:           onTap();
2033:           HapticFeedback.selectionClick();
2034:         },
2035:         child: Ink(
2036:           width: 28,
2037:           height: 28,
2038:           decoration: BoxDecoration(
2039:             color: const Color(0xFF132131),
2040:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
2041:             border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.08)),
2042:           ),
2043:           child: Icon(icon, size: 16),
2044:         ),
2045:       ),
2046:     );
2047:   }
2048: }
2049: 
2050: class _MissionPanel extends StatelessWidget {
2051:   const _MissionPanel({required this.game});
2052: 
2053:   final VanSoleGame game;
2054: 
2055:   @override
2056:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
2057:     final active = game.activeContract;
2058:     final dockOffer = game.currentDockOffer;
2059:     if (active == null && dockOffer == null) {
2060:       return const Text('No active contract and no current station offer.');
2061:     }
2062: 
2063:     return Column(
2064:       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
2065:       children: [
2066:         if (active != null)
2067:           _ContractBox(
2068:             title: 'Active: ${active.cargoName}',
2069:             accent: const Color(0xFF4ADE80),
2070:             lines: [
2071:               'Pickup: ${active.pickup.name}',
2072:               'Deliver: ${active.destination.name}',
2073:               'Cargo: ${active.cargoUnits} units',
2074:               'Reward: ${game.projectedContractRewardLabel(active)}',
2075:               active.statusDescription(game),
2076:             ],
2077:           ),
2078:         if (dockOffer != null) ...[
2079:           if (active != null) const SizedBox(height: 10),
2080:           _ContractBox(
2081:             title: 'Dock Offer: ${dockOffer.cargoName}',
2082:             accent: const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
2083:             lines: [
2084:               'To: ${dockOffer.destination.name}',
2085:               'Cargo: ${dockOffer.cargoUnits} units',
2086:               'Reward: ${game.projectedContractRewardLabel(dockOffer)}',
2087:               if (game.isDocked && game.currentDockContractsLocked)
2088:                 'Contracts locked (need >= ${VanSoleGame.contractAccessReputationFloor})',
2089:               game.isDocked
2090:                   ? 'Accept while docked (button or F)'
2091:                   : 'Dock at ${dockOffer.pickup.name} to accept',
2092:             ],
2093:           ),
2094:         ],
2095:       ],
2096:     );
2097:   }
2098: }
2099: 
2100: class _ContractBox extends StatelessWidget {
2101:   const _ContractBox({
2102:     required this.title,
2103:     required this.lines,
2104:     required this.accent,
2105:   });
2106: 
2107:   final String title;
2108:   final List<String> lines;
2109:   final Color accent;
2110: 
2111:   @override
2112:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
2113:     return Container(
2114:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
2115:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
2116:         color: const Color(0xFF0F1721),
2117:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
2118:         border: Border.all(color: accent.withValues(alpha: 0.3)),
2119:       ),
2120:       child: Column(
2121:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
2122:         children: [
2123:           Text(
2124:             title,
2125:             style: TextStyle(color: accent, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
2126:           ),
2127:           const SizedBox(height: 6),
2128:           for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++)
2129:             Padding(
2130:               padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: i == lines.length - 1 ? 0 : 3),
2131:               child: Text(
2132:                 lines[i],
2133:                 style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70),
2134:               ),
2135:             ),
2136:         ],
2137:       ),
2138:     );
2139:   }
2140: }
2141: 
2142: class _MarketPanel extends StatelessWidget {
2143:   const _MarketPanel({
2144:     required this.game,
2145:     required this.onBuy,
2146:     required this.onSell,
2147:   });
2148: 
2149:   final VanSoleGame game;
2150:   final ValueChanged<String> onBuy;
2151:   final ValueChanged<String> onSell;
2152: 
2153:   @override
2154:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
2155:     final market = game.currentDockMarket;
2156:     if (market == null) {
2157:       return const Text(
2158:         'Station market uplink unavailable.',
2159:         style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70),
2160:       );
2161:     }
2162: 
2163:     return Container(
2164:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
2165:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
2166:         color: const Color(0xFF0F1721),
2167:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
2168:         border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.12)),
2169:       ),
2170:       child: Column(
2171:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
2172:         children: [
2173:           Row(
2174:             children: [
2175:               const Expanded(
2176:                 child: Text(
2177:                   'Commodity Market',
2178:                   style: TextStyle(
2179:                     color: Color(0xFF93C5FD),
2180:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
2181:                   ),
2182:                 ),
2183:               ),
2184:               Text(
2185:                 'Hold ${game.totalCargoUsed}/${game.cargoCapacity}',
2186:                 style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
2187:               ),
2188:             ],
2189:           ),
2190:           const SizedBox(height: 4),
2191:           Text(
2192:             'Station standing: ${game.currentDockReputationLabel}',
2193:             style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
2194:           ),
2195:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
2196:           for (var i = 0; i < game.commodityCatalog.length; i++) ...[
2197:             Builder(
2198:               builder: (context) {
2199:                 final commodity = game.commodityCatalog[i];
2200:                 final listed = market[commodity.id];
2201:                 if (listed == null) {
2202:                   return const SizedBox.shrink();
2203:                 }
2204:                 final buy = game.currentBuyPrice(commodity.id) ?? listed;
2205:                 final sell = game.currentSellPrice(commodity.id) ?? listed;
2206:                 final owned = game.tradeUnitsForCommodity(commodity.id);
2207:                 return Row(
2208:                   children: [
2209:                     Expanded(
2210:                       child: Column(
2211:                         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
2212:                         children: [
2213:                           Text(
2214:                             commodity.name,
2215:                             style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w600),
2216:                           ),
2217:                           Text(
2218:                             'Owned $owned | Buy $buy | Sell $sell',
2219:                             style: const TextStyle(
2220:                               color: Colors.white70,
2221:                               fontSize: 12,
2222:                             ),
2223:                           ),
2224:                         ],
2225:                       ),
2226:                     ),
2227:                     const SizedBox(width: 8),
2228:                     _withTooltip(
2229:                       'Buy one unit of ${commodity.name}.',
2230:                       FilledButton.tonal(
2231:                         onPressed: game.canBuyCommodity(commodity.id)
2232:                             ? () => onBuy(commodity.id)
2233:                             : null,
2234:                         style: FilledButton.styleFrom(
2235:                           visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
2236:                         ),
2237:                         child: const Text('Buy'),
2238:                       ),
2239:                     ),
2240:                     const SizedBox(width: 6),
2241:                     _withTooltip(
2242:                       'Sell one unit of ${commodity.name}.',
2243:                       OutlinedButton(
2244:                         onPressed: game.canSellCommodity(commodity.id)
2245:                             ? () => onSell(commodity.id)
2246:                             : null,
2247:                         style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
2248:                           visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
2249:                         ),
2250:                         child: const Text('Sell'),
2251:                       ),
2252:                     ),
2253:                   ],
2254:                 );
2255:               },
2256:             ),
2257:             if (i != game.commodityCatalog.length - 1) ...[
2258:               const SizedBox(height: 6),
2259:               Divider(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.12), height: 1),
2260:               const SizedBox(height: 6),
2261:             ],
2262:           ],
2263:         ],
2264:       ),
2265:     );
2266:   }
2267: }
2268: 
2269: enum PowerChannel { engines, weapons, shields }
2270: 
2271: extension on PowerChannel {
2272:   String get label => switch (this) {
2273:     PowerChannel.engines => 'Engines',
2274:     PowerChannel.weapons => 'Weapons',
2275:     PowerChannel.shields => 'Shields',
2276:   };
2277: 
2278:   Color get color => switch (this) {
2279:     PowerChannel.engines => const Color(0xFF2DD4BF),
2280:     PowerChannel.weapons => const Color(0xFFF87171),
2281:     PowerChannel.shields => const Color(0xFF60A5FA),
2282:   };
2283: }
2284: 
2285: 
2286: // Central simulation state for navigation, trading, combat, missions,
2287: // reputation, save/load, and world progression.
2288: class VanSoleGame {
2289:   VanSoleGame() {
2290:     _initWorld();
2291:     _log('Boot sequence complete. Perseus Fringe traffic control online.');
2292:     _log(
2293:       'Sector chart uplink complete. Patrol lanes and contract relays synced.',
2294:     );
2295:     _log(
2296:       'Fly to a station and press E to dock. Accept cargo contracts for credits.',
2297:     );
2298:   }
2299: 
2300:   static const double worldWidth = 5200;
2301:   static const double worldHeight = 3800;
2302:   static const double dockingRange = 120;
2303:   static const double dockingSpeed = 40;
2304:   static const double radarRange = 1200;
2305:   static const double jumpRange = 140;
2306:   static const double jumpSpeed = 75;
2307:   static const int saveVersion = 6;
2308:   static const int contractAccessReputationFloor = -20;
2309:   static const List<String> _pirateHullClasses = <String>[
2310:     'SYMLOC',
2311:     'KADAK',
2312:     'DAK',
2313:     'RYNIKI',
2314:   ];
2315: 
2316:   final math.Random _rng = math.Random(42);
2317: 
2318:   final List<StarPoint> stars = <StarPoint>[];
2319:   final List<Station> stations = <Station>[];
2320:   final List<PortalGate> portals = <PortalGate>[];
2321:   final List<ResourceNode> resources = <ResourceNode>[];
2322:   final List<PirateShip> pirates = <PirateShip>[];
2323:   final List<Projectile> projectiles = <Projectile>[];
2324:   final List<Blast> blasts = <Blast>[];
2325:   final List<String> commsLog = <String>[];
2326:   final Map<PowerChannel, int> power = <PowerChannel, int>{
2327:     PowerChannel.engines: 35,
2328:     PowerChannel.weapons: 30,
2329:     PowerChannel.shields: 35,
2330:   };
2331:   final Map<int, CargoContract> _stationOffers = <int, CargoContract>{};
2332:   final Map<int, Map<String, int>> _stationMarkets = <int, Map<String, int>>{};
2333:   final Map<int, int> _stationReputation = <int, int>{};
2334:   final Map<String, int> _tradeCargo = <String, int>{};
2335:   final Set<int> _harvestedResourceIds = <int>{};
2336:   final Set<String> _unlockedLoreIds = <String>{};
2337:   final Set<int> _visitedSectors = <int>{};
2338: 
2339:   int sectorIndex = 0;
2340:   String sectorName = 'Perseus Fringe';
2341:   Offset playerPosition = const Offset(900, 900);
2342:   Offset playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
2343:   double playerFacing = -math.pi / 2;
2344:   double playerHull = 100;
2345:   double playerShield = 100;
2346:   double playerEnergy = 100;
2347:   double playerFuel = 100;
2348:   int credits = 260;
2349:   int cargoUsed = 0;
2350:   int kills = 0;
2351:   int engineUpgradeTier = 0;
2352:   int weaponUpgradeTier = 0;
2353:   int shieldUpgradeTier = 0;
2354:   int cargoUpgradeTier = 0;
2355:   int contractsDelivered = 0;
2356:   int crossSectorContractsDelivered = 0;
2357:   int jumpCount = 0;
2358:   int upgradesPurchased = 0;
2359:   int cockpitMode = 1;
2360:   int _campaignIndex = 0;
2361: 
2362:   Station? dockedStation;
2363:   Station? dockCandidate;
2364:   PortalGate? jumpCandidate;
2365:   Station? nearestStation;
2366:   ResourceNode? nearestResource;
2367:   ResourceNode? harvestCandidate;
2368:   double nearestStationDistance = double.infinity;
2369:   double nearestResourceDistance = double.infinity;
2370:   double nearestPortalDistance = double.infinity;
2371:   double nearestPirateDistance = double.infinity;
2372:   CargoContract? activeContract;
2373:   DialogueEncounter? activeEncounter;
2374: 
2375:   double _shieldRechargeDelay = 0;
2376:   double _playerWeaponCooldown = 0;
2377:   double _spawnTimer = 2.5;
2378:   double _encounterTimer = 16;
2379:   double _marketShiftTimer = 11;
2380:   double _clock = 0;
2381:   double _damageFlash = 0;
2382:   double _incomingDamageDirection = 0;
2383:   double _incomingDamageStrength = 0;
2384:   int _audioCueSerial = 0;
2385:   GameAudioCue? _lastAudioCue;
2386:   int _pirateIdSeed = 0;
2387:   int? _trackedPirateId;
2388:   bool _suspendCampaignEvaluation = false;
2389: 
2390:   bool get isDocked => dockedStation != null;
2391:   double get damageFlash => _damageFlash;
2392:   double get incomingDamageDirection => _incomingDamageDirection;
2393:   double get incomingDamageStrength => _incomingDamageStrength;
2394:   int get audioCueSerial => _audioCueSerial;
2395:   GameAudioCue? get lastAudioCue => _lastAudioCue;
2396:   int? get trackedPirateId => _trackedPirateId;
2397:   int get totalPowerAllocation =>
2398:       power.values.fold<int>(0, (sum, value) => sum + value);
2399:   int get cargoCapacity => 10 + (cargoUpgradeTier * 2);
2400:   int get tradeCargoUsed =>
2401:       _tradeCargo.values.fold<int>(0, (sum, units) => sum + units);
2402:   int get totalCargoUsed => cargoUsed + tradeCargoUsed;
2403:   int get freeCargoSpace => math.max(0, cargoCapacity - totalCargoUsed);
2404:   Map<String, int> get tradeCargoManifest =>
2405:       Map<String, int>.unmodifiable(_tradeCargo);
2406:   List<LoreEntry> get unlockedLoreEntries => _loreCatalog
2407:       .where((entry) => _unlockedLoreIds.contains(entry.id))
2408:       .toList(growable: false);
2409:   LoreEntry? get latestLoreEntry =>
2410:       unlockedLoreEntries.isEmpty ? null : unlockedLoreEntries.last;
2411:   double get shieldCapacity => 100 + (shieldUpgradeTier * 20);
2412:   double get engineTierBonus => engineUpgradeTier * 0.14;
2413:   double get weaponTierBonus => weaponUpgradeTier * 0.16;
2414:   double get shieldTierBonus => shieldUpgradeTier * 0.16;
2415:   List<SectorLayout> get sectorLayouts => _sectorLayouts;
2416:   List<CommoditySpec> get commodityCatalog => _commodityCatalog;
2417:   int reputationForStation(int stationId) => _stationReputation[stationId] ?? 0;
2418:   String reputationBandForStation(int stationId) =>
2419:       _reputationBand(reputationForStation(stationId));
2420:   int get currentDockReputation =>
2421:       dockedStation == null ? 0 : reputationForStation(dockedStation!.id);
2422:   String get currentDockReputationLabel {
2423:     final rep = currentDockReputation;
2424:     final signed = rep >= 0 ? '+$rep' : '$rep';
2425:     return '$signed (${_reputationBand(rep)})';
2426:   }
2427: 
2428:   bool get currentDockContractsLocked =>
2429:       isDocked && currentDockReputation < contractAccessReputationFloor;
2430:   int get maxEngineUpgradeTier => 3;
2431:   int get maxWeaponUpgradeTier => 3;
2432:   int get maxShieldUpgradeTier => 3;
2433:   int get maxCargoUpgradeTier => 4;
2434:   int get engineUpgradeCost => 120 + engineUpgradeTier * 110;
2435:   int get weaponUpgradeCost => 140 + weaponUpgradeTier * 125;
2436:   int get shieldUpgradeCost => 150 + shieldUpgradeTier * 125;
2437:   int get cargoUpgradeCost => 110 + cargoUpgradeTier * 90;
2438:   bool get canUpgradeEngine =>
2439:       isDocked &&
2440:       engineUpgradeTier < maxEngineUpgradeTier &&
2441:       credits >= engineUpgradeCost;
2442:   bool get canUpgradeWeapons =>
2443:       isDocked &&
2444:       weaponUpgradeTier < maxWeaponUpgradeTier &&
2445:       credits >= weaponUpgradeCost;
2446:   bool get canUpgradeShields =>
2447:       isDocked &&
2448:       shieldUpgradeTier < maxShieldUpgradeTier &&
2449:       credits >= shieldUpgradeCost;
2450:   bool get canUpgradeCargo =>
2451:       isDocked &&
2452:       cargoUpgradeTier < maxCargoUpgradeTier &&
2453:       credits >= cargoUpgradeCost;
2454:   CampaignMission? get activeCampaignMission =>
2455:       _campaignIndex < _campaignMissions.length
2456:       ? _campaignMissions[_campaignIndex]
2457:       : null;
2458:   int get campaignTotalMissions => _campaignMissions.length;
2459:   int get campaignCompletedMissions =>
2460:       _campaignIndex.clamp(0, _campaignMissions.length).toInt();
2461:   bool get campaignComplete => activeCampaignMission == null;
2462:   String get campaignStatusLabel =>
2463:       '$campaignCompletedMissions/$campaignTotalMissions';
2464:   int get campaignRewardCredits => activeCampaignMission?.rewardCredits ?? 0;
2465:   String get campaignTitle =>
2466:       activeCampaignMission?.title ?? 'Campaign complete';
2467:   String get campaignDescription =>
2468:       activeCampaignMission?.description ??
2469:       'All campaign objectives completed.';
2470:   String get campaignProgressText {
2471:     final mission = activeCampaignMission;
2472:     if (mission == null) {
2473:       return 'Complete';
2474:     }
2475:     final progress = _campaignProgressFor(mission);
2476:     return '$progress/${mission.target}';
2477:   }
2478: 
2479:   double get campaignProgressFraction {
2480:     final mission = activeCampaignMission;
2481:     if (mission == null) {
2482:       return 1;
2483:     }
2484:     return (_campaignProgressFor(mission) / mission.target)
2485:         .clamp(0.0, 1.0)
2486:         .toDouble();
2487:   }
2488: 
2489:   CargoContract? get currentDockOffer =>
2490:       dockedStation == null ? null : _stationOffers[dockedStation!.id];
2491:   Map<String, int>? get currentDockMarket =>
2492:       dockedStation == null ? null : _stationMarkets[dockedStation!.id];
2493:   String? get cockpitCommsPrompt {
2494:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
2495:       return '* YOU ARE BEING HAILED *';
2496:     }
2497:     if (!isDocked && nearestStation != null && nearestStationDistance <= 560) {
2498:       if (playerVelocity.distance <= 120) {
2499:         return '* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *';
2500:       }
2501:       return 'OBJECT MUST VISIBLE TO COMMUNICATE';
2502:     }
2503:     return null;
2504:   }
2505: 
2506:   bool get canAcceptDockContract {
2507:     final offer = currentDockOffer;
2508:     return isDocked &&
2509:         offer != null &&
2510:         activeContract == null &&
2511:         currentDockReputation >= contractAccessReputationFloor &&
2512:         totalCargoUsed + offer.cargoUnits <= cargoCapacity;
2513:   }
2514: 
2515:   bool get canDeliverDockContract {
2516:     final station = dockedStation;
2517:     final contract = activeContract;
2518:     if (station == null || contract == null) {
2519:       return false;
2520:     }
2521:     if (!contract.pickedUp && contract.pickup.id == station.id) {
2522:       return totalCargoUsed + contract.cargoUnits <= cargoCapacity;
2523:     }
2524:     return contract.destination.id == station.id && contract.pickedUp;
2525:   }
2526: 
2527:   bool get canRepairHull => isDocked && credits >= 40 && playerHull < 99.5;
2528:   bool get canRefuel => isDocked && credits >= 20 && playerFuel < 99.5;
2529: 
2530:   String get contractStateLabel {
2531:     final contract = activeContract;
2532:     if (contract == null) {
2533:       return currentDockOffer == null ? 'Idle' : 'Offer available';
2534:     }
2535:     if (!contract.pickedUp) {
2536:       return 'Pickup pending';
2537:     }
2538:     return 'Delivery active';
2539:   }
2540: 
2541:   String get currentDockDescription {
2542:     final station = dockedStation;
2543:     if (station == null) {
2544:       return '';
2545:     }
2546:     final active = activeContract;
2547:     if (active == null) {
2548:       return '${station.blurb} Station batteries recharge shields, energy, and fuel while docked. Dock market access is available.';
2549:     }
2550:     if (!active.pickedUp && active.pickup.id == station.id) {
2551:       return 'Contract cargo is staged here. Load it before departure.';
2552:     }
2553:     if (active.pickedUp && active.destination.id == station.id) {
2554:       return 'Destination port confirmed. Cargo manifest ready for delivery.';
2555:     }
2556:     return '${station.blurb} You can resupply here before continuing.';
2557:   }
2558: 
2559:   int tradeUnitsForCommodity(String commodityId) =>
2560:       _tradeCargo[commodityId] ?? 0;
2561: 
2562:   int? currentBuyPrice(String commodityId) {
2563:     final station = dockedStation;
2564:     if (station == null) {
2565:       return null;
2566:     }
2567:     final base = currentDockMarket?[commodityId];
2568:     if (base == null) {
2569:       return null;
2570:     }
2571:     final repFactor = _marketPriceFactor(station.id, buying: true);
2572:     return math.max(1, (base * 1.08 * repFactor).round());
2573:   }
2574: 
2575:   int? currentSellPrice(String commodityId) {
2576:     final station = dockedStation;
2577:     if (station == null) {
2578:       return null;
2579:     }
2580:     final base = currentDockMarket?[commodityId];
2581:     if (base == null) {
2582:       return null;
2583:     }
2584:     final repFactor = _marketPriceFactor(station.id, buying: false);
2585:     return math.max(1, (base * 0.92 * repFactor).round());
2586:   }
2587: 
2588:   int projectedContractReward(CargoContract contract) {
2589:     final delta = _contractRewardDelta(
2590:       baseReward: contract.rewardCredits,
2591:       destinationId: contract.destination.id,
2592:     );
2593:     return math.max(40, contract.rewardCredits + delta);
2594:   }
2595: 
2596:   String projectedContractRewardLabel(CargoContract contract) {
2597:     final adjusted = projectedContractReward(contract);
2598:     final delta = adjusted - contract.rewardCredits;
2599:     if (delta == 0) {
2600:       return '$adjusted cr';
2601:     }
2602:     final signed = delta > 0 ? '+$delta' : '$delta';
2603:     return '$adjusted cr ($signed rep)';
2604:   }
2605: 
2606:   bool canBuyCommodity(String commodityId) {
2607:     final buyPrice = currentBuyPrice(commodityId);
2608:     return isDocked &&
2609:         buyPrice != null &&
2610:         credits >= buyPrice &&
2611:         freeCargoSpace > 0;
2612:   }
2613: 
2614:   bool canSellCommodity(String commodityId) =>
2615:       isDocked &&
2616:       currentSellPrice(commodityId) != null &&
2617:       tradeUnitsForCommodity(commodityId) > 0;
2618: 
2619:   String pirateContactName(PirateShip pirate) =>
2620:       'SYMLOC ${pirate.trackingId.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';
2621: 
2622:   String pirateHullClass(PirateShip pirate) {
2623:     final index =
2624:         (pirate.trackingId + (pirate.bias * 10).floor()) %
2625:         _pirateHullClasses.length;
2626:     return _pirateHullClasses[index];
2627:   }
2628: 
2629:   String pirateShieldType(PirateShip pirate) {
2630:     if (pirate.shield >= 24) {
2631:       return 'III';
2632:     }
2633:     if (pirate.shield >= 14) {
2634:       return 'II';
2635:     }
2636:     return 'I';
2637:   }
2638: 
2639:   String pirateCannonType(PirateShip pirate) {
2640:     if (pirate.bias >= 0.72) {
2641:       return 'HEAVY';
2642:     }
2643:     if (pirate.bias >= 0.38) {
2644:       return 'PULSE';
2645:     }
2646:     return 'LIGHT';
2647:   }
2648: 
2649:   void setCockpitMode(int mode) {
2650:     cockpitMode = mode.clamp(1, 6).toInt();
2651:   }
2652: 
2653:   // Rebuild the simulation from a clean slate while preserving the authored
2654:   // sector, station, and campaign definitions stored on the class.
2655:   void _initWorld() {
2656:     _harvestedResourceIds.clear();
2657:     _unlockedLoreIds.clear();
2658:     _visitedSectors.clear();
2659:     _campaignIndex = 0;
2660:     _stationOffers.clear();
2661:     _stationMarkets.clear();
2662:     _stationReputation.clear();
2663:     _tradeCargo.clear();
2664:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2665:       _stationReputation[station.id] = 0;
2666:     }
2667:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2668:       _stationMarkets.putIfAbsent(
2669:         station.id,
2670:         () => _generateMarketFor(station),
2671:       );
2672:     }
2673:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2674:       _stationOffers.putIfAbsent(
2675:         station.id,
2676:         () => _generateContractFor(station),
2677:       );
2678:     }
2679:     _marketShiftTimer = 9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 12;
2680:     _setSector(0, initial: true);
2681:     _encounterTimer = 14 + _rng.nextDouble() * 8;
2682:   }
2683: 
2684:   // Advance one simulation frame. Systems are stepped in a fixed order so
2685:   // combat, docking, mission state, and HUD summaries stay deterministic.
2686:   void update(double dt, PlayerInput input) {
2687:     _clock += dt;
2688:     _playerWeaponCooldown = math.max(0, _playerWeaponCooldown - dt);
2689:     _shieldRechargeDelay = math.max(0, _shieldRechargeDelay - dt);
2690:     _spawnTimer -= dt;
2691:     _encounterTimer -= dt;
2692:     _marketShiftTimer -= dt;
2693:     _damageFlash = math.max(0, _damageFlash - dt * 2.1);
2694:     _incomingDamageStrength = math.max(0, _incomingDamageStrength - dt * 1.75);
2695:     _updateMarkets();
2696: 
2697:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
2698:       _refreshDerivedState();
2699:       return;
2700:     }
2701: 
2702:     _updatePlayer(dt, input);
2703:     _updatePirates(dt);
2704:     _updateProjectiles(dt);
2705:     _updateBlasts(dt);
2706:     _resolveProjectileHits();
2707:     _resolveBodyCollisions();
2708:     _refreshDerivedState();
2709:     _spawnPiratesIfNeeded();
2710:     _spawnEncounterIfNeeded();
2711:   }
2712: 
2713:   void _updatePlayer(double dt, PlayerInput input) {
2714:     final enginePower = power[PowerChannel.engines]! / 100;
2715:     final weaponPower = power[PowerChannel.weapons]! / 100;
2716:     final shieldPower = power[PowerChannel.shields]! / 100;
2717:     final effectiveEngine = (enginePower + engineTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2718:     final effectiveWeapon = (weaponPower + weaponTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2719:     final effectiveShield = (shieldPower + shieldTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2720: 
2721:     if (isDocked) {
2722:       final station = dockedStation!;
2723:       playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
2724:       playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 88);
2725:       playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy + dt * 26, 0, 100);
2726:       playerShield = _clamp(
2727:         playerShield + dt * (18 + shieldUpgradeTier * 3),
2728:         0,
2729:         shieldCapacity,
2730:       );
2731:       playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel + dt * 9, 0, 100);
2732:       return;
2733:     }
2734: 
2735:     playerEnergy = _clamp(
2736:       playerEnergy + dt * (10 + effectiveWeapon * 8),
2737:       0,
2738:       100,
2739:     );
2740:     if (_shieldRechargeDelay <= 0) {
2741:       playerShield = _clamp(
2742:         playerShield + dt * (3 + effectiveShield * 12),
2743:         0,
2744:         shieldCapacity,
2745:       );
2746:     }
2747: 
2748:     var thrust = Offset.zero;
2749:     if (input.up) thrust += const Offset(0, -1);
2750:     if (input.down) thrust += const Offset(0, 1);
2751:     if (input.left) thrust += const Offset(-1, 0);
2752:     if (input.right) thrust += const Offset(1, 0);
2753: 
2754:     var boosting = false;
2755:     if (thrust != Offset.zero) {
2756:       thrust = _normalize(thrust);
2757:       var accel = 170 + effectiveEngine * 260;
2758:       if (input.boost && playerFuel > 0 && playerEnergy > 4) {
2759:         boosting = true;
2760:         accel *= 1.65;
2761:         playerFuel = _clamp(
2762:           playerFuel - dt * (6.5 - effectiveEngine * 2.5),
2763:           0,
2764:           100,
2765:         );
2766:         playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - dt * 4.5, 0, 100);
2767:       }
2768:       playerVelocity += thrust * (accel * dt);
2769:       playerFacing = _approachAngle(
2770:         playerFacing,
2771:         math.atan2(thrust.dy, thrust.dx),
2772:         dt * 8,
2773:       );
2774:     }
2775: 
2776:     final drag = boosting ? 0.93 : 0.965;
2777:     playerVelocity *= math.pow(drag, dt * 60).toDouble();
2778: 
2779:     final baseCap = 220 + effectiveEngine * 210;
2780:     final speedCap = boosting ? baseCap * 1.55 : baseCap;
2781:     final speed = playerVelocity.distance;
2782:     if (speed > speedCap) {
2783:       playerVelocity = _normalize(playerVelocity) * speedCap;
2784:     }
2785: 
2786:     playerPosition += playerVelocity * dt;
2787:     playerPosition = Offset(
2788:       playerPosition.dx.clamp(40.0, worldWidth - 40.0).toDouble(),
2789:       playerPosition.dy.clamp(40.0, worldHeight - 40.0).toDouble(),
2790:     );
2791: 
2792:     if (playerPosition.dx <= 40 || playerPosition.dx >= worldWidth - 40) {
2793:       playerVelocity = Offset(-playerVelocity.dx * 0.35, playerVelocity.dy);
2794:     }
2795:     if (playerPosition.dy <= 40 || playerPosition.dy >= worldHeight - 40) {
2796:       playerVelocity = Offset(playerVelocity.dx, -playerVelocity.dy * 0.35);
2797:     }
2798: 
2799:     if (input.fire) {
2800:       _firePlayer(effectiveWeapon.toDouble());
2801:     }
2802:   }
2803: 
2804:   void _firePlayer(double weaponPower) {
2805:     if (_playerWeaponCooldown > 0 || playerEnergy < 4) {
2806:       return;
2807:     }
2808:     final dir = Offset(math.cos(playerFacing), math.sin(playerFacing));
2809:     final speed = 460 + weaponPower * 220;
2810:     final cost = 7.5 - weaponPower * 2.2;
2811:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - cost, 0, 100);
2812:     _playerWeaponCooldown =
2813:         (0.30 - weaponPower * 0.14 - weaponUpgradeTier * 0.01)
2814:             .clamp(0.10, 0.35)
2815:             .toDouble();
2816:     projectiles.add(
2817:       Projectile(
2818:         position: playerPosition + dir * 20,
2819:         velocity: playerVelocity * 0.3 + dir * speed,
2820:         ttl: 1.35,
2821:         damage: 12 + weaponPower * 16 + weaponUpgradeTier * 2.0,
2822:         friendly: true,
2823:       ),
2824:     );
2825:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.fire);
2826:   }
2827: 
2828:   void _updatePirates(double dt) {
2829:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
2830:       pirate.fireCooldown = math.max(0, pirate.fireCooldown - dt);
2831:       pirate.shield = _clamp(pirate.shield + dt * 4, 0, 35);
2832: 
2833:       final toPlayer = playerPosition - pirate.position;
2834:       final distance = toPlayer.distance;
2835:       final desiredAngle = math.atan2(toPlayer.dy, toPlayer.dx);
2836:       pirate.angle = _approachAngle(
2837:         pirate.angle,
2838:         desiredAngle,
2839:         dt * (2.2 + pirate.bias),
2840:       );
2841: 
2842:       var accel = 0.0;
2843:       if (distance > 240) {
2844:         accel = 80 + pirate.bias * 40;
2845:       }
2846:       if (distance > 700) {
2847:         accel += 55;
2848:       }
2849:       if (distance < 140) {
2850:         accel = -60;
2851:       }
2852:       final forward = Offset(math.cos(pirate.angle), math.sin(pirate.angle));
2853:       pirate.velocity += forward * (accel * dt);
2854:       pirate.velocity *= math.pow(0.955, dt * 60).toDouble();
2855: 
2856:       final speed = pirate.velocity.distance;
2857:       final speedCap = 150 + pirate.bias * 50;
2858:       if (speed > speedCap) {
2859:         pirate.velocity = _normalize(pirate.velocity) * speedCap;
2860:       }
2861: 
2862:       pirate.position += pirate.velocity * dt;
2863:       pirate.position = Offset(
2864:         pirate.position.dx.clamp(50.0, worldWidth - 50.0).toDouble(),
2865:         pirate.position.dy.clamp(50.0, worldHeight - 50.0).toDouble(),
2866:       );
2867: 
2868:       if (!isDocked &&
2869:           activeEncounter == null &&
2870:           distance < 720 &&
2871:           pirate.fireCooldown <= 0) {
2872:         final aimError = (_rng.nextDouble() - 0.5) * (0.18 + (distance / 1400));
2873:         final shotAngle = desiredAngle + aimError;
2874:         final dir = Offset(math.cos(shotAngle), math.sin(shotAngle));
2875:         projectiles.add(
2876:           Projectile(
2877:             position: pirate.position + dir * 16,
2878:             velocity: pirate.velocity * 0.25 + dir * 300,
2879:             ttl: 2.1,
2880:             damage: 8 + _rng.nextDouble() * 5,
2881:             friendly: false,
2882:           ),
2883:         );
2884:         pirate.fireCooldown = 0.9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 0.8;
2885:       }
2886:     }
2887:   }
2888: 
2889:   void _updateProjectiles(double dt) {
2890:     for (var i = projectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2891:       final projectile = projectiles[i];
2892:       projectile.ttl -= dt;
2893:       projectile.position += projectile.velocity * dt;
2894: 
2895:       final outOfBounds =
2896:           projectile.position.dx < -40 ||
2897:           projectile.position.dy < -40 ||
2898:           projectile.position.dx > worldWidth + 40 ||
2899:           projectile.position.dy > worldHeight + 40;
2900:       if (projectile.ttl <= 0 || outOfBounds) {
2901:         projectiles.removeAt(i);
2902:       }
2903:     }
2904:   }
2905: 
2906:   void _updateBlasts(double dt) {
2907:     for (var i = blasts.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2908:       blasts[i].ttl -= dt;
2909:       if (blasts[i].ttl <= 0) {
2910:         blasts.removeAt(i);
2911:       }
2912:     }
2913:   }
2914: 
2915:   void _resolveProjectileHits() {
2916:     for (var i = projectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2917:       final shot = projectiles[i];
2918:       if (shot.friendly) {
2919:         PirateShip? target;
2920:         for (final pirate in pirates) {
2921:           if ((pirate.position - shot.position).distance <= 18) {
2922:             target = pirate;
2923:             break;
2924:           }
2925:         }
2926:         if (target != null) {
2927:           _damagePirate(target, shot.damage);
2928:           blasts.add(Blast(position: shot.position, ttl: 0.18, radius: 16));
2929:           projectiles.removeAt(i);
2930:           continue;
2931:         }
2932:       } else {
2933:         if ((playerPosition - shot.position).distance <= 18 && !isDocked) {
2934:           _damagePlayer(shot.damage, sourcePosition: shot.position);
2935:           blasts.add(Blast(position: shot.position, ttl: 0.16, radius: 12));
2936:           projectiles.removeAt(i);
2937:           continue;
2938:         }
2939:       }
2940:     }
2941: 
2942:     pirates.removeWhere((pirate) => pirate.hull <= 0);
2943:   }
2944: 
2945:   void _resolveBodyCollisions() {
2946:     if (isDocked) {
2947:       return;
2948:     }
2949:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
2950:       final delta = playerPosition - pirate.position;
2951:       final dist = delta.distance;
2952:       if (dist > 0 && dist < 28) {
2953:         final push = _normalize(delta) * (28 - dist) * 0.6;
2954:         playerPosition += push;
2955:         playerVelocity += push * 4;
2956:         _damagePlayer(6, sourcePosition: pirate.position);
2957:       }
2958:     }
2959:   }
2960: 
2961:   void _damagePlayer(double damage, {Offset? sourcePosition}) {
2962:     _shieldRechargeDelay = 1.2;
2963:     _damageFlash = 1;
2964:     if (sourcePosition != null) {
2965:       final incoming = sourcePosition - playerPosition;
2966:       if (incoming.distanceSquared > 0.01) {
2967:         _incomingDamageDirection = math.atan2(incoming.dy, incoming.dx);
2968:         _incomingDamageStrength = (_incomingDamageStrength + 0.72).clamp(
2969:           0.0,
2970:           1.0,
2971:         );
2972:       }
2973:     }
2974:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.hit);
2975:     var remaining = damage;
2976:     if (playerShield > 0) {
2977:       final shieldHit = math.min(playerShield, remaining);
2978:       playerShield -= shieldHit;
2979:       remaining -= shieldHit;
2980:     }
2981:     if (remaining > 0) {
2982:       playerHull = _clamp(playerHull - remaining, 0, 100);
2983:       if (playerHull <= 0) {
2984:         _handlePlayerDestroyed();
2985:       }
2986:     }
2987:   }
2988: 
2989:   void _damagePirate(PirateShip pirate, double damage) {
2990:     var remaining = damage;
2991:     if (pirate.shield > 0) {
2992:       final shieldHit = math.min(pirate.shield, remaining);
2993:       pirate.shield -= shieldHit;
2994:       remaining -= shieldHit;
2995:     }
2996:     if (remaining > 0) {
2997:       pirate.hull -= remaining;

2999:     if (pirate.hull <= 0) {
3000:       kills += 1;

3002:       credits += bounty;

3264:   Map<String, int> _generateMarketFor(Station station) {
3265:     final quotes = <String, int>{};

3267:     final stationBias = ((station.id % 9) - 4) * 0.018;

3269:     for (final commodity in _commodityCatalog) {

3271:       final modifier = (1 + sectorBias + stationBias + styleSeed + volatility)
3272:           .clamp(0.62, 1.55);

3275:         (commodity.basePrice * modifier).round(),
3276:       );

3279:   }

3318:   int _contractRewardDelta({
3319:     required int baseReward,
3320:     required int destinationId,
3321:   }) {

3324:     final lower = -(baseReward ~/ 4);

3335:     }

3346:     if (_stationByIdOrNull(stationId) == null || delta == 0) {
3347:       return;
3348:     }
3349:     final previous = reputationForStation(stationId);
3350:     final next = (previous + delta).clamp(-40, 80).toInt();
3351:     _stationReputation[stationId] = next;
3352:     if (silent || next == previous) {
3353:       return;
3354:     }
3355:     if ((next - previous).abs() < 5) {
3356:       return;
3357:     }
3358:     final station = _stationByIdOrNull(stationId);
3359:     if (station != null) {
3360:       final signed = next >= 0 ? '+$next' : '$next';
3361:       _log(
3362:         'Standing update at ${station.name}: $signed (${_reputationBand(next)}).',
3363:       );
3364:     }
3365:   }
3366: 
3367:   static int _contractIdSeed = 0;
3368: 
3369:   void toggleDocking() {
3370:     if (isDocked) {
3371:       final station = dockedStation!;
3372:       dockedStation = null;
3373:       playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 145);
3374:       playerVelocity = Offset(0, 35);
3375:       _log('Undocking from ${station.name}.');
3376:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.dock);
3377:       return;
3378:     }
3379:     if (dockCandidate == null) {
3380:       _log(
3381:         'Docking denied. Slow to under ${dockingSpeed.round()} u/s within ${dockingRange.round()} units of a station.',
3382:       );
3383:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3384:       return;
3385:     }
3386:     dockedStation = dockCandidate;
3387:     cockpitMode = 1;
3388:     playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
3389:     playerPosition = dockedStation!.position + const Offset(0, 88);
3390:     _log('Docked at ${dockedStation!.name}.');
3391:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.dock);
3392:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3393:   }
3394: 
3395:   void attemptJump() {
3396:     if (isDocked) {
3397:       _log('Undock before engaging a jump gate.');
3398:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3399:       return;
3400:     }
3401:     final gate = jumpCandidate;
3402:     if (gate == null) {
3403:       _log(
3404:         'Jump gate not ready. Slow to under ${jumpSpeed.round()} u/s within ${jumpRange.round()} units of a gate.',
3405:       );
3406:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3407:       return;
3408:     }
3409:     if (playerFuel < 8 || playerEnergy < 12) {
3410:       _log('Jump aborted. Need at least 8% fuel and 12% energy.');
3411:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3412:       return;
3413:     }
3414:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel - 8, 0, 100);
3415:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - 12, 0, 100);
3416:     final target = _portalById(gate.targetPortalId, gate.targetSectorIndex);
3417:     final exitDir = _normalize(target.exitVector);
3418:     jumpCount += 1;
3419:     _setSector(
3420:       gate.targetSectorIndex,
3421:       spawnPosition: target.position + exitDir * 170,
3422:       initial: false,
3423:     );
3424:     playerVelocity = exitDir * 45;
3425:     playerFacing = math.atan2(exitDir.dy, exitDir.dx);
3426:     _log('Transit complete: ${gate.name} -> ${target.name} ($sectorName).');
3427:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.jump);
3428:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3429:   }
3430: 
3431:   void cycleTracking() {
3432:     if (pirates.isEmpty) {
3433:       _trackedPirateId = null;
3434:       _log('TRACKING: no hostile contacts.');
3435:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3436:       return;
3437:     }
3438: 
3439:     final sorted = pirates.toList()
3440:       ..sort(
3441:         (a, b) => (a.position - playerPosition).distance.compareTo(
3442:           (b.position - playerPosition).distance,
3443:         ),
3444:       );
3445:     var index = 0;
3446:     if (_trackedPirateId != null) {
3447:       final currentIndex = sorted.indexWhere(
3448:         (pirate) => pirate.trackingId == _trackedPirateId,
3449:       );
3450:       if (currentIndex >= 0) {
3451:         index = (currentIndex + 1) % sorted.length;
3452:       }
3453:     }
3454:     final target = sorted[index];
3455:     cockpitMode = 4;
3456:     _trackedPirateId = target.trackingId;
3457:     final range = (target.position - playerPosition).distance;
3458:     final contact = pirateContactName(target);
3459:     _log(
3460:       'TRACKING: $contact ${index + 1}/${sorted.length} tagged at ${_distanceKm(range)}.',
3461:     );
3462:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3463:   }
3464: 
3465:   void requestComms() {
3466:     cockpitMode = 3;
3467:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
3468:       _log('* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *');
3469:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3470:       return;
3471:     }
3472:     if (!isDocked &&
3473:         nearestStation != null &&
3474:         nearestStationDistance <= 560 &&
3475:         playerVelocity.distance <= 120) {
3476:       _log('COMM LINK: ${nearestStation!.name} relay responding.');
3477:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3478:       return;
3479:     }
3480:     if (!isDocked && nearestStation != null && nearestStationDistance <= 560) {
3481:       _log('OBJECT MUST VISIBLE TO COMMUNICATE');
3482:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3483:       return;
3484:     }
3485:     _log('NO RESPONSE ON ANY CHANNEL.');
3486:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3487:   }
3488: 
3489:   void harvestResource() {
3490:     if (isDocked) {
3491:       _log('Undock before running a harvest pass.');
3492:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3493:       return;
3494:     }
3495:     final node = harvestCandidate;
3496:     if (node == null) {
3497:       _log('No resource field in harvest range.');
3498:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3499:       return;
3500:     }
3501:     if (freeCargoSpace < node.yieldUnits) {
3502:       _log(
3503:         'Insufficient cargo space for ${node.name} (${node.yieldUnits} units).',
3504:       );
3505:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3506:       return;
3507:     }
3508:     final commodity = _commodityById(node.commodityId);
3509:     if (commodity == null) {
3510:       _log('Harvest pass failed: unknown cargo profile.');
3511:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3512:       return;
3513:     }
3514: 
3515:     cockpitMode = 1;
3516:     _tradeCargo.update(
3517:       node.commodityId,
3518:       (units) => units + node.yieldUnits,
3519:       ifAbsent: () => node.yieldUnits,
3520:     );
3521:     _harvestedResourceIds.add(node.id);
3522:     resources.removeWhere((resource) => resource.id == node.id);
3523:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - 6, 0, 100);
3524:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel - 2, 0, 100);
3525:     _unlockLore(node.loreId);
3526:     _log(
3527:       'Harvested ${node.name}: +${node.yieldUnits} ${commodity.name.toUpperCase()}.',
3528:     );
3529:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3530:     _refreshDerivedState();
3531:   }
3532: 
3533:   void tryAcceptDockContract() {
3534:     final station = dockedStation;
3535:     if (station == null) {
3536:       _log('No station link active.');
3537:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3538:       return;
3539:     }
3540:     if (activeContract != null) {
3541:       _log('You already have an active contract.');
3542:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3543:       return;
3544:     }
3545:     final offer = _stationOffers[station.id];
3546:     if (offer == null) {
3547:       _log('No contracts available at ${station.name}.');
3548:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3549:       return;
3550:     }
3551:     if (reputationForStation(station.id) < contractAccessReputationFloor) {
3552:       _log(
3553:         'Dockmaster refuses new contracts at ${station.name}. Improve standing to $contractAccessReputationFloor or higher.',
3554:       );
3555:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3556:       return;
3557:     }
3558:     if (totalCargoUsed + offer.cargoUnits > cargoCapacity) {
3559:       _log('Insufficient cargo space for ${offer.cargoUnits} units.');
3560:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3561:       return;
3562:     }
3563: 
3564:     activeContract = offer.copyForAcceptance();
3565:     cockpitMode = 6;
3566:     _stationOffers[station.id] = _generateContractFor(station);
3567:     _log(
3568:       'Accepted contract: ${offer.cargoName} to ${offer.destination.name} (${projectedContractRewardLabel(offer)}).',
3569:     );
3570:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3571: 
3572:     if (activeContract!.pickup.id == station.id) {
3573:       activeContract!.pickedUp = true;
3574:       cargoUsed += activeContract!.cargoUnits;
3575:       _log('Cargo loaded: ${activeContract!.cargoUnits} units aboard.');
3576:     }
3577:   }
3578: 
3579:   void tryDeliverDockContract() {
3580:     final station = dockedStation;
3581:     final contract = activeContract;
3582:     if (station == null || contract == null) {
3583:       _log('No deliverable cargo.');
3584:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3585:       return;
3586:     }
3587: 
3588:     if (!contract.pickedUp && contract.pickup.id == station.id) {
3589:       if (totalCargoUsed + contract.cargoUnits > cargoCapacity) {
3590:         _log('Insufficient cargo space to load the contract cargo.');
3591:         _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3592:         return;
3593:       }
3594:       contract.pickedUp = true;
3595:       cargoUsed += contract.cargoUnits;
3596:       cockpitMode = 6;
3597:       _log('Cargo loaded for ${contract.destination.name}.');
3598:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3599:       return;
3600:     }
3601: 
3602:     if (contract.destination.id != station.id || !contract.pickedUp) {
3603:       _log('This station is not the contract destination.');
3604:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3605:       return;
3606:     }
3607: 
3608:     cargoUsed = math.max(0, cargoUsed - contract.cargoUnits);
3609:     final payout = projectedContractReward(contract);
3610:     credits += payout;
3611:     contractsDelivered += 1;
3612:     if (contract.pickup.sectorIndex != contract.destination.sectorIndex) {
3613:       crossSectorContractsDelivered += 1;
3614:     }
3615:     shiftStationReputation(station.id, 7, silent: true);
3616:     if (contract.pickup.id != station.id) {
3617:       shiftStationReputation(contract.pickup.id, 2, silent: true);
3618:     }
3619:     final delta = payout - contract.rewardCredits;
3620:     final repText = delta == 0
3621:         ? ''
3622:         : (delta > 0 ? ' (rep bonus +$delta)' : ' (rep penalty $delta)');
3623:     _log('Cargo delivered to ${station.name}. Payment +$payout cr$repText.');
3624:     activeContract = null;
3625:     cockpitMode = 6;
3626:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3627:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3628:   }
3629: 
3630:   void repairHull() {
3631:     if (!canRepairHull) {
3632:       _log('Repair service unavailable.');
3633:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3634:       return;
3635:     }
3636:     credits -= 40;
3637:     playerHull = _clamp(playerHull + 38, 0, 100);
3638:     _log('Hull repairs completed (-40 cr).');
3639:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3640:   }
3641: 
3642:   void refuel() {
3643:     if (!canRefuel) {
3644:       _log('Refuel service unavailable.');
3645:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3646:       return;
3647:     }
3648:     credits -= 20;
3649:     playerFuel = 100;
3650:     _log('Tanks topped off (-20 cr).');
3651:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3652:   }
3653: 
3654:   void buyCommodity(String commodityId) {
3655:     final station = dockedStation;
3656:     final commodity = _commodityById(commodityId);
3657:     if (station == null || commodity == null) {
3658:       _log('Commodity market unavailable.');
3659:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3660:       return;
3661:     }
3662:     final price = currentBuyPrice(commodityId);
3663:     if (price == null) {
3664:       _log('${station.name} does not list ${commodity.name}.');
3665:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3666:       return;
3667:     }
3668:     if (freeCargoSpace <= 0) {
3669:       _log('Cargo hold is full.');
3670:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3671:       return;
3672:     }
3673:     if (credits < price) {
3674:       _log('Insufficient credits to buy ${commodity.name}.');
3675:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3676:       return;
3677:     }
3678:     credits -= price;
3679:     _tradeCargo.update(commodityId, (units) => units + 1, ifAbsent: () => 1);
3680:     _log('Purchased ${commodity.name} (1 unit) for $price cr.');
3681:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3682:   }
3683: 
3684:   void sellCommodity(String commodityId) {
3685:     final station = dockedStation;
3686:     final commodity = _commodityById(commodityId);
3687:     final units = _tradeCargo[commodityId] ?? 0;
3688:     if (station == null || commodity == null) {
3689:       _log('Commodity market unavailable.');
3690:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3691:       return;
3692:     }
3693:     if (units <= 0) {
3694:       _log('No ${commodity.name} cargo available to sell.');
3695:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3696:       return;
3697:     }
3698:     final price = currentSellPrice(commodityId);
3699:     if (price == null) {
3700:       _log('${station.name} market cannot process ${commodity.name}.');
3701:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3702:       return;
3703:     }
3704:     final remaining = units - 1;
3705:     if (remaining <= 0) {
3706:       _tradeCargo.remove(commodityId);
3707:     } else {
3708:       _tradeCargo[commodityId] = remaining;
3709:     }
3710:     credits += price;
3711:     _log('Sold ${commodity.name} (1 unit) for $price cr.');
3712:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3713:   }
3714: 
3715:   void buyEngineUpgrade() {
3716:     if (!isDocked) {
3717:       _log('Dock to access outfitting services.');
3718:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3719:       return;
3720:     }
3721:     if (engineUpgradeTier >= maxEngineUpgradeTier) {
3722:       _log('Engines already at maximum tuning.');
3723:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3724:       return;
3725:     }
3726:     if (credits < engineUpgradeCost) {
3727:       _log('Insufficient credits for engine tuning.');
3728:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3729:       return;
3730:     }
3731:     final cost = engineUpgradeCost;
3732:     credits -= cost;
3733:     engineUpgradeTier += 1;
3734:     upgradesPurchased += 1;
3735:     _log('Engine tuning upgraded to Mk ${engineUpgradeTier + 1} (-$cost cr).');
3736:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3737:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3738:   }

3793:   void buyCargoUpgrade() {

3795:       _log('Dock to access outfitting services.');
3796:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3797:       return;
3798:     }
3799:     if (cargoUpgradeTier >= maxCargoUpgradeTier) {
3800:       _log('Cargo racks already at maximum expansion.');
3801:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3802:       return;
3803:     }
3804:     if (credits < cargoUpgradeCost) {
3805:       _log('Insufficient credits for cargo rack expansion.');
3806:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3807:       return;
3808:     }

3810:     credits -= cost;
3811:     cargoUpgradeTier += 1;
3812:     upgradesPurchased += 1;

3814:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
