3817: 
3818:   void adjustPower(PowerChannel channel, int deltaSteps) {
3819:     if (deltaSteps == 0) {
3820:       return;
3821:     }
3822:     final stepCount = deltaSteps.abs();
3823:     for (var i = 0; i < stepCount; i++) {
3824:       if (deltaSteps > 0) {
3825:         if (!_shiftPowerToward(channel)) {
3826:           break;
3827:         }
3828:       } else {
3829:         if (!_shiftPowerAway(channel)) {
3830:           break;
3831:         }
3832:       }
3833:     }
3834:   }
3835: 
3836:   bool _shiftPowerToward(PowerChannel target) {
3837:     if (power[target]! >= 80) {
3838:       return false;
3839:     }
3840:     final donors =
3841:         PowerChannel.values
3842:             .where((channel) => channel != target && power[channel]! > 10)
3843:             .toList()
3844:           ..sort((a, b) => power[b]!.compareTo(power[a]!));
3845:     if (donors.isEmpty) {
3846:       return false;
3847:     }
3848:     power[donors.first] = power[donors.first]! - 5;
3849:     power[target] = power[target]! + 5;
3850:     return true;
3851:   }
3852: 
3853:   bool _shiftPowerAway(PowerChannel source) {
3854:     if (power[source]! <= 10) {
3855:       return false;
3856:     }
3857:     final recipients =
3858:         PowerChannel.values
3859:             .where((channel) => channel != source && power[channel]! < 80)
3860:             .toList()
3861:           ..sort((a, b) => power[a]!.compareTo(power[b]!));
3862:     if (recipients.isEmpty) {
3863:       return false;
3864:     }
3865:     power[source] = power[source]! - 5;
3866:     power[recipients.first] = power[recipients.first]! + 5;
3867:     return true;
3868:   }
3869: 
3870:   void _log(String text) {
3871:     final totalSeconds = _clock.floor();
3872:     final mm = (totalSeconds ~/ 60).toString().padLeft(2, '0');
3873:     final ss = (totalSeconds % 60).toString().padLeft(2, '0');
3874:     commsLog.insert(0, '[$mm:$ss] $text');
3875:     if (commsLog.length > 10) {
3876:       commsLog.removeRange(10, commsLog.length);
3877:     }
3878:   }
3879: 
3880:   int _campaignProgressFor(CampaignMission mission) {
3881:     switch (mission.goalType) {
3882:       case CampaignGoalType.dockStation:
3883:         return dockedStation?.id == mission.stationId ? 1 : 0;
3884:       case CampaignGoalType.deliverContracts:
3885:         return contractsDelivered;
3886:       case CampaignGoalType.killPirates:
3887:         return kills;
3888:       case CampaignGoalType.visitSector:
3889:         return _visitedSectors.contains(mission.sectorIndex) ? 1 : 0;
3890:       case CampaignGoalType.buyUpgrades:
3891:         return upgradesPurchased;
3892:       case CampaignGoalType.crossSectorDeliveries:
3893:         return crossSectorContractsDelivered;
3894:     }
3895:   }
3896: 
3897:   void reevaluateCampaignProgress() => _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3898: 
3899:   void _evaluateCampaignProgress({
3900:     bool grantRewards = true,
3901:     bool emitLogs = true,
3902:   }) {
3903:     if (_suspendCampaignEvaluation) {
3904:       return;
3905:     }
3906:     var advanced = false;
3907:     while (true) {
3908:       final mission = activeCampaignMission;
3909:       if (mission == null) {
3910:         break;
3911:       }
3912:       if (_campaignProgressFor(mission) < mission.target) {
3913:         break;
3914:       }
3915:       _campaignIndex += 1;
3916:       if (grantRewards && mission.rewardCredits > 0) {
3917:         credits += mission.rewardCredits;
3918:       }
3919:       if (emitLogs) {
3920:         final rewardText = grantRewards && mission.rewardCredits > 0
3921:             ? ' (+${mission.rewardCredits} cr)'
3922:             : '';
3923:         _log('Campaign objective complete: ${mission.title}$rewardText.');
3924:       }
3925:       advanced = true;
3926:     }
3927:     if (!advanced) {
3928:       return;
3929:     }
3930:     if (emitLogs && campaignComplete) {
3931:       _log('Campaign arc complete. Continue free-roam contracts and combat.');
3932:     }
3933:     if (emitLogs || grantRewards) {
3934:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3935:     }
3936:   }
3937: 
3938:   void chooseDialogueOption(int index) {
3939:     final encounter = activeEncounter;
3940:     if (encounter == null) {
3941:       return;
3942:     }
3943:     if (index < 0 || index >= encounter.options.length) {
3944:       _log('Invalid comms response.');
3945:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3946:       return;
3947:     }
3948:     final option = encounter.options[index];
3949:     credits = math.max(0, credits + option.creditsDelta);
3950:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel + option.fuelDelta, 0, 100);
3951:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy + option.energyDelta, 0, 100);
3952:     playerShield = _clamp(playerShield + option.shieldDelta, 0, shieldCapacity);
3953:     if (option.hullDelta < 0) {
3954:       _damagePlayer(-option.hullDelta);
3955:     } else if (option.hullDelta > 0) {
3956:       playerHull = _clamp(playerHull + option.hullDelta, 0, 100);
3957:     }
3958:     for (var i = 0; i < option.spawnPirates; i++) {
3959:       pirates.add(_spawnPirate(initial: false));
3960:     }
3961:     _log(option.resultLog);
3962:     activeEncounter = null;
3963:     _encounterTimer = 18 + _rng.nextDouble() * 20;
3964:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3965:   }
3966: 
3967:   // Save codes are plain JSON so they remain portable across every target
3968:   // platform without depending on platform-specific storage APIs.
3969:   String exportSaveCode() => jsonEncode(_toSaveMap());
3970: 
3971:   // Importing rebuilds sector state, cargo, progression, and reputation from
3972:   // the portable save-code map while validating version compatibility first.
3973:   void importSaveCode(String raw) {
3974:     final decoded = jsonDecode(raw);
3975:     if (decoded is! Map) {
3976:       throw const FormatException('Save code is not a JSON object.');
3977:     }
3978:     final map = Map<String, dynamic>.from(decoded);
3979:     final version = (map['version'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 0;
3980:     if (version < 1 || version > saveVersion) {
3981:       throw FormatException(
3982:         'Unsupported save version $version (expected 1-$saveVersion).',
3983:       );
3984:     }
3985: 
3986:     final targetSector = (map['sectorIndex'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 0;
3987:     _harvestedResourceIds.clear();
3988:     final harvestedRaw = map['harvestedResourceIds'];
3989:     if (harvestedRaw is List) {
3990:       for (final value in harvestedRaw) {
3991:         if (value is num) {
3992:           _harvestedResourceIds.add(value.toInt());
3993:         }
3994:       }
3995:     }
3996:     _unlockedLoreIds.clear();
3997:     final loreRaw = map['unlockedLoreIds'];
3998:     if (loreRaw is List) {
3999:       for (final value in loreRaw) {
4000:         if (value is String && _loreById(value) != null) {
4001:           _unlockedLoreIds.add(value);
4002:         }
4003:       }
4004:     }
4005:     _suspendCampaignEvaluation = true;
4006:     try {
4007:       _setSector(targetSector, initial: true);
4008:     } finally {
4009:       _suspendCampaignEvaluation = false;
4010:     }
4011: 
4012:     _clock = (map['clock'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? _clock;
4013:     playerFacing = (map['playerFacing'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? playerFacing;
4014:     engineUpgradeTier =
4015:         ((map['engineUpgradeTier'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? engineUpgradeTier)
4016:             .clamp(0, maxEngineUpgradeTier)
4017:             .toInt();
4018:     weaponUpgradeTier =
4019:         ((map['weaponUpgradeTier'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? weaponUpgradeTier)
4020:             .clamp(0, maxWeaponUpgradeTier)
4021:             .toInt();
4022:     shieldUpgradeTier =
4023:         ((map['shieldUpgradeTier'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? shieldUpgradeTier)
4024:             .clamp(0, maxShieldUpgradeTier)
4025:             .toInt();
4026:     cargoUpgradeTier =
4027:         ((map['cargoUpgradeTier'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? cargoUpgradeTier)
4028:             .clamp(0, maxCargoUpgradeTier)
4029:             .toInt();
4030:     playerHull = _clamp((map['playerHull'] as num?) ?? playerHull, 0, 100);
4031:     playerShield = _clamp(
4032:       (map['playerShield'] as num?) ?? playerShield,
4033:       0,
4034:       shieldCapacity,
4035:     );
4036:     playerEnergy = _clamp(
4037:       (map['playerEnergy'] as num?) ?? playerEnergy,
4038:       0,
4039:       100,
4040:     );
4041:     playerFuel = _clamp((map['playerFuel'] as num?) ?? playerFuel, 0, 100);
4042:     credits = (map['credits'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? credits;
4043:     _tradeCargo.clear();
4044:     final tradeCargoRaw = map['tradeCargo'];
4045:     if (tradeCargoRaw is Map) {
4046:       for (final entry in tradeCargoRaw.entries) {
4047:         final commodityId = entry.key.toString();
4048:         if (_commodityById(commodityId) == null) {
4049:           continue;
4050:         }
4051:         final unitsRaw = entry.value;
4052:         if (unitsRaw is num) {
4053:           final units = unitsRaw.toInt();
4054:           if (units > 0) {
4055:             _tradeCargo[commodityId] = units.clamp(0, cargoCapacity).toInt();
4056:           }
4057:         }
4058:       }
4059:     }
4060:     cargoUsed = ((map['cargoUsed'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? cargoUsed)
4061:         .clamp(0, math.max(0, cargoCapacity - tradeCargoUsed))
4062:         .toInt();
4063:     kills = (map['kills'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? kills;
4064:     contractsDelivered = (map['contractsDelivered'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 0;
4065:     crossSectorContractsDelivered =
4066:         (map['crossSectorContractsDelivered'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 0;
4067:     jumpCount = (map['jumpCount'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 0;
4068:     upgradesPurchased =
4069:         (map['upgradesPurchased'] as num?)?.toInt() ??
4070:         (engineUpgradeTier +
4071:             weaponUpgradeTier +
4072:             shieldUpgradeTier +
4073:             cargoUpgradeTier);
4074:     cockpitMode = ((map['cockpitMode'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? cockpitMode)
4075:         .clamp(1, 6)
4076:         .toInt();
4077:     _campaignIndex = ((map['campaignIndex'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 0)
4078:         .clamp(0, campaignTotalMissions)
4079:         .toInt();
4080:     _visitedSectors
4081:       ..clear()
4082:       ..add(targetSector);
4083:     final visitedRaw = map['visitedSectors'];
4084:     if (visitedRaw is List) {
4085:       for (final v in visitedRaw) {
4086:         if (v is num) {
4087:           _visitedSectors.add(v.toInt());
4088:         }
4089:       }
4090:     }
4091: 
4092:     final pos = map['playerPosition'];
4093:     if (pos is Map) {
4094:       playerPosition = Offset(
4095:         ((pos['x'] as num?) ?? playerPosition.dx).toDouble(),
4096:         ((pos['y'] as num?) ?? playerPosition.dy).toDouble(),
4097:       );
4098:     }
4099:     final vel = map['playerVelocity'];
4100:     if (vel is Map) {
4101:       playerVelocity = Offset(
4102:         ((vel['x'] as num?) ?? playerVelocity.dx).toDouble(),
4103:         ((vel['y'] as num?) ?? playerVelocity.dy).toDouble(),
4104:       );
4105:     }
4106: 
4107:     final powerMap = map['power'];
4108:     if (powerMap is Map) {
4109:       for (final channel in PowerChannel.values) {
4110:         final key = channel.name;
4111:         final rawValue = powerMap[key];
4112:         if (rawValue is num) {
4113:           power[channel] = (rawValue.toInt()).clamp(10, 80).toInt();
4114:         }
4115:       }
4116:       _rebalancePower();
4117:     }
4118: 
4119:     _stationMarkets.clear();
4120:     final markets = map['stationMarkets'];
4121:     if (markets is Map) {
4122:       for (final stationEntry in markets.entries) {
4123:         final stationId = int.tryParse(stationEntry.key.toString());
4124:         if (stationId == null) {
4125:           continue;
4126:         }
4127:         if (!_allStations.any((station) => station.id == stationId)) {
4128:           continue;
4129:         }
4130:         final stationMapRaw = stationEntry.value;
4131:         if (stationMapRaw is! Map) {
4132:           continue;
4133:         }
4134:         final quotes = <String, int>{};
4135:         for (final quoteEntry in stationMapRaw.entries) {
4136:           final commodityId = quoteEntry.key.toString();
4137:           if (_commodityById(commodityId) == null) {
4138:             continue;
4139:           }
4140:           final quoteValue = quoteEntry.value;
4141:           if (quoteValue is num) {
4142:             quotes[commodityId] = quoteValue.toInt().clamp(1, 9999).toInt();
4143:           }
4144:         }
4145:         if (quotes.isNotEmpty) {
4146:           _stationMarkets[stationId] = quotes;
4147:         }
4148:       }
4149:     }
4150:     for (final station in _allStations) {
4151:       _stationMarkets.putIfAbsent(
4152:         station.id,
4153:         () => _generateMarketFor(station),
4154:       );
4155:     }
4156:     _stationReputation.clear();
4157:     final repRaw = map['stationReputation'];
4158:     if (repRaw is Map) {
4159:       for (final entry in repRaw.entries) {
4160:         final stationId = int.tryParse(entry.key.toString());
4161:         if (stationId == null || _stationByIdOrNull(stationId) == null) {
4162:           continue;
4163:         }
4164:         final value = entry.value;
4165:         if (value is num) {
4166:           _stationReputation[stationId] = value.toInt().clamp(-40, 80).toInt();
4167:         }
4168:       }
4169:     }
4170:     for (final station in _allStations) {
4171:       _stationReputation.putIfAbsent(station.id, () => 0);
4172:     }
4173:     _stationOffers.clear();
4174:     final offers = map['stationOffers'];
4175:     if (offers is List) {
4176:       for (final item in offers) {
4177:         if (item is Map) {
4178:           final offer = _contractFromMap(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item));
4179:           _stationOffers[offer.pickup.id] = offer;
4180:         }
4181:       }
4182:     }
4183:     for (final station in _allStations) {
4184:       _stationOffers.putIfAbsent(
4185:         station.id,
4186:         () => _generateContractFor(station),
4187:       );
4188:     }
4189: 
4190:     final active = map['activeContract'];
4191:     activeContract = active is Map
4192:         ? _contractFromMap(Map<String, dynamic>.from(active))
4193:         : null;
4194: 
4195:     final dockedId = (map['dockedStationId'] as num?)?.toInt();
4196:     dockedStation = dockedId == null
4197:         ? null
4198:         : _stationIfInCurrentSector(dockedId);
4199:     if (dockedStation != null) {
4200:       playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
4201:       playerPosition = dockedStation!.position + const Offset(0, 88);
4202:     }
4203: 
4204:     commsLog.clear();
4205:     final logLines = map['commsLog'];
4206:     if (logLines is List) {
4207:       for (final line in logLines) {
4208:         if (line is String) {
4209:           commsLog.add(line);
4210:         }
4211:       }
4212:     }
4213:     if (commsLog.isEmpty) {
4214:       _log('Save restored.');
4215:     } else {
4216:       _log('Save restored in $sectorName.');
4217:     }
4218: 
4219:     activeEncounter = null;
4220:     projectiles.clear();
4221:     blasts.clear();
4222:     pirates
4223:       ..clear()
4224:       ..addAll(
4225:         List.generate(3 + _rng.nextInt(2), (_) => _spawnPirate(initial: true)),
4226:       );
4227:     _trackedPirateId = (map['trackedPirateId'] as num?)?.toInt();
4228:     _refreshDerivedState();
4229:     _evaluateCampaignProgress(grantRewards: false, emitLogs: false);
4230:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
4231:   }
4232: 
4233:   Map<String, dynamic> _toSaveMap() {
4234:     return <String, dynamic>{
4235:       'version': saveVersion,
4236:       'sectorIndex': sectorIndex,
4237:       'clock': _clock,
4238:       'playerPosition': {'x': playerPosition.dx, 'y': playerPosition.dy},
4239:       'playerVelocity': {'x': playerVelocity.dx, 'y': playerVelocity.dy},
4240:       'playerFacing': playerFacing,
4241:       'playerHull': playerHull,
4242:       'playerShield': playerShield,
4243:       'playerEnergy': playerEnergy,
4244:       'playerFuel': playerFuel,
4245:       'credits': credits,
4246:       'cargoCapacity': cargoCapacity,
4247:       'cargoUsed': cargoUsed,
4248:       'tradeCargo': _tradeCargo,
4249:       'kills': kills,
4250:       'contractsDelivered': contractsDelivered,
4251:       'crossSectorContractsDelivered': crossSectorContractsDelivered,
4252:       'jumpCount': jumpCount,
4253:       'upgradesPurchased': upgradesPurchased,
4254:       'cockpitMode': cockpitMode,
4255:       'campaignIndex': _campaignIndex,
4256:       'visitedSectors': _visitedSectors.toList()..sort(),
4257:       'engineUpgradeTier': engineUpgradeTier,
4258:       'weaponUpgradeTier': weaponUpgradeTier,
4259:       'shieldUpgradeTier': shieldUpgradeTier,
4260:       'cargoUpgradeTier': cargoUpgradeTier,
4261:       'dockedStationId': dockedStation?.id,
4262:       'trackedPirateId': _trackedPirateId,
4263:       'power': {
4264:         for (final channel in PowerChannel.values) channel.name: power[channel],
4265:       },
4266:       'activeContract': activeContract == null
4267:           ? null
4268:           : _contractToMap(activeContract!),
4269:       'stationOffers': _stationOffers.values.map(_contractToMap).toList(),
4270:       'stationMarkets': {
4271:         for (final entry in _stationMarkets.entries)
4272:           '${entry.key}': Map<String, int>.from(entry.value),
4273:       },
4274:       'stationReputation': {
4275:         for (final entry in _stationReputation.entries)
4276:           '${entry.key}': entry.value,
4277:       },
4278:       'harvestedResourceIds': _harvestedResourceIds.toList()..sort(),
4279:       'unlockedLoreIds': _unlockedLoreIds.toList()..sort(),
4280:       'commsLog': commsLog.take(10).toList(),
4281:     };
4282:   }
4283: 
4284:   Map<String, dynamic> _contractToMap(CargoContract contract) {
4285:     return <String, dynamic>{
4286:       'id': contract.id,
4287:       'pickupId': contract.pickup.id,
4288:       'destinationId': contract.destination.id,
4289:       'cargoUnits': contract.cargoUnits,
4290:       'rewardCredits': contract.rewardCredits,
4291:       'cargoName': contract.cargoName,
4292:       'pickedUp': contract.pickedUp,
4293:     };
4294:   }
4295: 
4296:   CargoContract _contractFromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
4297:     final id = (map['id'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? ++_contractIdSeed;
4298:     _contractIdSeed = math.max(_contractIdSeed, id);
4299:     return CargoContract(
4300:       id: id,
4301:       pickup: _stationById((map['pickupId'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 1),
4302:       destination: _stationById((map['destinationId'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 2),
4303:       cargoUnits: (map['cargoUnits'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 2,
4304:       rewardCredits: (map['rewardCredits'] as num?)?.toInt() ?? 100,
4305:       cargoName: (map['cargoName'] as String?) ?? 'Cargo',
4306:       pickedUp: (map['pickedUp'] as bool?) ?? false,
4307:     );
4308:   }
4309: 
4310:   void _setSector(int index, {Offset? spawnPosition, required bool initial}) {
4311:     if (index < 0 || index >= _sectorLayouts.length) {
4312:       throw RangeError.range(index, 0, _sectorLayouts.length - 1, 'index');
4313:     }
4314:     final layout = _sectorLayouts[index];
4315:     final firstVisitToSector = _visitedSectors.add(index);
4316:     sectorIndex = index;
4317:     sectorName = layout.name;
4318:     stations
4319:       ..clear()
4320:       ..addAll(layout.stations);
4321:     portals
4322:       ..clear()
4323:       ..addAll(layout.portals);
4324:     resources
4325:       ..clear()
4326:       ..addAll(
4327:         layout.resources.where(
4328:           (resource) => !_harvestedResourceIds.contains(resource.id),
4329:         ),
4330:       );
4331:     _rebuildStars(layout.starSeed);
4332: 
4333:     dockedStation = null;
4334:     dockCandidate = null;
4335:     jumpCandidate = null;
4336:     activeEncounter = null;
4337:     projectiles.clear();
4338:     blasts.clear();
4339: 
4340:     if (spawnPosition != null) {
4341:       playerPosition = spawnPosition;
4342:     } else {
4343:       playerPosition = initial
4344:           ? switch (index) {
4345:               0 => const Offset(1640, 1320),
4346:               1 => const Offset(2140, 1760),
4347:               _ => const Offset(1960, 1720),
4348:             }
4349:           : stations.first.position + const Offset(0, 180);
4350:     }
4351: 
4352:     pirates
4353:       ..clear()
4354:       ..addAll(List.generate(4, (_) => _spawnPirate(initial: true)));
4355:     _spawnTimer = 3 + _rng.nextDouble() * 2;
4356:     _encounterTimer = 12 + _rng.nextDouble() * 12;
4357: 
4358:     _refreshDerivedState();
4359:     if (!initial) {
4360:       _log('Sector transit complete: $sectorName.');
4361:     }
4362:     if (firstVisitToSector) {
4363:       _unlockLore('sector-$index', silent: initial);
4364:     }
4365:     if (firstVisitToSector && !initial) {
4366:       _evaluateCampaignProgress();
4367:     }
4368:   }
4369: 
4370:   void _rebuildStars(int seed) {
4371:     final r = math.Random(seed);
4372:     stars.clear();
4373:     for (var i = 0; i < 240; i++) {
4374:       stars.add(
4375:         StarPoint(
4376:           position: Offset(
4377:             r.nextDouble() * worldWidth,
4378:             r.nextDouble() * worldHeight,
4379:           ),
4380:           radius: r.nextDouble() * 1.8 + 0.4,
4381:           alpha: r.nextDouble() * 0.55 + 0.15,
4382:           tint: r.nextInt(3),
4383:         ),
4384:       );
4385:     }
4386:   }
4387: 
4388:   void _emitCue(GameAudioCue cue) {
4389:     _lastAudioCue = cue;
4390:     _audioCueSerial += 1;
4391:   }
4392: 
4393:   void _rebalancePower() {
4394:     for (final channel in PowerChannel.values) {
4395:       power[channel] = (power[channel] ?? 30).clamp(10, 80).toInt();
4396:     }
4397:     while (totalPowerAllocation > 100) {
4398:       final donor = PowerChannel.values.reduce(
4399:         (a, b) => power[a]! > power[b]! ? a : b,
4400:       );
4401:       if (power[donor]! <= 10) break;
4402:       power[donor] = power[donor]! - 5;
4403:     }
4404:     while (totalPowerAllocation < 100) {
4405:       final receiver = PowerChannel.values.reduce(
4406:         (a, b) => power[a]! < power[b]! ? a : b,
4407:       );
4408:       if (power[receiver]! >= 80) break;
4409:       power[receiver] = power[receiver]! + 5;
4410:     }
4411:   }
4412: 
4413:   DialogueEncounter _buildRandomEncounter() {
4414:     final stationName = nearestStation?.name ?? 'unknown relay';
4415:     final contract = activeContract;
4416:     final templates = <DialogueEncounter>[
4417:       DialogueEncounter(
4418:         title: 'Distress Beacon',
4419:         body:
4420:             'A damaged courier near $stationName requests fuel transfer and escort clearance.',
4421:         options: [
4422:           DialogueOption(
4423:             label: 'Transfer fuel and credits',
4424:             creditsDelta: 37,
4425:             fuelDelta: -8,
4426:             resultLog:
4427:                 'You assist the courier. A grateful broker wires 55 cr after docking.',
4428:           ),
4429:           DialogueOption(
4430:             label: 'Offer navigation telemetry only',
4431:             energyDelta: -6,
4432:             resultLog:
4433:                 'Telemetry uplink sent. Small goodwill stipend received (+18 cr).',
4434:             creditsDelta: 18,
4435:           ),
4436:           DialogueOption(
4437:             label: 'Ignore beacon',
4438:             resultLog: 'You ignore the beacon and continue on course.',
4439:           ),
4440:         ],
4441:       ),
4442:       DialogueEncounter(
4443:         title: 'Trader Hail',
4444:         body:
4445:             'A free trader offers black-market shield capacitors and rumors of pirate patrols.',
4446:         options: [
4447:           DialogueOption(
4448:             label: 'Buy capacitors (24 cr) and recharge shields',
4449:             creditsDelta: -24,
4450:             shieldDelta: 26,
4451:             resultLog: 'Capacitors installed. Shields spike upward.',
4452:           ),
4453:           DialogueOption(
4454:             label: 'Sell route intel (+30 cr)',
4455:             creditsDelta: 30,
4456:             spawnPirates: 1,
4457:             resultLog:
4458:                 'Trader pays for intel, but leaked routes attract a pirate contact.',
4459:           ),
4460:           DialogueOption(
4461:             label: 'Decline and move on',
4462:             resultLog: 'You decline the trade.',
4463:           ),
4464:         ],
4465:       ),
4466:       DialogueEncounter(
4467:         title: 'Patrol Scan',
4468:         body:
4469:             'Regional patrol requests an identification scan${contract == null ? '' : ' and asks about your cargo manifest'}.',
4470:         options: [
4471:           DialogueOption(
4472:             label: 'Comply with scan',
4473:             resultLog:
4474:                 'Patrol clears your transponder and marks nearby pirates on your tac display.',
4475:             energyDelta: 4,
4476:           ),
4477:           DialogueOption(
4478:             label: 'Bribe patrol dispatcher (+/- credits)',
4479:             creditsDelta: -12,
4480:             resultLog:
4481:                 'The dispatcher takes your credits and quietly shares gate traffic timings.',
4482:             fuelDelta: 3,
4483:           ),
4484:           DialogueOption(
4485:             label: 'Spoof transponder',
4486:             spawnPirates: 1,
4487:             resultLog: 'Spoof detected. Hostile contact appears on local scan.',
4488:             energyDelta: -10,
4489:           ),
4490:         ],
4491:       ),
4492:       DialogueEncounter(
4493:         title: 'Salvage Drift',
4494:         body:
4495:             'A shattered hull section tumbles through the lane. Sensors detect recoverable materials.',
4496:         options: [
4497:           DialogueOption(
4498:             label: 'Conduct salvage pass',
4499:             creditsDelta: 42,
4500:             hullDelta: -4,
4501:             resultLog:
4502:                 'You recover salvage worth 42 cr but scrape the hull during retrieval.',
4503:           ),
4504:           DialogueOption(
4505:             label: 'Ping salvage coordinates to station control',
4506:             creditsDelta: 20,
4507:             resultLog:
4508:                 'Station control records your report and pays a finder fee.',
4509:           ),
4510:           DialogueOption(
4511:             label: 'Avoid debris field',
4512:             resultLog: 'You steer clear of the debris field.',
4513:           ),

4962:   static final List<Station> _allStations = _sectorLayouts
4963:       .expand((layout) => layout.stations)
4964:       .toList(growable: false);
4965: 
4966:   Station _stationById(int id) {
4967:     for (final station in _allStations) {
4968:       if (station.id == id) {
4969:         return station;
4970:       }
4971:     }
4972:     throw FormatException('Unknown station id $id');
4973:   }
4974: 
4975:   Station? _stationByIdOrNull(int id) {
4976:     for (final station in _allStations) {
4977:       if (station.id == id) {
4978:         return station;
4979:       }
4980:     }
4981:     return null;
4982:   }
4983: 
4984:   Station? _stationIfInCurrentSector(int id) {
4985:     for (final station in stations) {
4986:       if (station.id == id) {
4987:         return station;
4988:       }
4989:     }
4990:     return null;
4991:   }
4992: 
4993:   PortalGate _portalById(int id, int sector) {
4994:     final layout = _sectorLayouts[sector];
4995:     for (final portal in layout.portals) {
4996:       if (portal.id == id) {
4997:         return portal;
4998:       }
4999:     }
5000:     throw FormatException('Unknown portal $id in sector $sector');
5001:   }
5002: }
5003:

5005: // Renders the full flight scene: starfield, meshes, combat cues, cockpit
5006: // overlays, and post-processing inside the fixed frame.
5007: class Sector3DPainter extends CustomPainter {
5008:   Sector3DPainter(this.game, {this.drawLegacyHud = true});
5009: 
5010:   final VanSoleGame game;
5011:   final bool drawLegacyHud;
5012:   static const double _cameraPitch = 0.29;
5013:   static const double _nearClip = 34;
5014:   static const double _farClip = 6800;
5015:   static final _MeshModel _playerMesh = _buildPlayerMesh();
5016:   static final _MeshModel _pirateMesh = _buildPirateMesh();
5017:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshBastion = _buildStationMeshBastion();
5018:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshHalo = _buildStationMeshHalo();
5019:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshSpire = _buildStationMeshSpire();
5020:   static final _MeshModel _stationMeshCitadel = _buildStationMeshCitadel();
5021:   static final _MeshModel _stationPodMesh = _buildStationPodMesh();
5022:   static final _MeshModel _resourceCrystalMesh = _buildResourceCrystalMesh();
5023:   static final _MeshModel _portalMesh = _buildPortalMesh();
5024:   static final _MeshModel _projectileMesh = _buildProjectileMesh();
5025:   static final _MeshModel _blastMesh = _buildBlastMesh();
5026:   static final _MeshModel _characterMesh = _buildCharacterMesh();
5027: 
5028:   @override
5029:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
5030:     final windowRect = Offset.zero & size;
5031:     canvas.drawRect(windowRect, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF000000));
5032:     if (size.width < 180 || size.height < 110) {
5033:       return;
5034:     }
5035:     final sceneSize = size;
5036:     canvas.save();
5037: 
5038:     final rect = Offset.zero & sceneSize;
5039:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(sceneSize);
5040:     final viewportInner = sceneSize.width <= 500
5041:         ? _dosViewportInnerRect
5042:         : viewportRect.deflate(drawLegacyHud ? 2 : 8);
5043:     final center = Offset(
5044:       viewportInner.center.dx,
5045:       viewportInner.top + viewportInner.height * (drawLegacyHud ? 0.58 : 0.56),
5046:     );
5047:     final focal = viewportInner.shortestSide * (drawLegacyHud ? 1.02 : 1.22);
5048:     final sinFacing = math.sin(game.playerFacing);
5049:     final cosFacing = math.cos(game.playerFacing);
5050:     final lightDir = _Vec3(
5051:       -0.42 + math.sin(game._clock * 0.27) * 0.22,
5052:       0.76,
5053:       -0.52,
5054:     ).normalized();
5055:     canvas.drawRect(rect, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF010205));
5056:     canvas.drawRect(viewportInner, Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF000104));
5057:     final speedFactor = (game.playerVelocity.distance / 360)
5058:         .clamp(0.0, 1.0)
5059:         .toDouble();
5060:     _drawDeepSpaceBackdrop(
5061:       canvas,
5062:       viewportInner,
5063:       speedFactor: speedFactor,
5064:     );
5065:     canvas.drawRect(
5066:       viewportInner,
5067:       Paint()
5068:         ..shader = RadialGradient(
5069:           center: const Alignment(0, -0.25),
5070:           radius: 1.1,
5071:           colors: [
5072:             const Color(0xFF0A1730).withValues(alpha: 0.22),
5073:             Colors.transparent,
5074:           ],
5075:         ).createShader(viewportInner),
5076:     );
5077:     final dosSpriteStyle = drawLegacyHud && size.width < 220;
5078:     final horizonCenter = viewportInner.center;
5079:     final reticleCenter = viewportInner.center;
5080:     _TargetSnapshot? targetSnapshot;
5081:     final offscreenThreatDirections = <Offset>[];
5082:     canvas.save();
5083:     canvas.clipRect(viewportInner);
5084: 
5085:     for (final star in game.stars) {
5086:       final dx = _wrappedDelta(
5087:         star.position.dx - game.playerPosition.dx,
5088:         VanSoleGame.worldWidth,
5089:       );
5090:       final dy = _wrappedDelta(
5091:         star.position.dy - game.playerPosition.dy,
5092:         VanSoleGame.worldHeight,
5093:       );
5094:       final right = -dx * sinFacing + dy * cosFacing;
5095:       final forward = dx * cosFacing + dy * sinFacing;
5096:       final projected = _project3D(
5097:         center: center,
5098:         focal: focal,
5099:         right: right * 0.24,
5100:         up: 700 + star.tint * 120,
5101:         forward: 2600 + forward * 0.25,
5102:       );
5103:       if (projected == null) {
5104:         continue;
5105:       }
5106:       final starColor = switch (star.tint) {
5107:         0 => const Color(0xFFDDE9FF),
5108:         1 => const Color(0xFFFFE7C2),
5109:         _ => const Color(0xFFB7F6FF),
5110:       };
5111:       final alpha = (star.alpha * (0.55 + projected.scale * 0.25))
5112:           .clamp(0.08, 0.95)
5113:           .toDouble();
5114:       canvas.drawCircle(
5115:         projected.screen,
5116:         (star.radius * (0.8 + projected.scale * 0.55)).clamp(0.6, 2.5),
5117:         Paint()..color = starColor.withValues(alpha: alpha),
5118:       );
5119:       if (!dosSpriteStyle && speedFactor > 0.24) {
5120:         final dir = _normalize(projected.screen - horizonCenter);
5121:         final streakLen = (3 + speedFactor * 12 + projected.scale * 2.4).clamp(
5122:           2.5,
5123:           18.0,
5124:         );
5125:         canvas.drawLine(
5126:           projected.screen - dir * streakLen,
5127:           projected.screen,
5128:           Paint()
5129:             ..color = starColor.withValues(alpha: alpha * 0.5)
5130:             ..strokeWidth = 1.0
5131:             ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
5132:         );
5133:       }
5134:     }
5135:     _drawBackgroundPlanets(
5136:       canvas,
5137:       viewportInner,
5138:       center: center,
5139:       focal: focal,
5140:       sinFacing: sinFacing,
5141:       cosFacing: cosFacing,
5142:     );
5143:     _ProjectedPoint? harvestProjection;
5144:     ResourceNode? harvestResourceNode;
5145: 
5146:     for (final resource in game.resources) {
5147:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5148:         resource.position,
5149:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5150:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5151:       );
5152:       if (view.forward < -220) {
5153:         continue;
5154:       }
5155:       final p = _project3D(
5156:         center: center,
5157:         focal: focal,
5158:         right: view.right,
5159:         up: -170,
5160:         forward: view.forward,
5161:       );
5162:       if (p == null) {
5163:         continue;
5164:       }
5165:       final isHarvestTarget = game.harvestCandidate?.id == resource.id;
5166:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5167:         _drawResourceNodeSprite(
5168:           canvas,
5169:           p.screen,
5170:           resource: resource,
5171:           size: (4 + p.scale * 11).clamp(4.0, 16.0).toDouble(),
5172:           highlighted: isHarvestTarget,
5173:         );
5174:       } else {
5175:         _drawResourceNodeMesh(
5176:           canvas,
5177:           center: center,
5178:           focal: focal,
5179:           resource: resource,
5180:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5181:           yaw: game._clock * 0.4 + resource.id * 0.03,
5182:           lightDir: lightDir,
5183:           highlighted: isHarvestTarget,
5184:         );
5185:       }
5186:       if (isHarvestTarget) {
5187:         harvestProjection = p;
5188:         harvestResourceNode = resource;
5189:       }
5190:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 2400) {
5191:         _drawLabel(
5192:           canvas,
5193:           p.screen + Offset(12 + p.scale * 2, 10 + p.scale * 2),
5194:           resource.name,
5195:           resource.color,
5196:         );
5197:       }
5198:     }
5199: 
5200:     for (final station in game.stations) {
5201:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5202:         station.position,
5203:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5204:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5205:       );
5206:       if (view.forward < -180) {
5207:         continue;
5208:       }
5209:       final p = _project3D(
5210:         center: center,
5211:         focal: focal,
5212:         right: view.right,
5213:         up: -190,
5214:         forward: view.forward,
5215:       );
5216:       if (p == null) {
5217:         continue;
5218:       }
5219:       final fade = (1 - p.depth / _farClip).clamp(0.15, 1.0).toDouble();
5220:       final glowRadius = (16 + p.scale * 10).clamp(10.0, 52.0).toDouble();
5221:       final stationYaw = game._clock * 0.19 + station.id * 0.13;
5222:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5223:         _drawStationSprite(
5224:           canvas,
5225:           p.screen,
5226:           station,
5227:           size: (6 + p.scale * 22).clamp(5.0, 30.0).toDouble(),
5228:           tracked: game.dockCandidate?.id == station.id,
5229:         );
5230:       } else {
5231:         canvas.drawCircle(
5232:           p.screen,
5233:           glowRadius * 1.5,
5234:           Paint()
5235:             ..color = station.color.withValues(alpha: 0.14 * fade)
5236:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 8),
5237:         );
5238:         _drawModernStationCluster(
5239:           canvas,
5240:           center: center,
5241:           focal: focal,
5242:           station: station,
5243:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -190, view.forward),
5244:           yaw: stationYaw,
5245:           lightDir: lightDir,
5246:           tracked: game.dockCandidate?.id == station.id,
5247:         );
5248:       }
5249:       _drawStationApproachLights(
5250:         canvas,
5251:         center: center,
5252:         focal: focal,
5253:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -190, view.forward),
5254:         yaw: stationYaw,
5255:         color: station.color,
5256:       );
5257: 
5258:       if (game.dockedStation?.id == station.id ||
5259:           game.dockCandidate?.id == station.id) {
5260:         canvas.drawCircle(
5261:           p.screen,
5262:           glowRadius * 1.65,
5263:           Paint()
5264:             ..color =
5265:                 (game.dockedStation?.id == station.id
5266:                         ? const Color(0xFF4ADE80)
5267:                         : const Color(0xFFFBBF24))
5268:                     .withValues(alpha: 0.38)
5269:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5270:             ..strokeWidth = 2,
5271:         );
5272:       }
5273: 
5274:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 2900) {
5275:         _drawLabel(
5276:           canvas,
5277:           p.screen + Offset(16 + p.scale * 3, -20 - p.scale * 5),
5278:           station.name,
5279:           station.color,
5280:         );
5281:       }
5282:     }
5283: 
5284:     for (final portal in game.portals) {
5285:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5286:         portal.position,
5287:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5288:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5289:       );
5290:       if (view.forward < -220) {
5291:         continue;
5292:       }
5293:       final p = _project3D(
5294:         center: center,
5295:         focal: focal,
5296:         right: view.right,
5297:         up: -150,
5298:         forward: view.forward,
5299:       );
5300:       if (p == null) {
5301:         continue;
5302:       }
5303:       final isJumpCandidate = game.jumpCandidate?.id == portal.id;
5304:       final pulse = 0.62 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.2 + portal.id) * 0.2;
5305:       final ringRadius = (16 + p.scale * 15).clamp(8.0, 58.0).toDouble();
5306:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5307:         _drawPortalSprite(
5308:           canvas,
5309:           p.screen,
5310:           size: (6 + p.scale * 15).clamp(6.0, 24.0).toDouble(),
5311:           color: portal.color,
5312:         );
5313:       } else {
5314:         canvas.drawCircle(
5315:           p.screen,
5316:           ringRadius * 2.0,
5317:           Paint()
5318:             ..color = portal.color.withValues(alpha: 0.1 * pulse)
5319:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 9),
5320:         );
5321:         _drawMesh(
5322:           canvas,
5323:           center: center,
5324:           focal: focal,
5325:           mesh: _portalMesh,
5326:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -150, view.forward),
5327:           yaw: game._clock * 0.7 + portal.id * 0.03,
5328:           baseColor: Color.lerp(portal.color, const Color(0xFF5C7CA2), 0.46)!,
5329:           lightDir: lightDir,
5330:           ambient: 0.2,
5331:           emissiveBoost: 0.14,
5332:           edgeAlpha: 0.2,
5333:         );
5334:       }
5335:       if (isJumpCandidate) {
5336:         canvas.drawCircle(
5337:           p.screen,
5338:           ringRadius * 1.95,
5339:           Paint()
5340:             ..color = const Color(0xFFA78BFA).withValues(alpha: 0.36)
5341:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5342:             ..strokeWidth = 2,
5343:         );
5344:       }
5345:       if (drawLegacyHud && p.depth < 3200) {
5346:         _drawLabel(
5347:           canvas,
5348:           p.screen + Offset(18 + p.scale * 2.5, 10 + p.scale * 3.5),
5349:           portal.name,
5350:           portal.color,
5351:         );
5352:       }
5353:     }
5354: 
5355:     for (final blast in game.blasts) {
5356:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5357:         blast.position,
5358:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5359:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5360:       );
5361:       if (view.forward < -180) {
5362:         continue;
5363:       }
5364:       final p = _project3D(
5365:         center: center,
5366:         focal: focal,
5367:         right: view.right,
5368:         up: -170,
5369:         forward: view.forward,
5370:       );
5371:       if (p == null) {
5372:         continue;
5373:       }
5374:       final t = (blast.ttl / 0.45).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
5375:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5376:         canvas.drawCircle(
5377:           p.screen,
5378:           (blast.radius * (1.0 - t) * p.scale).clamp(1.0, 16.0),
5379:           Paint()
5380:             ..isAntiAlias = false
5381:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFFB454).withValues(alpha: 0.52 * t),
5382:         );
5383:         continue;
5384:       }
5385:       _drawMesh(
5386:         canvas,
5387:         center: center,
5388:         focal: focal,
5389:         mesh: _blastMesh,
5390:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5391:         yaw: game._clock * 1.2 + blast.radius * 0.01,
5392:         baseColor: const Color(0xFFFFA04A),
5393:         lightDir: lightDir,
5394:         ambient: 0.26,
5395:         emissiveBoost: 0.46 * t,
5396:         edgeAlpha: 0.0,
5397:         scale: (0.22 + blast.radius * 0.012) * (1.3 - t),
5398:       );
5399:       canvas.drawCircle(
5400:         p.screen,
5401:         (blast.radius * (1.2 - t) * p.scale).clamp(2.0, 84.0),
5402:         Paint()
5403:           ..color = const Color(0xFFFFB454).withValues(alpha: t * 0.4)
5404:           ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5405:           ..strokeWidth = 2,
5406:       );
5407:     }
5408: 
5409:     if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5410:       _drawPlayerShipSprite(
5411:         canvas,
5412:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 8),
5413:         facing: game.playerFacing,
5414:         pulse: 0.84 + math.sin(game._clock * 5.8) * 0.08,
5415:       );
5416:     } else {
5417:       _drawPlayerShipMesh(
5418:         canvas,
5419:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 11),
5420:         facing: game.playerFacing,
5421:       );
5422:     }
5423: 
5424:     for (final shot in game.projectiles) {
5425:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5426:         shot.position,
5427:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5428:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5429:       );
5430:       if (view.forward < -160) {
5431:         continue;
5432:       }
5433:       final p = _project3D(
5434:         center: center,
5435:         focal: focal,
5436:         right: view.right,
5437:         up: -170,
5438:         forward: view.forward,
5439:       );
5440:       if (p == null) {
5441:         continue;
5442:       }
5443:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5444:         final color = shot.friendly
5445:             ? const Color(0xFF60A5FA)
5446:             : const Color(0xFFF87171);
5447:         canvas.drawRect(
5448:           Rect.fromCenter(center: p.screen, width: 2.2, height: 2.2),
5449:           Paint()
5450:             ..isAntiAlias = false
5451:             ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.92),
5452:         );
5453:         continue;
5454:       }
5455:       final shotYaw = math.atan2(shot.velocity.dx, shot.velocity.dy);
5456:       _drawMesh(
5457:         canvas,
5458:         center: center,
5459:         focal: focal,
5460:         mesh: _projectileMesh,
5461:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -170, view.forward),
5462:         yaw: shotYaw,
5463:         baseColor: shot.friendly
5464:             ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8)
5465:             : const Color(0xFFFF8A80),
5466:         lightDir: lightDir,
5467:         ambient: 0.22,
5468:         emissiveBoost: 0.9,
5469:         edgeAlpha: 0.0,
5470:         scale: 0.28,
5471:       );
5472:       final radius = (p.scale * 2.3).clamp(1.2, 5.2).toDouble();
5473:       final tailView = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5474:         shot.position - shot.velocity * 0.028,
5475:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5476:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5477:       );
5478:       final tail = _project3D(
5479:         center: center,
5480:         focal: focal,
5481:         right: tailView.right,
5482:         up: -170,
5483:         forward: tailView.forward,
5484:       );
5485:       if (tail != null) {
5486:         canvas.drawLine(
5487:           tail.screen,
5488:           p.screen,
5489:           Paint()
5490:             ..color =
5491:                 (shot.friendly
5492:                         ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8)
5493:                         : const Color(0xFFFF8A80))
5494:                     .withValues(alpha: 0.42)
5495:             ..strokeWidth = radius * 0.85
5496:             ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
5497:         );
5498:       }
5499:       canvas.drawCircle(
5500:         p.screen,
5501:         radius,
5502:         Paint()
5503:           ..color = shot.friendly
5504:               ? const Color(0xFF8BFFE8).withValues(alpha: 0.9)
5505:               : const Color(0xFFFF8A80).withValues(alpha: 0.9),
5506:       );
5507:     }
5508: 
5509:     for (final pirate in game.pirates) {
5510:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5511:         pirate.position,
5512:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5513:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5514:       );
5515:       if (view.forward < -240) {
5516:         continue;
5517:       }
5518:       final p = _project3D(
5519:         center: center,
5520:         focal: focal,
5521:         right: view.right,
5522:         up: -155,
5523:         forward: view.forward,
5524:       );
5525:       if (p == null) {
5526:         continue;
5527:       }
5528:       final isTracked = game.trackedPirateId == pirate.trackingId;
5529:       final distance = (pirate.position - game.playerPosition).distance;
5530:       final isOnScreen =
5531:           p.screen.dx >= viewportInner.left + 6 &&
5532:           p.screen.dx <= viewportInner.right - 6 &&
5533:           p.screen.dy >= viewportInner.top + 6 &&
5534:           p.screen.dy <= viewportInner.bottom - 6;
5535:       if (!isOnScreen && distance < 2200) {
5536:         offscreenThreatDirections.add(_normalize(p.screen - reticleCenter));
5537:       }
5538:       final targetScore = (p.screen - reticleCenter).distance + p.depth * 0.05;
5539:       if (isTracked ||
5540:           (isOnScreen &&
5541:               (targetSnapshot == null ||
5542:                   (!targetSnapshot.isTracked &&
5543:                       targetScore < targetSnapshot.score)))) {
5544:         targetSnapshot = _TargetSnapshot(
5545:           pirate: pirate,
5546:           projection: p,
5547:           score: targetScore,
5548:           distance: distance,
5549:           isTracked: isTracked,
5550:           isOnScreen: isOnScreen,
5551:         );
5552:       }
5553:       final relYaw = pirate.angle - game.playerFacing - math.pi / 2;
5554:       if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5555:         _drawPirateSprite(
5556:           canvas,
5557:           p.screen,
5558:           size: (5 + p.scale * 15).clamp(5.0, 24.0).toDouble(),
5559:           tracked: isTracked,
5560:           yaw: relYaw,
5561:         );
5562:       } else {
5563:         _drawMesh(
5564:           canvas,
5565:           center: center,
5566:           focal: focal,
5567:           mesh: _pirateMesh,
5568:           origin: _Vec3(view.right, -155, view.forward),
5569:           yaw: relYaw,
5570:           baseColor: isTracked
5571:               ? const Color(0xFFDCC56B)
5572:               : const Color(0xFF5EA0E9),
5573:           lightDir: lightDir,
5574:           ambient: 0.24,
5575:           emissiveBoost: 0.02,
5576:           edgeAlpha: 0.2,
5577:         );
5578:       }
5579:       if (isOnScreen) {
5580:         final outlineRadius = (8.6 + p.scale * 7.2).clamp(7.0, 24.0);
5581:         final outlineColor = isTracked
5582:             ? const Color(0xFFFDE68A)
5583:             : const Color(0xFFF87171);
5584:         canvas.drawCircle(
5585:           p.screen,
5586:           outlineRadius,
5587:           Paint()
5588:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5589:             ..strokeWidth = isTracked ? 1.35 : 1.0
5590:             ..color = outlineColor.withValues(alpha: isTracked ? 0.72 : 0.52),
5591:         );
5592:       }
5593: 
5594:       final shieldPct = (pirate.shield / 35).clamp(0.0, 1.0).toDouble();
5595:       if (shieldPct > 0) {
5596:         canvas.drawCircle(
5597:           p.screen,
5598:           (11 + p.scale * 8).clamp(7.0, 30.0),
5599:           Paint()
5600:             ..color = const Color(
5601:               0xFF93C5FD,
5602:             ).withValues(alpha: 0.15 + shieldPct * 0.18)
5603:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5604:             ..strokeWidth = 1.5,
5605:         );
5606:       }
5607: 
5608:       if (isTracked) {
5609:         final dotCenter =
5610:             p.screen + Offset(-11 - p.scale * 2, -11 - p.scale * 2);
5611:         canvas.drawCircle(
5612:           dotCenter,
5613:           (2.2 + p.scale * 0.9).clamp(2.0, 4.0),
5614:           Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF4ADE80).withValues(alpha: 0.95),
5615:         );
5616:         canvas.drawCircle(
5617:           dotCenter,
5618:           (4.4 + p.scale * 1.4).clamp(3.2, 8.0),
5619:           Paint()
5620:             ..color = const Color(0xFF4ADE80).withValues(alpha: 0.26)
5621:             ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5622:             ..strokeWidth = 1,
5623:         );
5624:       }
5625: 
5626:       final thruster = _projectLocalPoint(
5627:         center: center,
5628:         focal: focal,
5629:         origin: _Vec3(view.right, -155, view.forward),
5630:         yaw: relYaw,
5631:         local: const _Vec3(0, 1.4, -24),
5632:       );
5633:       if (thruster != null) {
5634:         final glow = (2.8 + p.scale * 4.4).clamp(2.0, 12.0).toDouble();
5635:         canvas.drawCircle(
5636:           thruster.screen,
5637:           glow,
5638:           Paint()
5639:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFFAFA6).withValues(alpha: 0.38)
5640:             ..maskFilter = const MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 6),
5641:         );
5642:       }
5643:     }
5644: 
5645:     if (game.dockCandidate != null) {
5646:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5647:         game.dockCandidate!.position,
5648:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5649:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5650:       );
5651:       final stationScreen = _project3D(
5652:         center: center,
5653:         focal: focal,
5654:         right: view.right,
5655:         up: -190,
5656:         forward: view.forward,
5657:       );
5658:       if (stationScreen != null) {
5659:         canvas.drawLine(
5660:           reticleCenter,
5661:           stationScreen.screen,
5662:           Paint()
5663:             ..color = const Color(0xFFFBBF24).withValues(alpha: 0.46)
5664:             ..strokeWidth = 1.6,
5665:         );
5666:         _drawReticle(
5667:           canvas,
5668:           stationScreen.screen,
5669:           const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
5670:           0.65 + math.sin(game._clock * 5) * 0.06,
5671:         );
5672:       }
5673:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5674:         _drawLabel(
5675:           canvas,
5676:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 18),
5677:           'Press E to dock',
5678:           const Color(0xFFFBBF24),
5679:         );
5680:       }
5681:     }
5682: 
5683:     if (game.jumpCandidate != null) {
5684:       final view = _viewSpaceForWorld(
5685:         game.jumpCandidate!.position,
5686:         sinFacing: sinFacing,
5687:         cosFacing: cosFacing,
5688:       );
5689:       final portalScreen = _project3D(
5690:         center: center,
5691:         focal: focal,
5692:         right: view.right,
5693:         up: -150,
5694:         forward: view.forward,
5695:       );
5696:       if (portalScreen != null) {
5697:         canvas.drawLine(
5698:           reticleCenter,
5699:           portalScreen.screen,
5700:           Paint()
5701:             ..color = const Color(0xFFA78BFA).withValues(alpha: 0.42)
5702:             ..strokeWidth = 1.4,
5703:         );
5704:         _drawReticle(
5705:           canvas,
5706:           portalScreen.screen,
5707:           const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
5708:           0.68 + math.sin(game._clock * 4.2) * 0.06,
5709:         );
5710:       }
5711:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5712:         _drawLabel(
5713:           canvas,
5714:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 34),
5715:           'Press J to jump',
5716:           const Color(0xFFA78BFA),
5717:         );
5718:       }
5719:     }
5720: 
5721:     if (harvestProjection != null && harvestResourceNode != null) {
5722:       _drawReticle(
5723:         canvas,
5724:         harvestProjection.screen,
5725:         harvestResourceNode.color,
5726:         0.64 + math.sin(game._clock * 4.4) * 0.05,
5727:       );
5728:       if (drawLegacyHud) {
5729:         _drawLabel(
5730:           canvas,
5731:           reticleCenter + const Offset(18, 50),
5732:           'Press H to harvest',
5733:           harvestResourceNode.color,
5734:         );
5735:       }
5736:     }
5737: 
5738:     _drawCombatOverlays(
5739:       canvas,
5740:       viewportInner,
5741:       center: center,
5742:       focal: focal,
5743:       sinFacing: sinFacing,
5744:       cosFacing: cosFacing,
5745:       reticleCenter: reticleCenter,
5746:       target: targetSnapshot,
5747:       offscreenThreatDirections: offscreenThreatDirections,
5748:     );
5749:     if (dosSpriteStyle) {
5750:       _drawDosCrtOverlay(canvas, viewportInner);
5751:     } else {
5752:       _drawPostProcessing(canvas, viewportInner, speedFactor: speedFactor);
5753:     }
5754:     canvas.restore();
5755:     if (game.cockpitMode == 4) {
5756:       _drawScienceScanOverlay(canvas, viewportInner, targetSnapshot);
5757:     }
5758:     if (drawLegacyHud) {
5759:       _drawCommsPrompt(canvas, viewportInner);
5760:       _drawEncounterCockpitOverlay(canvas, sceneSize);
5761:       _drawCockpitOverlay(canvas, sceneSize, reticleCenter);
5762:       _drawControlPanel(
5763:         canvas,
5764:         sceneSize,
5765:         target: targetSnapshot,
5766:         reticleCenter: reticleCenter,
5767:       );
5768:       _drawCommandStrip(canvas, sceneSize, targetSnapshot);
5769:     } else {
5770:       _drawViewportReticle(canvas, reticleCenter, sceneSize.width <= 500);
5771:       if (game.activeEncounter != null) {
5772:         _drawEncounterCockpitOverlay(canvas, sceneSize);
5773:       }
5774:     }
5775:     _drawDamageIndicator(canvas, reticleCenter);
5776: 
5777:     if (game.damageFlash > 0) {
5778:       canvas.drawRect(
5779:         rect,
5780:         Paint()
5781:           ..color = const Color(
5782:             0xFFFF4D4D,
5783:           ).withValues(alpha: game.damageFlash * 0.16),
5784:       );
5785:     }
5786:     canvas.restore();
5787:   }
5788: 
5789:   _ProjectedPoint? _project3D({
5790:     required Offset center,
5791:     required double focal,
5792:     required double right,
5793:     required double up,
5794:     required double forward,
5795:   }) {
5796:     final cp = math.cos(_cameraPitch);
5797:     final sp = math.sin(_cameraPitch);
5798:     final y = up * cp - forward * sp;
5799:     final z = up * sp + forward * cp;
5800:     if (z <= _nearClip || z > _farClip) {
5801:       return null;
5802:     }
5803:     final scale = focal / z;
5804:     final x = center.dx + right * scale;
5805:     final screenY = center.dy - y * scale;
5806:     return _ProjectedPoint(Offset(x, screenY), z, scale);
5807:   }
5808: 
5809:   _ProjectedPoint? _projectLocalPoint({
5810:     required Offset center,
5811:     required double focal,
5812:     required _Vec3 origin,
5813:     required double yaw,
5814:     required _Vec3 local,
5815:   }) {
5816:     final cy = math.cos(yaw);
5817:     final sy = math.sin(yaw);
5818:     final rotated = _Vec3(
5819:       local.x * cy - local.z * sy,
5820:       local.y,
5821:       local.x * sy + local.z * cy,
5822:     );
5823:     final view = origin + rotated;
5824:     return _project3D(
5825:       center: center,
5826:       focal: focal,
5827:       right: view.x,
5828:       up: view.y,
5829:       forward: view.z,
5830:     );
5831:   }
5832: 
5833:   _Vec3 _rotateLocalOffset(_Vec3 local, double yaw) {
5834:     final cy = math.cos(yaw);
5835:     final sy = math.sin(yaw);
5836:     return _Vec3(
5837:       local.x * cy - local.z * sy,
5838:       local.y,
5839:       local.x * sy + local.z * cy,
5840:     );
5841:   }
5842: 
5843:   ({double right, double forward}) _viewSpaceForWorld(
5844:     Offset world, {
5845:     required double sinFacing,
5846:     required double cosFacing,
5847:   }) {
5848:     final dx = world.dx - game.playerPosition.dx;
5849:     final dy = world.dy - game.playerPosition.dy;
5850:     return (
5851:       right: -dx * sinFacing + dy * cosFacing,
5852:       forward: dx * cosFacing + dy * sinFacing,
5853:     );
5854:   }
5855: 
5856:   double _wrappedDelta(double delta, double span) {
5857:     var value = delta;
5858:     while (value > span / 2) {
5859:       value -= span;
5860:     }
5861:     while (value < -span / 2) {
5862:       value += span;
5863:     }
5864:     return value;
5865:   }
5866: 
5867:   double _panelWidthFor(Size size) {
5868:     if (size.width <= 500) {
5869:       return (size.width * 0.265).clamp(80.0, 92.0).toDouble();
5870:     }
5871:     return (size.width * 0.29).clamp(224.0, 320.0).toDouble();
5872:   }
5873: 
5874:   Rect _viewportRectFor(Size size) {
5875:     if (!drawLegacyHud) {
5876:       final inset = size.width <= 500 ? 4.0 : 14.0;
5877:       return Rect.fromLTWH(
5878:         inset,
5879:         inset,
5880:         size.width - inset * 2,
5881:         size.height - inset * 2,
5882:       );
5883:     }
5884:     if (size.width <= 500) {
5885:       return _dosViewportRect;
5886:     }
5887:     final panelWidth = _panelWidthFor(size);
5888:     final left = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 8.0;
5889:     final top = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 10.0;
5890:     final rightGap = size.width <= 500 ? 4.0 : 24.0;
5891:     final bottomGap = size.width <= 500 ? 12.0 : 30.0;
5892:     return Rect.fromLTWH(
5893:       left,
5894:       top,
5895:       size.width - panelWidth - left - rightGap,
5896:       size.height - top - bottomGap,
5897:     );
5898:   }
5899: 
5900:   Rect _panelRectFor(Size size) {
5901:     if (size.width <= 500) {
5902:       return _dosPanelRect;
5903:     }
5904:     final panelWidth = _panelWidthFor(size);
5905:     final inset = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 8.0;
5906:     final top = size.width <= 500 ? 2.0 : 8.0;
5907:     final heightInset = size.width <= 500 ? 4.0 : 16.0;
5908:     return Rect.fromLTWH(
5909:       size.width - panelWidth - inset,
5910:       top,
5911:       panelWidth,
5912:       size.height - heightInset,
5913:     );
5914:   }
5915: 
5916:   void _drawViewportReticle(Canvas canvas, Offset reticleCenter, bool compact) {
5917:     if (compact) {
5918:       final p = Paint()
5919:         ..isAntiAlias = false
5920:         ..color = const Color(0xFF67E8F9).withValues(alpha: 0.76)
5921:         ..strokeWidth = 1;
5922:       canvas.drawLine(
5923:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-5, 0),
5924:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-2, 0),
5925:         p,
5926:       );
5927:       canvas.drawLine(
5928:         reticleCenter + const Offset(2, 0),
5929:         reticleCenter + const Offset(5, 0),
5930:         p,
5931:       );
5932:       canvas.drawLine(
5933:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -5),
5934:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -2),
5935:         p,
5936:       );
5937:       canvas.drawLine(
5938:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 2),
5939:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 5),
5940:         p,
5941:       );
5942:       return;
5943:     }
5944:     _drawReticle(
5945:       canvas,
5946:       reticleCenter,
5947:       const Color(0xFF67E8F9),
5948:       0.86 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.8) * 0.05,
5949:     );
5950:   }
5951: 
5952:   void _drawCockpitOverlay(Canvas canvas, Size size, Offset reticleCenter) {
5953:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(size);
5954:     final compact = size.width <= 500;
5955:     final framePad = compact ? 1.5 : 5.0;
5956:     final frameOuter = Rect.fromLTWH(
5957:       viewportRect.left - framePad,
5958:       viewportRect.top - framePad,
5959:       viewportRect.width + framePad * 2,
5960:       viewportRect.height + framePad * 2,
5961:     );
5962:     final shellPath = Path.combine(
5963:       PathOperation.difference,
5964:       Path()..addRect(frameOuter),
5965:       Path()..addRect(viewportRect),
5966:     );
5967:     canvas.drawPath(
5968:       shellPath,
5969:       Paint()
5970:         ..shader = const LinearGradient(
5971:           begin: Alignment.topCenter,
5972:           end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
5973:           colors: [Color(0xFF89909A), Color(0xFF444B56), Color(0xFF949BA5)],
5974:           stops: [0.0, 0.52, 1.0],
5975:         ).createShader(frameOuter),
5976:     );
5977:     canvas.drawRect(
5978:       viewportRect,
5979:       Paint()
5980:         ..shader = RadialGradient(
5981:           center: Alignment.center,
5982:           radius: 1.02,
5983:           colors: [
5984:             Colors.transparent,
5985:             Colors.transparent,
5986:             Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.14),
5987:           ],
5988:           stops: const [0.65, 0.84, 1.0],
5989:         ).createShader(viewportRect),
5990:     );
5991:     canvas.drawRect(
5992:       frameOuter,
5993:       Paint()
5994:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
5995:         ..strokeWidth = compact ? 0.8 : 1.4
5996:         ..color = const Color(0xFFE5E7EB).withValues(alpha: 0.45),
5997:     );
5998:     canvas.drawRect(
5999:       viewportRect.deflate(1),
6000:       Paint()
6001:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6002:         ..strokeWidth = compact ? 0.7 : 1
6003:         ..color = const Color(0xFF0EA5E9).withValues(alpha: 0.22),
6004:     );
6005:     for (final corner in <Offset>[
6006:       frameOuter.topLeft,
6007:       frameOuter.topRight,
6008:       frameOuter.bottomLeft,
6009:       frameOuter.bottomRight,
6010:     ]) {
6011:       canvas.drawCircle(
6012:         corner,
6013:         compact ? 1.0 : 1.8,
6014:         Paint()..color = const Color(0xFFE5E7EB).withValues(alpha: 0.52),
6015:       );
6016:     }
6017:     if (compact) {
6018:       final p = Paint()
6019:         ..isAntiAlias = false
6020:         ..color = const Color(0xFF67E8F9).withValues(alpha: 0.72)
6021:         ..strokeWidth = 1;
6022:       canvas.drawLine(
6023:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-5, 0),
6024:         reticleCenter + const Offset(-2, 0),
6025:         p,
6026:       );
6027:       canvas.drawLine(
6028:         reticleCenter + const Offset(2, 0),
6029:         reticleCenter + const Offset(5, 0),
6030:         p,
6031:       );
6032:       canvas.drawLine(
6033:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -5),
6034:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, -2),
6035:         p,
6036:       );
6037:       canvas.drawLine(
6038:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 2),
6039:         reticleCenter + const Offset(0, 5),
6040:         p,
6041:       );
6042:     } else {
6043:       _drawReticle(
6044:         canvas,
6045:         reticleCenter,
6046:         const Color(0xFF67E8F9),
6047:         0.86 + math.sin(game._clock * 2.8) * 0.05,
6048:       );
6049:     }
6050:   }
6051: 
6052:   void _drawCommandStrip(Canvas canvas, Size size, _TargetSnapshot? target) {
6053:     final viewportRect = _viewportRectFor(size);
6054:     final stripHeight = size.width <= 500 ? 10.0 : 16.0;
6055:     final stripRect = Rect.fromLTWH(
6056:       viewportRect.left,
6057:       viewportRect.bottom + (size.width <= 500 ? 1.5 : 2.0),
6058:       viewportRect.width,
6059:       stripHeight,
6060:     );
6061:     canvas.drawRect(
6062:       stripRect,
6063:       Paint()
6064:         ..shader = const LinearGradient(
6065:           begin: Alignment.topCenter,
6066:           end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
6067:           colors: [Color(0xFF11355C), Color(0xFF06203D)],
6068:         ).createShader(stripRect),
6069:     );
6070:     canvas.drawRect(
6071:       stripRect,
6072:       Paint()
6073:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6074:         ..strokeWidth = 1
6075:         ..color = const Color(0xFF8CB7DA).withValues(alpha: 0.35),
6076:     );
6077:     var text = '* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *';
6078:     if (game.cockpitMode == 4 &&
6079:         target == null &&
6080:         game.nearestResource != null &&
6081:         game.nearestResourceDistance <= 280) {
6082:       text = 'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL RESOURCE CACHE';
6083:     } else if (game.cockpitMode == 4 && target == null) {
6084:       text = 'OBJECT MUST BE ON SCREEN TO SCAN';
6085:     } else if (game.cockpitMode == 4 && target != null) {
6086:       text = 'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL SPACECRAFT';
6087:     } else if (game.harvestCandidate != null) {
6088:       text = 'PRESS H TO HARVEST ${game.harvestCandidate!.name.toUpperCase()}';
6089:     } else if (target != null) {
6090:       text =
6091:           'TARGET ${game.pirateContactName(target.pirate)}  RANGE ${_distanceKm(target.distance)}';
6092:     } else if (game.cockpitCommsPrompt != null) {
6093:       text = game.cockpitCommsPrompt!;
6094:     } else if (game.commsLog.isNotEmpty) {
6095:       text = game.commsLog.first.replaceFirst(RegExp(r'^\[[0-9:]+\]\s*'), '');
6096:     }
6097:     _drawHudText(
6098:       canvas,
6099:       Offset(stripRect.left + 4, stripRect.top + 1),
6100:       text,
6101:       color: const Color(0xFFE5D089),
6102:       size: size.width <= 500 ? 5.4 : 7.4,
6103:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6104:     );
6105:     final keyText = game.harvestCandidate != null
6106:         ? 'SPACE=STOP  ALT=FIRE  H=HARVEST  CTRL=MISSILES'
6107:         : stripRect.width < 400
6108:         ? 'SPACE=STOP  ALT=FIRE  CTRL=MISSILES'
6109:         : 'SPACE=STOP  ALT=FIRE  CTRL=MISSILES  F1=MAIN MENU';
6110:     _drawHudText(
6111:       canvas,
6112:       Offset(
6113:         stripRect.left + 4,
6114:         stripRect.top + (size.width <= 500 ? 5.0 : 9.0),
6115:       ),
6116:       keyText,
6117:       color: const Color(0xFF9CC7E7),
6118:       size: size.width <= 500 ? 4.7 : 6.6,
6119:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6120:     );
6121:   }
6122: 
6123:   void _drawReticle(Canvas canvas, Offset center, Color color, double pulse) {
6124:     final radius = 14 * pulse;
6125:     final paint = Paint()
6126:       ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.9)
6127:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6128:       ..strokeWidth = 1.1;
6129:     canvas.drawCircle(center, radius * 0.44, paint);
6130:     canvas.drawLine(
6131:       center + const Offset(-19, 0),
6132:       center + const Offset(-5, 0),
6133:       paint,
6134:     );
6135:     canvas.drawLine(
6136:       center + const Offset(5, 0),
6137:       center + const Offset(19, 0),
6138:       paint,
6139:     );
6140:     canvas.drawLine(
6141:       center + const Offset(0, -19),
6142:       center + const Offset(0, -5),
6143:       paint,
6144:     );
6145:     canvas.drawLine(
6146:       center + const Offset(0, 5),
6147:       center + const Offset(0, 19),
6148:       paint,
6149:     );
6150:     canvas.drawCircle(
6151:       center,
6152:       1.5,
6153:       Paint()..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.92),
6154:     );
6155:   }
6156: 
6157:   void _drawDamageIndicator(Canvas canvas, Offset center) {
6158:     if (game.incomingDamageStrength <= 0.01) {
6159:       return;
6160:     }
6161:     final relative = game.incomingDamageDirection - game.playerFacing;
6162:     final dir = Offset(math.cos(relative), math.sin(relative));
6163:     final arcCenter = center + dir * 40;
6164:     final start = math.atan2(dir.dy, dir.dx) - math.pi * 0.32;
6165:     final sweep = math.pi * 0.64;
6166:     final alpha = (0.15 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 0.75)
6167:         .clamp(0.0, 0.92)
6168:         .toDouble();
6169:     final arcRect = Rect.fromCircle(
6170:       center: arcCenter,
6171:       radius: 34 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 10,
6172:     );
6173:     canvas.drawArc(
6174:       arcRect,
6175:       start,
6176:       sweep,
6177:       false,
6178:       Paint()
6179:         ..color = const Color(0xFFFF6B6B).withValues(alpha: alpha)
6180:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6181:         ..strokeWidth = 2.2 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 1.5
6182:         ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round,
6183:     );
6184:     canvas.drawCircle(
6185:       arcCenter,
6186:       2.2 + game.incomingDamageStrength * 1.4,
6187:       Paint()..color = const Color(0xFFFF6B6B).withValues(alpha: alpha),
6188:     );
6189:   }
6190: 
6191:   void _drawCommsPrompt(Canvas canvas, Rect viewportRect) {
6192:     final prompt = game.cockpitCommsPrompt;
6193:     if (prompt == null) {
6194:       return;
6195:     }
6196:     final compact = viewportRect.width < 260;
6197:     final hazard = prompt.contains('HAILED') || prompt.contains('MUST');
6198:     final pulse = 0.78 + math.sin(game._clock * 5.2) * 0.14;
6199:     final accent = hazard ? const Color(0xFFE69766) : const Color(0xFFE5D089);
6200:     final width = math
6201:         .min(
6202:           viewportRect.width * (compact ? 0.96 : 0.76),
6203:           compact ? 210.0 : 468.0,
6204:         )
6205:         .toDouble();
6206:     final rect = Rect.fromCenter(
6207:       center: Offset(
6208:         viewportRect.center.dx,
6209:         viewportRect.top + (compact ? 9 : 28),
6210:       ),
6211:       width: width,
6212:       height: compact ? 9.5 : 20,
6213:     );
6214:     canvas.drawRect(
6215:       rect,
6216:       Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF04121F).withValues(alpha: 0.95),
6217:     );
6218:     canvas.drawRect(
6219:       rect,
6220:       Paint()
6221:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6222:         ..strokeWidth = 1
6223:         ..color = accent.withValues(alpha: 0.32 + pulse * 0.4),
6224:     );
6225:     _drawHudText(
6226:       canvas,
6227:       Offset(rect.left + 4, rect.top + (compact ? 2 : 6)),
6228:       prompt,
6229:       color: accent.withValues(alpha: 0.9 + pulse * 0.08),
6230:       size: compact ? 4.8 : 8.8,
6231:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
6232:     );
6233:   }
6234: 
6235:   void _drawScienceScanOverlay(
6236:     Canvas canvas,
6237:     Rect viewportRect,
6238:     _TargetSnapshot? target,
6239:   ) {
6240:     final compact = viewportRect.width < 260;
6241:     final width = math
6242:         .min(
6243:           viewportRect.width * (compact ? 0.92 : 0.68),
6244:           compact ? 210.0 : 360.0,
6245:         )
6246:         .toDouble();
6247:     final rect = Rect.fromLTWH(
6248:       viewportRect.left + 8,
6249:       viewportRect.top + 10,
6250:       width,
6251:       compact ? 54 : 74,
6252:     );
6253:     canvas.drawRect(
6254:       rect,
6255:       Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF010205).withValues(alpha: 0.86),
6256:     );
6257:     canvas.drawRect(
6258:       rect,
6259:       Paint()
6260:         ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
6261:         ..strokeWidth = 1
6262:         ..color = const Color(0xFF8BBADE).withValues(alpha: 0.62),
6263:     );
6264:     if (target == null) {
6265:       final resource = game.nearestResource;
6266:       if (resource == null || game.nearestResourceDistance > 280) {
6267:         return;
6268:       }
6269:       CommoditySpec? commodity;
6270:       for (final entry in game.commodityCatalog) {
6271:         if (entry.id == resource.commodityId) {
6272:           commodity = entry;
6273:           break;
6274:         }
6275:       }
6276:       _drawHudText(
6277:         canvas,
6278:         Offset(rect.left + 5, rect.top + 4),
6279:         'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL RESOURCE CACHE',
6280:         color: const Color(0xFFE5D089),
6281:         size: compact ? 4.8 : 8.1,
6282:         weight: FontWeight.w700,
6283:       );
6284:       _drawHudText(
6285:         canvas,
6286:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 13 : 18)),
6287:         'NAME: ${resource.name}',
6288:         color: const Color(0xFFC8D9E8),
6289:         size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6290:       );
6291:       _drawHudText(
6292:         canvas,
6293:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 20 : 29)),
6294:         'FIELD TYPE: ${resource.kind.name.toUpperCase()}',
6295:         color: const Color(0xFFC8D9E8),
6296:         size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6297:       );
6298:       _drawHudText(
6299:         canvas,
6300:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 27 : 40)),
6301:         'RECOVERY: ${commodity?.name.toUpperCase() ?? 'UNKNOWN'}',
6302:         color: const Color(0xFF93C5FD),
6303:         size: compact ? 4.6 : 8.0,
6304:       );
6305:       _drawHudText(
6306:         canvas,
6307:         Offset(rect.left + 6, rect.top + (compact ? 34 : 51)),
6308:         'YIELD: ${resource.yieldUnits} UNITS // RANGE ${_distanceKm(game.nearestResourceDistance)}',
6309:         color: const Color(0xFFFDE68A),
6310:         size: compact ? 4.4 : 7.6,
6311:       );
6312:       return;
6313:     }
6314:     _drawHudText(
6315:       canvas,
6316:       Offset(rect.left + 5, rect.top + 4),
6317:       'SCIENCE SCAN OF LOCAL SPACECRAFT',
6318:       color: const Color(0xFFE5D089),
6319:       size: compact ? 4.8 : 8.1,
6320:       weight: FontWeight.w700,
