2336:   final Map<int, int> _stationReputation = <int, int>{};
2337:   final Map<String, int> _tradeCargo = <String, int>{};
2338:   final Set<int> _harvestedResourceIds = <int>{};
2339:   final Set<String> _unlockedLoreIds = <String>{};
2340:   final Set<int> _visitedSectors = <int>{};
2341: 
2342:   int sectorIndex = 0;
2343:   String sectorName = 'Perseus Fringe';
2344:   Offset playerPosition = const Offset(900, 900);
2345:   Offset playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
2346:   double playerFacing = -math.pi / 2;
2347:   double playerHull = 100;
2348:   double playerShield = 100;
2349:   double playerEnergy = 100;
2350:   double playerFuel = 100;
2351:   int credits = 260;
2352:   int cargoUsed = 0;
2353:   int kills = 0;
2354:   int engineUpgradeTier = 0;
2355:   int weaponUpgradeTier = 0;
2356:   int shieldUpgradeTier = 0;
2357:   int cargoUpgradeTier = 0;
2358:   int contractsDelivered = 0;
2359:   int crossSectorContractsDelivered = 0;
2360:   int jumpCount = 0;
2361:   int upgradesPurchased = 0;
2362:   int cockpitMode = 1;
2363:   int _campaignIndex = 0;
2364: 
2365:   Station? dockedStation;
2366:   Station? dockCandidate;
2367:   PortalGate? jumpCandidate;
2368:   Station? nearestStation;
2369:   ResourceNode? nearestResource;
2370:   ResourceNode? harvestCandidate;
2371:   double nearestStationDistance = double.infinity;
2372:   double nearestResourceDistance = double.infinity;
2373:   double nearestPortalDistance = double.infinity;
2374:   double nearestPirateDistance = double.infinity;
2375:   CargoContract? activeContract;
2376:   DialogueEncounter? activeEncounter;
2377: 
2378:   double _shieldRechargeDelay = 0;
2379:   double _playerWeaponCooldown = 0;
2380:   double _spawnTimer = 2.5;
2381:   double _encounterTimer = 16;
2382:   double _marketShiftTimer = 11;
2383:   double _clock = 0;
2384:   double _damageFlash = 0;
2385:   double _incomingDamageDirection = 0;
2386:   double _incomingDamageStrength = 0;
2387:   int _audioCueSerial = 0;
2388:   GameAudioCue? _lastAudioCue;
2389:   int _pirateIdSeed = 0;
2390:   int? _trackedPirateId;
2391:   bool _suspendCampaignEvaluation = false;
2392: 
2393:   bool get isDocked => dockedStation != null;
2394:   double get damageFlash => _damageFlash;
2395:   double get incomingDamageDirection => _incomingDamageDirection;
2396:   double get incomingDamageStrength => _incomingDamageStrength;
2397:   int get audioCueSerial => _audioCueSerial;
2398:   GameAudioCue? get lastAudioCue => _lastAudioCue;
2399:   int? get trackedPirateId => _trackedPirateId;
2400:   int get totalPowerAllocation =>
2401:       power.values.fold<int>(0, (sum, value) => sum + value);
2402:   int get cargoCapacity => 10 + (cargoUpgradeTier * 2);
2403:   int get tradeCargoUsed =>
2404:       _tradeCargo.values.fold<int>(0, (sum, units) => sum + units);
2405:   int get totalCargoUsed => cargoUsed + tradeCargoUsed;
2406:   int get freeCargoSpace => math.max(0, cargoCapacity - totalCargoUsed);
2407:   Map<String, int> get tradeCargoManifest =>
2408:       Map<String, int>.unmodifiable(_tradeCargo);
2409:   List<LoreEntry> get unlockedLoreEntries => _loreCatalog
2410:       .where((entry) => _unlockedLoreIds.contains(entry.id))
2411:       .toList(growable: false);
2412:   LoreEntry? get latestLoreEntry =>
2413:       unlockedLoreEntries.isEmpty ? null : unlockedLoreEntries.last;
2414:   double get shieldCapacity => 100 + (shieldUpgradeTier * 20);
2415:   double get engineTierBonus => engineUpgradeTier * 0.14;
2416:   double get weaponTierBonus => weaponUpgradeTier * 0.16;
2417:   double get shieldTierBonus => shieldUpgradeTier * 0.16;
2418:   List<SectorLayout> get sectorLayouts => _sectorLayouts;
2419:   List<CommoditySpec> get commodityCatalog => _commodityCatalog;
2420:   int reputationForStation(int stationId) => _stationReputation[stationId] ?? 0;
2421:   String reputationBandForStation(int stationId) =>
2422:       _reputationBand(reputationForStation(stationId));
2423:   int get currentDockReputation =>
2424:       dockedStation == null ? 0 : reputationForStation(dockedStation!.id);
2425:   String get currentDockReputationLabel {
2426:     final rep = currentDockReputation;
2427:     final signed = rep >= 0 ? '+$rep' : '$rep';
2428:     return '$signed (${_reputationBand(rep)})';
2429:   }
2430: 
2431:   bool get currentDockContractsLocked =>
2432:       isDocked && currentDockReputation < contractAccessReputationFloor;
2433:   int get maxEngineUpgradeTier => 3;
2434:   int get maxWeaponUpgradeTier => 3;
2435:   int get maxShieldUpgradeTier => 3;
2436:   int get maxCargoUpgradeTier => 4;
2437:   int get engineUpgradeCost => 120 + engineUpgradeTier * 110;
2438:   int get weaponUpgradeCost => 140 + weaponUpgradeTier * 125;
2439:   int get shieldUpgradeCost => 150 + shieldUpgradeTier * 125;
2440:   int get cargoUpgradeCost => 110 + cargoUpgradeTier * 90;
2441:   bool get canUpgradeEngine =>
2442:       isDocked &&
2443:       engineUpgradeTier < maxEngineUpgradeTier &&
2444:       credits >= engineUpgradeCost;
2445:   bool get canUpgradeWeapons =>
2446:       isDocked &&
2447:       weaponUpgradeTier < maxWeaponUpgradeTier &&
2448:       credits >= weaponUpgradeCost;
2449:   bool get canUpgradeShields =>
2450:       isDocked &&
2451:       shieldUpgradeTier < maxShieldUpgradeTier &&
2452:       credits >= shieldUpgradeCost;
2453:   bool get canUpgradeCargo =>
2454:       isDocked &&
2455:       cargoUpgradeTier < maxCargoUpgradeTier &&
2456:       credits >= cargoUpgradeCost;
2457:   CampaignMission? get activeCampaignMission =>
2458:       _campaignIndex < _campaignMissions.length
2459:       ? _campaignMissions[_campaignIndex]
2460:       : null;
2461:   int get campaignTotalMissions => _campaignMissions.length;
2462:   int get campaignCompletedMissions =>
2463:       _campaignIndex.clamp(0, _campaignMissions.length).toInt();
2464:   bool get campaignComplete => activeCampaignMission == null;
2465:   String get campaignStatusLabel =>
2466:       '$campaignCompletedMissions/$campaignTotalMissions';
2467:   int get campaignRewardCredits => activeCampaignMission?.rewardCredits ?? 0;
2468:   String get campaignTitle =>
2469:       activeCampaignMission?.title ?? 'Campaign complete';
2470:   String get campaignDescription =>
2471:       activeCampaignMission?.description ??
2472:       'All campaign objectives completed.';
2473:   String get campaignProgressText {
2474:     final mission = activeCampaignMission;
2475:     if (mission == null) {
2476:       return 'Complete';
2477:     }
2478:     final progress = _campaignProgressFor(mission);
2479:     return '$progress/${mission.target}';
2480:   }
2481: 
2482:   double get campaignProgressFraction {
2483:     final mission = activeCampaignMission;
2484:     if (mission == null) {
2485:       return 1;
2486:     }
2487:     return (_campaignProgressFor(mission) / mission.target)
2488:         .clamp(0.0, 1.0)
2489:         .toDouble();
2490:   }
2491: 
2492:   CargoContract? get currentDockOffer =>
2493:       dockedStation == null ? null : _stationOffers[dockedStation!.id];
2494:   Map<String, int>? get currentDockMarket =>
2495:       dockedStation == null ? null : _stationMarkets[dockedStation!.id];
2496:   String? get cockpitCommsPrompt {
2497:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
2498:       return '* YOU ARE BEING HAILED *';
2499:     }
2500:     if (!isDocked && nearestStation != null && nearestStationDistance <= 560) {
2501:       if (playerVelocity.distance <= 120) {
2502:         return '* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *';
2503:       }
2504:       return 'OBJECT MUST VISIBLE TO COMMUNICATE';
2505:     }
2506:     return null;
2507:   }
2508: 
2509:   bool get canAcceptDockContract {
2510:     final offer = currentDockOffer;
2511:     return isDocked &&
2512:         offer != null &&
2513:         activeContract == null &&
2514:         currentDockReputation >= contractAccessReputationFloor &&
2515:         totalCargoUsed + offer.cargoUnits <= cargoCapacity;
2516:   }
2517: 
2518:   bool get canDeliverDockContract {
2519:     final station = dockedStation;
2520:     final contract = activeContract;
2521:     if (station == null || contract == null) {
2522:       return false;
2523:     }
2524:     if (!contract.pickedUp && contract.pickup.id == station.id) {
2525:       return totalCargoUsed + contract.cargoUnits <= cargoCapacity;
2526:     }
2527:     return contract.destination.id == station.id && contract.pickedUp;
2528:   }
2529: 
2530:   bool get canRepairHull => isDocked && credits >= 40 && playerHull < 99.5;
2531:   bool get canRefuel => isDocked && credits >= 20 && playerFuel < 99.5;
2532: 
2533:   String get contractStateLabel {
2534:     final contract = activeContract;
2535:     if (contract == null) {
2536:       return currentDockOffer == null ? 'Idle' : 'Offer available';
2537:     }
2538:     if (!contract.pickedUp) {
2539:       return 'Pickup pending';
2540:     }
2541:     return 'Delivery active';
2542:   }
2543: 
2544:   String get currentDockDescription {
2545:     final station = dockedStation;
2546:     if (station == null) {
2547:       return '';
2548:     }
2549:     final active = activeContract;
2550:     if (active == null) {
2551:       return '${station.blurb} Station batteries recharge shields, energy, and fuel while docked. Dock market access is available.';
2552:     }
2553:     if (!active.pickedUp && active.pickup.id == station.id) {
2554:       return 'Contract cargo is staged here. Load it before departure.';
2555:     }
2556:     if (active.pickedUp && active.destination.id == station.id) {
2557:       return 'Destination port confirmed. Cargo manifest ready for delivery.';
2558:     }
2559:     return '${station.blurb} You can resupply here before continuing.';
2560:   }
2561: 
2562:   int tradeUnitsForCommodity(String commodityId) =>
2563:       _tradeCargo[commodityId] ?? 0;
2564: 
2565:   int? currentBuyPrice(String commodityId) {
2566:     final station = dockedStation;
2567:     if (station == null) {
2568:       return null;
2569:     }
2570:     final base = currentDockMarket?[commodityId];
2571:     if (base == null) {
2572:       return null;
2573:     }
2574:     final repFactor = _marketPriceFactor(station.id, buying: true);
2575:     return math.max(1, (base * 1.08 * repFactor).round());
2576:   }
2577: 
2578:   int? currentSellPrice(String commodityId) {
2579:     final station = dockedStation;
2580:     if (station == null) {
2581:       return null;
2582:     }
2583:     final base = currentDockMarket?[commodityId];
2584:     if (base == null) {
2585:       return null;
2586:     }
2587:     final repFactor = _marketPriceFactor(station.id, buying: false);
2588:     return math.max(1, (base * 0.92 * repFactor).round());
2589:   }
2590: 
2591:   int projectedContractReward(CargoContract contract) {
2592:     final delta = _contractRewardDelta(
2593:       baseReward: contract.rewardCredits,
2594:       destinationId: contract.destination.id,
2595:     );
2596:     return math.max(40, contract.rewardCredits + delta);
2597:   }
2598: 
2599:   String projectedContractRewardLabel(CargoContract contract) {
2600:     final adjusted = projectedContractReward(contract);
2601:     final delta = adjusted - contract.rewardCredits;
2602:     if (delta == 0) {
2603:       return '$adjusted cr';
2604:     }
2605:     final signed = delta > 0 ? '+$delta' : '$delta';
2606:     return '$adjusted cr ($signed rep)';
2607:   }
2608: 
2609:   bool canBuyCommodity(String commodityId) {
2610:     final buyPrice = currentBuyPrice(commodityId);
2611:     return isDocked &&
2612:         buyPrice != null &&
2613:         credits >= buyPrice &&
2614:         freeCargoSpace > 0;
2615:   }
2616: 
2617:   bool canSellCommodity(String commodityId) =>
2618:       isDocked &&
2619:       currentSellPrice(commodityId) != null &&
2620:       tradeUnitsForCommodity(commodityId) > 0;
2621: 
2622:   String pirateContactName(PirateShip pirate) =>
2623:       'SYMLOC ${pirate.trackingId.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';
2624: 
2625:   String pirateHullClass(PirateShip pirate) {
2626:     final index =
2627:         (pirate.trackingId + (pirate.bias * 10).floor()) %
2628:         _pirateHullClasses.length;
2629:     return _pirateHullClasses[index];
2630:   }
2631: 
2632:   String pirateShieldType(PirateShip pirate) {
2633:     if (pirate.shield >= 24) {
2634:       return 'III';
2635:     }
2636:     if (pirate.shield >= 14) {
2637:       return 'II';
2638:     }
2639:     return 'I';
2640:   }
2641: 
2642:   String pirateCannonType(PirateShip pirate) {
2643:     if (pirate.bias >= 0.72) {
2644:       return 'HEAVY';
2645:     }
2646:     if (pirate.bias >= 0.38) {
2647:       return 'PULSE';
2648:     }
2649:     return 'LIGHT';
2650:   }
2651: 
2652:   void setCockpitMode(int mode) {
2653:     cockpitMode = mode.clamp(1, 6).toInt();
2654:   }
2655: 
2656:   // Rebuild the simulation from a clean slate while preserving the authored
2657:   // sector, station, and campaign definitions stored on the class.
2658:   void _initWorld() {
2659:     _harvestedResourceIds.clear();
2660:     _unlockedLoreIds.clear();
2661:     _visitedSectors.clear();
2662:     _campaignIndex = 0;
2663:     _stationOffers.clear();
2664:     _stationMarkets.clear();
2665:     _stationReputation.clear();
2666:     _tradeCargo.clear();
2667:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2668:       _stationReputation[station.id] = 0;
2669:     }
2670:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2671:       _stationMarkets.putIfAbsent(
2672:         station.id,
2673:         () => _generateMarketFor(station),
2674:       );
2675:     }
2676:     for (final station in _allStations) {
2677:       _stationOffers.putIfAbsent(
2678:         station.id,
2679:         () => _generateContractFor(station),
2680:       );
2681:     }
2682:     _marketShiftTimer = 9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 12;
2683:     _setSector(0, initial: true);
2684:     _encounterTimer = 14 + _rng.nextDouble() * 8;
2685:   }
2686: 
2687:   // Advance one simulation frame. Systems are stepped in a fixed order so
2688:   // combat, docking, mission state, and HUD summaries stay deterministic.
2689:   void update(double dt, PlayerInput input) {
2690:     _clock += dt;
2691:     _playerWeaponCooldown = math.max(0, _playerWeaponCooldown - dt);
2692:     _shieldRechargeDelay = math.max(0, _shieldRechargeDelay - dt);
2693:     _spawnTimer -= dt;
2694:     _encounterTimer -= dt;
2695:     _marketShiftTimer -= dt;
2696:     _damageFlash = math.max(0, _damageFlash - dt * 2.1);
2697:     _incomingDamageStrength = math.max(0, _incomingDamageStrength - dt * 1.75);
2698:     _updateMarkets();
2699: 
2700:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
2701:       _refreshDerivedState();
2702:       return;
2703:     }
2704: 
2705:     _updatePlayer(dt, input);
2706:     _updatePirates(dt);
2707:     _updateProjectiles(dt);
2708:     _updateBlasts(dt);
2709:     _resolveProjectileHits();
2710:     _resolveBodyCollisions();
2711:     _refreshDerivedState();
2712:     _spawnPiratesIfNeeded();
2713:     _spawnEncounterIfNeeded();
2714:   }
2715: 
2716:   void _updatePlayer(double dt, PlayerInput input) {
2717:     final enginePower = power[PowerChannel.engines]! / 100;
2718:     final weaponPower = power[PowerChannel.weapons]! / 100;
2719:     final shieldPower = power[PowerChannel.shields]! / 100;
2720:     final effectiveEngine = (enginePower + engineTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2721:     final effectiveWeapon = (weaponPower + weaponTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2722:     final effectiveShield = (shieldPower + shieldTierBonus).clamp(0.0, 1.45);
2723: 
2724:     if (isDocked) {
2725:       final station = dockedStation!;
2726:       playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
2727:       playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 88);
2728:       playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy + dt * 26, 0, 100);
2729:       playerShield = _clamp(
2730:         playerShield + dt * (18 + shieldUpgradeTier * 3),
2731:         0,
2732:         shieldCapacity,
2733:       );
2734:       playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel + dt * 9, 0, 100);
2735:       return;
2736:     }
2737: 
2738:     playerEnergy = _clamp(
2739:       playerEnergy + dt * (10 + effectiveWeapon * 8),
2740:       0,
2741:       100,
2742:     );
2743:     if (_shieldRechargeDelay <= 0) {
2744:       playerShield = _clamp(
2745:         playerShield + dt * (3 + effectiveShield * 12),
2746:         0,
2747:         shieldCapacity,
2748:       );
2749:     }
2750: 
2751:     var thrust = Offset.zero;
2752:     if (input.up) thrust += const Offset(0, -1);
2753:     if (input.down) thrust += const Offset(0, 1);
2754:     if (input.left) thrust += const Offset(-1, 0);
2755:     if (input.right) thrust += const Offset(1, 0);
2756: 
2757:     var boosting = false;
2758:     if (thrust != Offset.zero) {
2759:       thrust = _normalize(thrust);
2760:       var accel = 170 + effectiveEngine * 260;
2761:       if (input.boost && playerFuel > 0 && playerEnergy > 4) {
2762:         boosting = true;
2763:         accel *= 1.65;
2764:         playerFuel = _clamp(
2765:           playerFuel - dt * (6.5 - effectiveEngine * 2.5),
2766:           0,
2767:           100,
2768:         );
2769:         playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - dt * 4.5, 0, 100);
2770:       }
2771:       playerVelocity += thrust * (accel * dt);
2772:       playerFacing = _approachAngle(
2773:         playerFacing,
2774:         math.atan2(thrust.dy, thrust.dx),
2775:         dt * 8,
2776:       );
2777:     }
2778: 
2779:     final drag = boosting ? 0.93 : 0.965;
2780:     playerVelocity *= math.pow(drag, dt * 60).toDouble();
2781: 
2782:     final baseCap = 220 + effectiveEngine * 210;
2783:     final speedCap = boosting ? baseCap * 1.55 : baseCap;
2784:     final speed = playerVelocity.distance;
2785:     if (speed > speedCap) {
2786:       playerVelocity = _normalize(playerVelocity) * speedCap;
2787:     }
2788: 
2789:     playerPosition += playerVelocity * dt;
2790:     playerPosition = Offset(
2791:       playerPosition.dx.clamp(40.0, worldWidth - 40.0).toDouble(),
2792:       playerPosition.dy.clamp(40.0, worldHeight - 40.0).toDouble(),
2793:     );
2794: 
2795:     if (playerPosition.dx <= 40 || playerPosition.dx >= worldWidth - 40) {
2796:       playerVelocity = Offset(-playerVelocity.dx * 0.35, playerVelocity.dy);
2797:     }
2798:     if (playerPosition.dy <= 40 || playerPosition.dy >= worldHeight - 40) {
2799:       playerVelocity = Offset(playerVelocity.dx, -playerVelocity.dy * 0.35);
2800:     }
2801: 
2802:     if (input.fire) {
2803:       _firePlayer(effectiveWeapon.toDouble());
2804:     }
2805:   }
2806: 
2807:   void _firePlayer(double weaponPower) {
2808:     if (_playerWeaponCooldown > 0 || playerEnergy < 4) {
2809:       return;
2810:     }
2811:     final dir = Offset(math.cos(playerFacing), math.sin(playerFacing));
2812:     final speed = 460 + weaponPower * 220;
2813:     final cost = 7.5 - weaponPower * 2.2;
2814:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - cost, 0, 100);
2815:     _playerWeaponCooldown =
2816:         (0.30 - weaponPower * 0.14 - weaponUpgradeTier * 0.01)
2817:             .clamp(0.10, 0.35)
2818:             .toDouble();
2819:     projectiles.add(
2820:       Projectile(
2821:         position: playerPosition + dir * 20,
2822:         velocity: playerVelocity * 0.3 + dir * speed,
2823:         ttl: 1.35,
2824:         damage: 12 + weaponPower * 16 + weaponUpgradeTier * 2.0,
2825:         friendly: true,
2826:       ),
2827:     );
2828:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.fire);
2829:   }
2830: 
2831:   void _updatePirates(double dt) {
2832:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
2833:       pirate.fireCooldown = math.max(0, pirate.fireCooldown - dt);
2834:       pirate.shield = _clamp(pirate.shield + dt * 4, 0, 35);
2835: 
2836:       final toPlayer = playerPosition - pirate.position;
2837:       final distance = toPlayer.distance;
2838:       final desiredAngle = math.atan2(toPlayer.dy, toPlayer.dx);
2839:       pirate.angle = _approachAngle(
2840:         pirate.angle,
2841:         desiredAngle,
2842:         dt * (2.2 + pirate.bias),
2843:       );
2844: 
2845:       var accel = 0.0;
2846:       if (distance > 240) {
2847:         accel = 80 + pirate.bias * 40;
2848:       }
2849:       if (distance > 700) {
2850:         accel += 55;
2851:       }
2852:       if (distance < 140) {
2853:         accel = -60;
2854:       }
2855:       final forward = Offset(math.cos(pirate.angle), math.sin(pirate.angle));
2856:       pirate.velocity += forward * (accel * dt);
2857:       pirate.velocity *= math.pow(0.955, dt * 60).toDouble();
2858: 
2859:       final speed = pirate.velocity.distance;
2860:       final speedCap = 150 + pirate.bias * 50;
2861:       if (speed > speedCap) {
2862:         pirate.velocity = _normalize(pirate.velocity) * speedCap;
2863:       }
2864: 
2865:       pirate.position += pirate.velocity * dt;
2866:       pirate.position = Offset(
2867:         pirate.position.dx.clamp(50.0, worldWidth - 50.0).toDouble(),
2868:         pirate.position.dy.clamp(50.0, worldHeight - 50.0).toDouble(),
2869:       );
2870: 
2871:       if (!isDocked &&
2872:           activeEncounter == null &&
2873:           distance < 720 &&
2874:           pirate.fireCooldown <= 0) {
2875:         final aimError = (_rng.nextDouble() - 0.5) * (0.18 + (distance / 1400));
2876:         final shotAngle = desiredAngle + aimError;
2877:         final dir = Offset(math.cos(shotAngle), math.sin(shotAngle));
2878:         projectiles.add(
2879:           Projectile(
2880:             position: pirate.position + dir * 16,
2881:             velocity: pirate.velocity * 0.25 + dir * 300,
2882:             ttl: 2.1,
2883:             damage: 8 + _rng.nextDouble() * 5,
2884:             friendly: false,
2885:           ),
2886:         );
2887:         pirate.fireCooldown = 0.9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 0.8;
2888:       }
2889:     }
2890:   }
2891: 
2892:   void _updateProjectiles(double dt) {
2893:     for (var i = projectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2894:       final projectile = projectiles[i];
2895:       projectile.ttl -= dt;
2896:       projectile.position += projectile.velocity * dt;
2897: 
2898:       final outOfBounds =
2899:           projectile.position.dx < -40 ||
2900:           projectile.position.dy < -40 ||
2901:           projectile.position.dx > worldWidth + 40 ||
2902:           projectile.position.dy > worldHeight + 40;
2903:       if (projectile.ttl <= 0 || outOfBounds) {
2904:         projectiles.removeAt(i);
2905:       }
2906:     }
2907:   }
2908: 
2909:   void _updateBlasts(double dt) {
2910:     for (var i = blasts.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2911:       blasts[i].ttl -= dt;
2912:       if (blasts[i].ttl <= 0) {
2913:         blasts.removeAt(i);
2914:       }
2915:     }
2916:   }
2917: 
2918:   void _resolveProjectileHits() {
2919:     for (var i = projectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2920:       final shot = projectiles[i];
2921:       if (shot.friendly) {
2922:         PirateShip? target;
2923:         for (final pirate in pirates) {
2924:           if ((pirate.position - shot.position).distance <= 18) {
2925:             target = pirate;
2926:             break;
2927:           }
2928:         }
2929:         if (target != null) {
2930:           _damagePirate(target, shot.damage);
2931:           blasts.add(Blast(position: shot.position, ttl: 0.18, radius: 16));
2932:           projectiles.removeAt(i);
2933:           continue;
2934:         }
2935:       } else {
2936:         if ((playerPosition - shot.position).distance <= 18 && !isDocked) {
2937:           _damagePlayer(shot.damage, sourcePosition: shot.position);
2938:           blasts.add(Blast(position: shot.position, ttl: 0.16, radius: 12));
2939:           projectiles.removeAt(i);
2940:           continue;
2941:         }
2942:       }
2943:     }
2944: 
2945:     pirates.removeWhere((pirate) => pirate.hull <= 0);
2946:   }
2947: 
2948:   void _resolveBodyCollisions() {
2949:     if (isDocked) {
2950:       return;
2951:     }
2952:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
2953:       final delta = playerPosition - pirate.position;
2954:       final dist = delta.distance;
2955:       if (dist > 0 && dist < 28) {
2956:         final push = _normalize(delta) * (28 - dist) * 0.6;
2957:         playerPosition += push;
2958:         playerVelocity += push * 4;
2959:         _damagePlayer(6, sourcePosition: pirate.position);
2960:       }
2961:     }
2962:   }
2963: 
2964:   void _damagePlayer(double damage, {Offset? sourcePosition}) {
2965:     _shieldRechargeDelay = 1.2;
2966:     _damageFlash = 1;
2967:     if (sourcePosition != null) {
2968:       final incoming = sourcePosition - playerPosition;
2969:       if (incoming.distanceSquared > 0.01) {
2970:         _incomingDamageDirection = math.atan2(incoming.dy, incoming.dx);
2971:         _incomingDamageStrength = (_incomingDamageStrength + 0.72).clamp(
2972:           0.0,
2973:           1.0,
2974:         );
2975:       }
2976:     }
2977:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.hit);
2978:     var remaining = damage;
2979:     if (playerShield > 0) {
2980:       final shieldHit = math.min(playerShield, remaining);
2981:       playerShield -= shieldHit;
2982:       remaining -= shieldHit;
2983:     }
2984:     if (remaining > 0) {
2985:       playerHull = _clamp(playerHull - remaining, 0, 100);
2986:       if (playerHull <= 0) {
2987:         _handlePlayerDestroyed();
2988:       }
2989:     }
2990:   }
2991: 
2992:   void _damagePirate(PirateShip pirate, double damage) {
2993:     var remaining = damage;
2994:     if (pirate.shield > 0) {
2995:       final shieldHit = math.min(pirate.shield, remaining);
2996:       pirate.shield -= shieldHit;
2997:       remaining -= shieldHit;
2998:     }
2999:     if (remaining > 0) {
3000:       pirate.hull -= remaining;
3001:     }
3002:     if (pirate.hull <= 0) {
3003:       kills += 1;
3004:       final bounty = 18 + _rng.nextInt(24);
3005:       credits += bounty;
3006:       final nearbyStation = _nearestStationTo(pirate.position);
3007:       shiftStationReputation(nearbyStation.id, 2, silent: true);
3008:       blasts.add(Blast(position: pirate.position, ttl: 0.45, radius: 34));
3009:       _log(
3010:         'Pirate neutralized near ${nearbyStation.name}. Bounty +$bounty cr.',
3011:       );
3012:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3013:       _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3014:     }
3015:   }
3016: 
3017:   void _handlePlayerDestroyed() {
3018:     final station = _nearestStationTo(playerPosition);
3019:     final penalty = math.min(credits, 120);
3020:     credits -= penalty;
3021:     playerHull = 80;
3022:     playerShield = _clamp(65 + shieldUpgradeTier * 8, 0, shieldCapacity);
3023:     playerEnergy = 80;
3024:     playerFuel = 80;
3025:     playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
3026:     playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 88);
3027:     dockedStation = station;
3028:     if (activeContract != null && activeContract!.pickedUp) {
3029:       cargoUsed = math.max(0, cargoUsed - activeContract!.cargoUnits);
3030:     }
3031:     if (activeContract != null) {
3032:       shiftStationReputation(activeContract!.pickup.id, -4, silent: true);
3033:       shiftStationReputation(activeContract!.destination.id, -6, silent: true);
3034:       _log('Ship disabled. Active contract forfeited.');
3035:       activeContract = null;
3036:     }
3037:     _log('Emergency tow to ${station.name}. Recovery fee $penalty cr.');
3038:   }
3039: 
3040:   // Recompute all nearest-contact caches after state changes so the cockpit
3041:   // panel, docking prompts, radar, and combat helpers read from one source.
3042:   void _refreshDerivedState() {
3043:     nearestStation = _nearestStationTo(playerPosition);
3044:     nearestStationDistance =
3045:         (nearestStation!.position - playerPosition).distance;
3046: 
3047:     nearestResource = null;
3048:     nearestResourceDistance = double.infinity;
3049:     for (final resource in resources) {
3050:       final d = (resource.position - playerPosition).distance;
3051:       if (d < nearestResourceDistance) {
3052:         nearestResourceDistance = d;
3053:         nearestResource = resource;
3054:       }
3055:     }
3056: 
3057:     nearestPirateDistance = double.infinity;
3058:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
3059:       final d = (pirate.position - playerPosition).distance;
3060:       if (d < nearestPirateDistance) {
3061:         nearestPirateDistance = d;
3062:       }
3063:     }
3064: 
3065:     nearestPortalDistance = double.infinity;
3066:     PortalGate? nearestGate;
3067:     for (final portal in portals) {
3068:       final d = (portal.position - playerPosition).distance;
3069:       if (d < nearestPortalDistance) {
3070:         nearestPortalDistance = d;
3071:         nearestGate = portal;
3072:       }
3073:     }
3074: 
3075:     if (!isDocked &&
3076:         nearestStationDistance <= dockingRange &&
3077:         playerVelocity.distance <= dockingSpeed) {
3078:       dockCandidate = nearestStation;
3079:     } else {
3080:       dockCandidate = null;
3081:     }
3082: 
3083:     if (!isDocked &&
3084:         nearestGate != null &&
3085:         nearestPortalDistance <= jumpRange &&
3086:         playerVelocity.distance <= jumpSpeed) {
3087:       jumpCandidate = nearestGate;
3088:     } else {
3089:       jumpCandidate = null;
3090:     }
3091: 
3092:     if (!isDocked &&
3093:         nearestResource != null &&
3094:         nearestResourceDistance <= 90 &&
3095:         playerVelocity.distance <= 70) {
3096:       harvestCandidate = nearestResource;
3097:     } else {
3098:       harvestCandidate = null;
3099:     }
3100: 
3101:     _syncTrackingTarget();
3102:   }
3103: 
3104:   void _spawnPiratesIfNeeded() {
3105:     if (_spawnTimer > 0) {
3106:       return;
3107:     }
3108:     final desired = 4 + math.min(3, (_clock / 90).floor());
3109:     if (pirates.length < desired) {
3110:       pirates.add(_spawnPirate(initial: false));
3111:       if (_rng.nextDouble() < 0.45) {
3112:         _log('Comms: Pirate contact detected on long-range scan.');
3113:         _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3114:       }
3115:     }
3116:     _spawnTimer = 4 + _rng.nextDouble() * 5;
3117:   }
3118: 
3119:   void _spawnEncounterIfNeeded() {
3120:     if (activeEncounter != null || isDocked) {
3121:       return;
3122:     }
3123:     if (_encounterTimer > 0) {
3124:       return;
3125:     }
3126:     if (_rng.nextDouble() < 0.35 && pirates.isNotEmpty) {
3127:       _encounterTimer = 10 + _rng.nextDouble() * 8;
3128:       return;
3129:     }
3130:     activeEncounter = _buildRandomEncounter();
3131:     cockpitMode = 3;
3132:     _encounterTimer = 20 + _rng.nextDouble() * 22;
3133:     _log(
3134:       'Incoming transmission: ${activeEncounter!.title}. Choose 1-${activeEncounter!.options.length}.',
3135:     );
3136:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3137:   }
3138: 
3139:   void _updateMarkets() {
3140:     if (_marketShiftTimer > 0) {
3141:       return;
3142:     }
3143:     _marketShiftTimer = 9 + _rng.nextDouble() * 12;
3144:     if (_stationMarkets.isEmpty) {
3145:       return;
3146:     }
3147:     final station = _allStations[_rng.nextInt(_allStations.length)];
3148:     final market = _stationMarkets.putIfAbsent(
3149:       station.id,
3150:       () => _generateMarketFor(station),
3151:     );
3152:     final commodity = _commodityCatalog[_rng.nextInt(_commodityCatalog.length)];
3153:     final current = market[commodity.id] ?? commodity.basePrice;
3154:     final factor = 1 + (_rng.nextDouble() * 0.14 - 0.07);
3155:     market[commodity.id] = math.max(1, (current * factor).round());
3156:   }
3157: 
3158:   PirateShip _spawnPirate({required bool initial}) {
3159:     final edge = _rng.nextInt(4);
3160:     late Offset position;
3161:     switch (edge) {
3162:       case 0:
3163:         position = Offset(_rng.nextDouble() * worldWidth, 70);
3164:         break;
3165:       case 1:
3166:         position = Offset(worldWidth - 70, _rng.nextDouble() * worldHeight);
3167:         break;
3168:       case 2:
3169:         position = Offset(_rng.nextDouble() * worldWidth, worldHeight - 70);
3170:         break;
3171:       case 3:
3172:         position = Offset(70, _rng.nextDouble() * worldHeight);
3173:         break;
3174:     }
3175: 
3176:     if (!initial && (position - playerPosition).distance < 700) {
3177:       position = Offset(
3178:         (position.dx + worldWidth / 2) % worldWidth,
3179:         (position.dy + worldHeight / 2) % worldHeight,
3180:       );
3181:     }
3182: 
3183:     return PirateShip(
3184:       trackingId: ++_pirateIdSeed,
3185:       position: position,
3186:       velocity: Offset.zero,
3187:       angle: _rng.nextDouble() * math.pi * 2,
3188:       hull: 28 + _rng.nextDouble() * 16,
3189:       shield: 15 + _rng.nextDouble() * 20,
3190:       bias: _rng.nextDouble(),
3191:     );
3192:   }
3193: 
3194:   PirateShip? _findPirateByTrackingId(int trackingId) {
3195:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
3196:       if (pirate.trackingId == trackingId) {
3197:         return pirate;
3198:       }
3199:     }
3200:     return null;
3201:   }
3202: 
3203:   void _syncTrackingTarget() {
3204:     if (pirates.isEmpty) {
3205:       _trackedPirateId = null;
3206:       return;
3207:     }
3208:     if (_trackedPirateId != null &&
3209:         _findPirateByTrackingId(_trackedPirateId!) != null) {
3210:       return;
3211:     }
3212:     PirateShip? best;
3213:     var bestDistance = double.infinity;
3214:     for (final pirate in pirates) {
3215:       final distance = (pirate.position - playerPosition).distance;
3216:       if (distance < bestDistance) {
3217:         bestDistance = distance;
3218:         best = pirate;
3219:       }
3220:     }
3221:     _trackedPirateId = best?.trackingId;
3222:   }
3223: 
3224:   Station _nearestStationTo(Offset point) {
3225:     Station best = stations.first;
3226:     var bestDistance = (best.position - point).distanceSquared;
3227:     for (var i = 1; i < stations.length; i++) {
3228:       final station = stations[i];
3229:       final d = (station.position - point).distanceSquared;
3230:       if (d < bestDistance) {
3231:         bestDistance = d;
3232:         best = station;
3233:       }
3234:     }
3235:     return best;
3236:   }
3237: 
3238:   CargoContract _generateContractFor(Station pickup) {
3239:     final destinations = _allStations.where((s) => s.id != pickup.id).toList();
3240:     final destination = destinations[_rng.nextInt(destinations.length)];
3241:     final cargoUnits = 2 + _rng.nextInt(4);
3242:     final commodity = _commodityCatalog[_rng.nextInt(_commodityCatalog.length)];
3243:     final crossSectorBonus = destination.sectorIndex == pickup.sectorIndex
3244:         ? 0
3245:         : 90;
3246:     final pickupPrice = _stationMarkets[pickup.id]?[commodity.id];
3247:     final destinationPrice = _stationMarkets[destination.id]?[commodity.id];
3248:     final marketDelta = ((destinationPrice ?? 0) - (pickupPrice ?? 0))
3249:         .clamp(-160, 240)
3250:         .toInt();
3251:     final reward =
3252:         110 +
3253:         _rng.nextInt(170) +
3254:         (destination.id * 6) +
3255:         crossSectorBonus +
3256:         marketDelta;
3257:     return CargoContract(
3258:       id: ++_contractIdSeed,
3259:       pickup: pickup,
3260:       destination: destination,
3261:       cargoUnits: cargoUnits,
3262:       rewardCredits: math.max(80, reward),
3263:       cargoName: commodity.name,
3264:     );
3265:   }
3266: 
3267:   Map<String, int> _generateMarketFor(Station station) {
3268:     final quotes = <String, int>{};
3269:     final sectorBias = (station.sectorIndex - 1) * 0.035;
3270:     final stationBias = ((station.id % 9) - 4) * 0.018;
3271:     final styleSeed = math.sin((station.id * 13) + 0.3) * 0.035;
3272:     for (final commodity in _commodityCatalog) {
3273:       final volatility = (commodity.volatility * (_rng.nextDouble() * 2 - 1));
3274:       final modifier = (1 + sectorBias + stationBias + styleSeed + volatility)
3275:           .clamp(0.62, 1.55);
3276:       quotes[commodity.id] = math.max(
3277:         24,
3278:         (commodity.basePrice * modifier).round(),
3279:       );
3280:     }
3281:     return quotes;
3282:   }
3283: 
3284:   CommoditySpec? _commodityById(String commodityId) {
3285:     for (final commodity in _commodityCatalog) {
3286:       if (commodity.id == commodityId) {
3287:         return commodity;
3288:       }
3289:     }
3290:     return null;
3291:   }
3292: 
3293:   LoreEntry? _loreById(String loreId) {
3294:     for (final entry in _loreCatalog) {
3295:       if (entry.id == loreId) {
3296:         return entry;
3297:       }
3298:     }
3299:     return null;
3300:   }
3301: 
3302:   void _unlockLore(String loreId, {bool silent = false}) {
3303:     final entry = _loreById(loreId);
3304:     if (entry == null) {
3305:       return;
3306:     }
3307:     if (!_unlockedLoreIds.add(loreId) || silent) {
3308:       return;
3309:     }
3310:     _log('FIELD NOTE: ${entry.title} // ${entry.summary}');
3311:   }
3312: 
3313:   double _marketPriceFactor(int stationId, {required bool buying}) {
3314:     final rep = reputationForStation(stationId).toDouble();
3315:     if (buying) {
3316:       return (1 - rep * 0.004).clamp(0.68, 1.30).toDouble();
3317:     }
3318:     return (1 + rep * 0.003).clamp(0.78, 1.26).toDouble();
3319:   }
3320: 
3321:   int _contractRewardDelta({
3322:     required int baseReward,
3323:     required int destinationId,
3324:   }) {
3325:     final rep = reputationForStation(destinationId);
3326:     final raw = (baseReward * rep * 0.0035).round();
3327:     final lower = -(baseReward ~/ 4);
3328:     final upper = baseReward ~/ 3;
3329:     return raw.clamp(lower, upper).toInt();
3330:   }
3331: 
3332:   String _reputationBand(int rep) {
3333:     if (rep <= -26) {
3334:       return 'Hostile';
3335:     }
3336:     if (rep <= -9) {
3337:       return 'Untrusted';
3338:     }
3339:     if (rep <= 18) {
3340:       return 'Neutral';
3341:     }
3342:     if (rep <= 44) {
3343:       return 'Trusted';
3344:     }
3345:     return 'Allied';
3346:   }
3347: 
3348:   void shiftStationReputation(int stationId, int delta, {bool silent = false}) {
3349:     if (_stationByIdOrNull(stationId) == null || delta == 0) {
3350:       return;
3351:     }
3352:     final previous = reputationForStation(stationId);
3353:     final next = (previous + delta).clamp(-40, 80).toInt();
3354:     _stationReputation[stationId] = next;
3355:     if (silent || next == previous) {
3356:       return;
3357:     }
3358:     if ((next - previous).abs() < 5) {
3359:       return;
3360:     }
3361:     final station = _stationByIdOrNull(stationId);
3362:     if (station != null) {
3363:       final signed = next >= 0 ? '+$next' : '$next';
3364:       _log(
3365:         'Standing update at ${station.name}: $signed (${_reputationBand(next)}).',
3366:       );
3367:     }
3368:   }
3369: 
3370:   static int _contractIdSeed = 0;
3371: 
3372:   void toggleDocking() {
3373:     if (isDocked) {
3374:       final station = dockedStation!;
3375:       dockedStation = null;
3376:       playerPosition = station.position + const Offset(0, 145);
3377:       playerVelocity = Offset(0, 35);
3378:       _log('Undocking from ${station.name}.');
3379:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.dock);
3380:       return;
3381:     }
3382:     if (dockCandidate == null) {
3383:       _log(
3384:         'Docking denied. Slow to under ${dockingSpeed.round()} u/s within ${dockingRange.round()} units of a station.',
3385:       );
3386:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3387:       return;
3388:     }
3389:     dockedStation = dockCandidate;
3390:     cockpitMode = 1;
3391:     playerVelocity = Offset.zero;
3392:     playerPosition = dockedStation!.position + const Offset(0, 88);
3393:     _log('Docked at ${dockedStation!.name}.');
3394:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.dock);
3395:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3396:   }
3397: 
3398:   void attemptJump() {
3399:     if (isDocked) {
3400:       _log('Undock before engaging a jump gate.');
3401:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3402:       return;
3403:     }
3404:     final gate = jumpCandidate;
3405:     if (gate == null) {
3406:       _log(
3407:         'Jump gate not ready. Slow to under ${jumpSpeed.round()} u/s within ${jumpRange.round()} units of a gate.',
3408:       );
3409:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3410:       return;
3411:     }
3412:     if (playerFuel < 8 || playerEnergy < 12) {
3413:       _log('Jump aborted. Need at least 8% fuel and 12% energy.');
3414:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3415:       return;
3416:     }
3417:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel - 8, 0, 100);
3418:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - 12, 0, 100);
3419:     final target = _portalById(gate.targetPortalId, gate.targetSectorIndex);
3420:     final exitDir = _normalize(target.exitVector);
3421:     jumpCount += 1;
3422:     _setSector(
3423:       gate.targetSectorIndex,
3424:       spawnPosition: target.position + exitDir * 170,
3425:       initial: false,
3426:     );
3427:     playerVelocity = exitDir * 45;
3428:     playerFacing = math.atan2(exitDir.dy, exitDir.dx);
3429:     _log('Transit complete: ${gate.name} -> ${target.name} ($sectorName).');
3430:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.jump);
3431:     _evaluateCampaignProgress();
3432:   }
3433: 
3434:   void cycleTracking() {
3435:     if (pirates.isEmpty) {
3436:       _trackedPirateId = null;
3437:       _log('TRACKING: no hostile contacts.');
3438:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3439:       return;
3440:     }
3441: 
3442:     final sorted = pirates.toList()
3443:       ..sort(
3444:         (a, b) => (a.position - playerPosition).distance.compareTo(
3445:           (b.position - playerPosition).distance,
3446:         ),
3447:       );
3448:     var index = 0;
3449:     if (_trackedPirateId != null) {
3450:       final currentIndex = sorted.indexWhere(
3451:         (pirate) => pirate.trackingId == _trackedPirateId,
3452:       );
3453:       if (currentIndex >= 0) {
3454:         index = (currentIndex + 1) % sorted.length;
3455:       }
3456:     }
3457:     final target = sorted[index];
3458:     cockpitMode = 4;
3459:     _trackedPirateId = target.trackingId;
3460:     final range = (target.position - playerPosition).distance;
3461:     final contact = pirateContactName(target);
3462:     _log(
3463:       'TRACKING: $contact ${index + 1}/${sorted.length} tagged at ${_distanceKm(range)}.',
3464:     );
3465:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3466:   }
3467: 
3468:   void requestComms() {
3469:     cockpitMode = 3;
3470:     if (activeEncounter != null) {
3471:       _log('* PRESS \'C\' TO COMMUNICATE *');
3472:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3473:       return;
3474:     }
3475:     if (!isDocked &&
3476:         nearestStation != null &&
3477:         nearestStationDistance <= 560 &&
3478:         playerVelocity.distance <= 120) {
3479:       _log('COMM LINK: ${nearestStation!.name} relay responding.');
3480:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.comms);
3481:       return;
3482:     }
3483:     if (!isDocked && nearestStation != null && nearestStationDistance <= 560) {
3484:       _log('OBJECT MUST VISIBLE TO COMMUNICATE');
3485:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3486:       return;
3487:     }
3488:     _log('NO RESPONSE ON ANY CHANNEL.');
3489:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3490:   }
3491: 
3492:   void harvestResource() {
3493:     if (isDocked) {
3494:       _log('Undock before running a harvest pass.');
3495:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3496:       return;
3497:     }
3498:     final node = harvestCandidate;
3499:     if (node == null) {
3500:       _log('No resource field in harvest range.');
3501:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3502:       return;
3503:     }
3504:     if (freeCargoSpace < node.yieldUnits) {
3505:       _log(
3506:         'Insufficient cargo space for ${node.name} (${node.yieldUnits} units).',
3507:       );
3508:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3509:       return;
3510:     }
3511:     final commodity = _commodityById(node.commodityId);
3512:     if (commodity == null) {
3513:       _log('Harvest pass failed: unknown cargo profile.');
3514:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3515:       return;
3516:     }
3517: 
3518:     cockpitMode = 1;
3519:     _tradeCargo.update(
3520:       node.commodityId,
3521:       (units) => units + node.yieldUnits,
3522:       ifAbsent: () => node.yieldUnits,
3523:     );
3524:     _harvestedResourceIds.add(node.id);
3525:     resources.removeWhere((resource) => resource.id == node.id);
3526:     playerEnergy = _clamp(playerEnergy - 6, 0, 100);
3527:     playerFuel = _clamp(playerFuel - 2, 0, 100);
3528:     _unlockLore(node.loreId);
3529:     _log(
3530:       'Harvested ${node.name}: +${node.yieldUnits} ${commodity.name.toUpperCase()}.',
3531:     );
3532:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3533:     _refreshDerivedState();
3534:   }
3535: 
3536:   void tryAcceptDockContract() {
3537:     final station = dockedStation;
3538:     if (station == null) {
3539:       _log('No station link active.');
3540:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3541:       return;
3542:     }
3543:     if (activeContract != null) {
3544:       _log('You already have an active contract.');
3545:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3546:       return;
3547:     }
3548:     final offer = _stationOffers[station.id];
3549:     if (offer == null) {
3550:       _log('No contracts available at ${station.name}.');
3551:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3552:       return;
3553:     }
3554:     if (reputationForStation(station.id) < contractAccessReputationFloor) {
3555:       _log(
3556:         'Dockmaster refuses new contracts at ${station.name}. Improve standing to $contractAccessReputationFloor or higher.',
3557:       );
3558:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3559:       return;
3560:     }
3561:     if (totalCargoUsed + offer.cargoUnits > cargoCapacity) {
3562:       _log('Insufficient cargo space for ${offer.cargoUnits} units.');
3563:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3564:       return;
3565:     }
3566: 
3567:     activeContract = offer.copyForAcceptance();
3568:     cockpitMode = 6;
3569:     _stationOffers[station.id] = _generateContractFor(station);
3570:     _log(
3571:       'Accepted contract: ${offer.cargoName} to ${offer.destination.name} (${projectedContractRewardLabel(offer)}).',
3572:     );
3573:     _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3574: 
3575:     if (activeContract!.pickup.id == station.id) {
3576:       activeContract!.pickedUp = true;
3577:       cargoUsed += activeContract!.cargoUnits;
3578:       _log('Cargo loaded: ${activeContract!.cargoUnits} units aboard.');
3579:     }
3580:   }
3581: 
3582:   void tryDeliverDockContract() {
3583:     final station = dockedStation;
3584:     final contract = activeContract;
3585:     if (station == null || contract == null) {
3586:       _log('No deliverable cargo.');
3587:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3588:       return;
3589:     }
3590: 
3591:     if (!contract.pickedUp && contract.pickup.id == station.id) {
3592:       if (totalCargoUsed + contract.cargoUnits > cargoCapacity) {
3593:         _log('Insufficient cargo space to load the contract cargo.');
3594:         _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3595:         return;
3596:       }
3597:       contract.pickedUp = true;
3598:       cargoUsed += contract.cargoUnits;
3599:       cockpitMode = 6;
3600:       _log('Cargo loaded for ${contract.destination.name}.');
3601:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.contract);
3602:       return;
3603:     }
3604: 
3605:     if (contract.destination.id != station.id || !contract.pickedUp) {
3606:       _log('This station is not the contract destination.');
3607:       _emitCue(GameAudioCue.warning);
3608:       return;
3609:     }
3610: 
3611:     cargoUsed = math.max(0, cargoUsed - contract.cargoUnits);
3612:     final payout = projectedContractReward(contract);
3613:     credits += payout;
3614:     contractsDelivered += 1;
3615:     if (contract.pickup.sectorIndex != contract.destination.sectorIndex) {
3616:       crossSectorContractsDelivered += 1;
3617:     }

(Output capped at 50 KB. Showing lines 2010-3617. Use offset=3618 to continue.)
